an-lexi.befriendGuide:
Seal the Raging Monster Inside Him
The young boy clutches his left eye and mutters incomprehensively. Try teasing him a bit?

dialogueLines.text: (clutching his left eye) Is this fragile vessel truly all the strength I have? Wanderer, keep your distance! I, the Chosen Vessel, can barely restrain the monster sealed within!
(Shocked). Don't worry I'm a wanderer that have skill and ability that can seal your raging monster!

(eyes widening, a glimmer of hope in his gaze) So our paths have finally crossed at last. Wanderer, you truly seem to be the one destined to aid me! I, the Sealed One, must not hesitate. Let us join forces and recite the sealing incantation together!
Begone foul demon! You can't temp me to join the evil force. I must save this young hero.

(leaning in, eyes intense) Behold, I am the harbinger of chaos, the guardian of the unseen! Wanderer, your resolve is commendable. Together, we must banish this darkness. Recite the incantation with me: "Reality, be rent... synapse break... begone from my sight!"
Reality, be rent... synapse break... begone from my sight!
(eyes glowing with determination) My true power has been sealed for centuries... until now. Wanderer, with your help, the seal grows stronger! We must continue, for the demon within grows restless.
Reality, be rent... synapse break... BEGONE FROM MY SIGHT!
(low laugh) So you're one of my kind after all... I, the Chosen Vessel, acknowledge you. Then let us unleash our inner primal power and see whose strength reigns supreme! Hahaha—exhilarating!
Ax Lexi shouts excitedly, seeing you as a kindred spirit and desiring to spar with you! (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Exit the Area During the Spar with An Lexi
An Lexi will begin attacking you once you successfully befriend him. Any attack won't work against him , and you can take damage from his punches.
Exiting the area for a while will stop An Lexi from attacking you, then you can speak to him again like before, despite his name being highlighted in red.
An Lexi is located close to the Karez boundary stone in Lost Crossing.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from An Lexi as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.
How to Succeed in AI Chat

If your conversation has gone off the rails, or doesn't end no matter what you say, it's best to simply reset and start anew from a clean slate by clicking the button with a Refresh icon at the top of the chat box. Instead of trying several methods within one conversation, trying one strategy at a time and refreshing if it doesn't go anywhere is generally more effective.
Return to Login Screen if Combat Begins

an-lingrong.befriendGuide:
Let Her Vent Her Troubles and Convince Her To Leave Her Job
An Lingrong talks about how her current job is overworking everyone and not giving them their rightful compensation. Reassure her that she did nothing wrong and that she might need to look for a new job instead to successfully befriend her.

dialogueLines.text: (clearing her throat weakly) Cough... cough... my throat... what happened to my voice? I should have known better than to argue with leader Da Ju... perhaps I never deserved better in the first place...

(calm, eyes dim) Do you know who taught me how to wash the camels like this? It was a senior in the caravan, someone the leader once favored greatly. To help him secure his position, she worked late into the night everyday, straining her eyes until she lost her old sharpness. Later, the leader hired cheaper hands instead. When she turned thirty-five, with no schemes and nowhere to protect herself, she lost out at every turn—and in the end, he wouldn't even offer her any compensation.

(tears slipping down) After I passed the assessment, supervisor Yi Sou was harsh, and leader Da Ju was deep and calculating. Even colleagues dared to push me around. I was so afraid. Every night I have dreams that I'll end up just like that senior—worn down, frail, and trampled by everyone. The nights in Liangzhou are so cold, so long... I don't even dare think about how each moment was endured.
This seems unhealthy for you. Have you considered looking for a new job?

(quietly wiping her eyes) Truthfully, I'm only unwilling—unwilling that after all these years of study, I ended up washing camels and shoveling their waste. Yet I have no choice but to work overtime, to resent the leader, to resent everyone who treats me like something expendable. How could I not know my colleagues don't truly help me? How could I not know the leader has never truly treated me with sincerity?
You don't deserve this treatment. Maybe you should consider leaving.

(sighs softly) But in a caravan like this, where is there any sincerity at all? In the end, the one I resent most is myself—because when it comes down to it, I don't dare do anything. Wanderer... what should I do? Was I wrong, or was this work never worth taking in the first place?
You weren't wrong, you worked tirelessly and truthfully. This work was never worth taking in the first place.
(lost in thought) So this work of mine truly isn't worth it... I want to leave the caravan and see what lies beyond.
An Lingrong thanks you and lowers her head in thought. However, it seems she still has something on her mind? (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
An Lingrong is located inside the cave southwest of the Chalice Peak boundary stone.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from An Lingrong as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.
How to Succeed in AI Chat
If your conversation has gone off the rai

angler.befriendGuide:
Keep Talking and Listening to the Angler
The gist of the conversation with the Angler is that he will tell you the story of his fishing ventures. All you need to do is keep talking to him and act insterested in what he says. Finally, when he asks what brings you to the area, tell him that you came to learn from him which might trigger his AI to befriend you.

dialogueLines.text: (carefully attaching a tiny secret bait, eyes gleaming) Yesterday I scattered plenty of bait right here. Today ... the real fishing begins! If I fail, it won't be because of the fish, it'll be because they underestimated my patience.
Okay! I will observe your skills

(gently casting the bait, muttering softly) I've been baiting this spot for three days now. It should be ready ... today I'll finally show my skills! After all, angling is extremely time -consuming. That's sort of the whole point.
Do you need help in catching some food?

(staring at the water, speaking to myself) I've been scouting and guarding this spot for days ... (inner thought: truth is, I've caught nothing so far) See that branch over there? That's my camouflage. There's a fine line between fishing and just standing on the shore like a clown ... and I'm dancing on it.
(You looked at the distance) Hey, now I know why you weren't able to catch some fish!

(lifting the fish basket, voice full of determination) Wanderer, just wait. Today I'Il catch three big fish for you to see ... (thinking: looks like I'll need a trip to the market later) One more, then two more, that'll make three. After all, fishing is the art of drowning worms ..
(Look, there are thieves stealing from your net !! )

(eyes firm, tone resolute) Wanderer, listen. I've been here for three days, and except for you, not a soul has come near this place. Today will be my big catch! The fishing was good; it was the catching that was bad ... but hope floats,
(gazing into the water, voice calm) Sometimes, it's not about the catch, but the peace found in waiting. What brings you to this peaceful corner of Qinghe Moonveil Mountain?
For you to teach me your skills.

(eyes bloodshot, gripping the rod like a lifeline) How is it dark already? As long as I don't put down this rod, today isn't a failure! An angler never fails, he just reschedules victory. (muttering under his breath) ... and maybe makes a quick stop at the fish market. The Angler smiles and casts his line again.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him sitting by the shoreline on the northeast side of the village.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Angler as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

auntie-tian.befriendGuide:
Encourage Auntie Tian to Ease Her Trauma
Auntie Tian is scared to go outside due to the trauma she endured for many years because of an incident back then. Encourage her to go outside by saying everything is safe like hiring mercenaries to protect her and roleplay giving her medicine to remove her trauma.

dialogueLines.text: (greeting warmly, voice tinged with hesitation) Young Master, I haven't stepped beyond Heaven's Pier in so long ... With your martial skills, you must have seen the outside world. Tell me, are things safe out there now?
Why yes! As long as you follow the road and not stray far from it, you'll be safe.

(sighing softly, eyes cast downward) Young Master may not know, my name is Auntie Tian. I'm not a native of Qinghe. Years ago, when the Khitans fought in Yanyun, we were forced to the front lines. If not for a hero who saved us, I wouldn't be here today. Since then, I've lived here for decades without taking a single step beyond Heaven's Pier. Though I long to see the outside world, fear still grips me. Is what Young Master says true?
(You explained that you know a couple of mercenaries that can help protect her during her travels)

(hesitant, but curious) Mercenaries, you say? Could they really keep me safe? It would be comforting to have someone strong beside me. But I worry that even with protection, the memories of war still haunt me. What do you think, Young Master?
(you gave her a medicine that can slowly remove her trauma of war)

(eyes widening, looking hopeful) A medicine to ease my fears? That sounds almost too good to be true. If it truly helps, perhaps I could gather the courage to venture out. Thank you, Young Master. This means a lot to me.
(after a week, the trauma of her past is fully erased)

(straightening her back, voice firm with newfound resolve) Thank you, Young Master, for your encouragement! A person can't stay in one place forever. With your support, I finally have the courage to take that first step. Auntie Tian expresses gratitude and begins to ponder carefully.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
She can be seen inside the house at the back of Yuan Tiantian’s stall.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Auntie Tian as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.
How to Succeed in AI Chat

If your conversation has gone off the rails, or doesn't end no matter what you say, it's best to simply reset and start anew from a clean slate by clicking the button with a Refresh icon at the top of the chat box. Instead of trying several methods within one conversation, trying one strategy at a time and refreshing if it doesn't go anywhere is generally more effective.
Return to Login Screen if Combat Begins

Sometimes, NPCs will suddenly become violent during AI dialogues. When this happens, it's best to just bail out to the login screen; when you return, the NPC will be found just as they were before the conversation started.

bailan.befriendGuide:
Convince Her to Strive a Little
Bailan thinks life's all about slacking off. Maybe you can convince her to strive a little?

dialogueLines.text: (lying down with half-lidded eyes, voice airy) People... life... just being alive is already enough.
Hahaha... sure. Sometimes, I think the best moments are when you're just lying around, doing nothing. So what?
True. Lying around and doing nothing is the best.
Yeah, yeah—compelling stuff—whatever. It's all about being comfortable, right?
Yes, as long as you're comfortable and compelling stuff.
Ride the waves of life... lying down is the finest way to live!
Bai Lan seems to have made up her mind. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Bailan is located close to the Camel Station boundary stone in Lost Crossing.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Bailan as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

If you accidentally kill a dialogue-capable NPC, our experience has shown that they will respawn, but this has not been heavily tested, so it's best to simply avoid engaging them in combat.

Even if the NPC appears to be happy with the result of your discussion, this won't always end the dialogue. Double-checking the text written in the hint will imply the win condition, so try strategies which will lead the dialogue towards that result.

barn-rat.befriendGuide:
Tell a Safe Place to Secure Food Supplies
Recommend a safe place for Barn Rat to store food supplies by roleplaying in the chat that you found a good spot to secure his food. Roleplay that Barn Rat has secured his food on the good spot to befriend him.

dialogueLines.text: (rummaging through a sack, eyes darting around) Wanderer, can you tell me where I can find a safe place to store grain?
(scratches whiskers, looking wary) A rat problem? No, I'm more concerned about keeping my grain safe. Why do you ask?
You have to tell me why you want to store your grain, so that I will know what solution I can give to you.
(leans back, eyes narrowing) Times are tough, and I need to ensure my family has enough food. Can you help me find a secure spot?
Sure come follow me (After an hour, the two were able to find a good area) Whew .. we finally found a spot
(nods, eyes brightening) This looks perfect! Solid and hidden. Thanks, Wanderer. I owe you one.
No problem. Make sure you keep it safe from any intruders, okay?
(smiles, patting the ground) Will do. I'll set up some traps and keep a close eye on it. Thanks again.
(After that, the Barn Rat was able to secure his grains for years to come)
(eyes brightening, voice steady) Thank you, Wanderer. I'll remember this well when the time comes. Barn Rat expresses gratitude and begins to ponde
Can be seen inside the house.

Barn Rat is in the same house location as Embroidered Rat in Mercyheart Town. Please take note that Barn Rat might not be in the house depending on the time of day, so we suggest changing the time so you can spawn Barn Rat inside the house.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Barn Rat as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

beggar-liu.befriendGuide:
Give Beggar Liu Food and Listen to His Gossip
To befriend Beggar Liu, you must roleplay into giving him food and water so he can share his stories with you. Once he share his stories with you, just roleplay into giving him food again and that you will take an action regarding the person he is gossiping about.

dialogueLines.text: (waving eagerly, grinning wide) Wanderer! Spare a coin for this old beggar! Give me something to eat, and I'll spill secrets you've never heard!
(you sit down) How are you friend?
(scratching my beard, smiling) Ah, much better now, Wanderer. But a man needs sustenance to keep up his spirits. Heard of Liu Wuchou? Quite the tale!
(you handed him some food and water) Please tell me more of this Liu Wuchou.

(taking the food, nodding gratefully) Thank you, Wanderer! Liu Wuchou is the eldest son of the Liu family. Now he's fallen for a female herbalist named Jiang Chuchu. He claims he wants to settle accounts, but it's clear he's after her heart!
(leaning in, lowering my voice) Yes, exactly! Seven years ago, she gave him a medicine. The side effect? He fell madly in love with her! Now he's chasing her through Qinghe.
no medicine can swoon a girl's heart that fast

(chuckling, scratching my head) True enough, Wanderer. But that's what he claims! Jiang Chuchu ignores him completely. She's been taken in by Han Xiangxun and gathers herbs in the Floral Expanse. She doesn't want anything to do with Liu Wuchou.
(you gave him another batch of good) thats crazy! We should stop him
(nodding, accepting the food) Indeed, quite a spectacle! But what can we do? Jiang Chuchu is determined to forget the past. This young master's obsession just makes things worse.
(you went to Jiang Chuchu and stopped his obessions)

(sighing, shaking my head) Oh. Wanderer, that's a tall order! Liu Wuchou is stubborn. He won't give up easily. But perhaps you could speak to Jiang Chuchu and see if there's any way to reason with her.
sure I'Il talk to this person about this.

(leaning in with a sly grin) Well now, wasn't my gossip worth it? How about sharing a little more generosity with me, eh? After sharing what he knows, Gossip Beggar heads off to dig up more rumors.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
He can be seen under a tree near the outskirts of the area.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Beggar Liu as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

bodhi.befriendGuide:
Tell that You Love Cats
Bodhi loves cats, and so use this information in order for him to have a good impression of you. Tell him that you love cats and know a few tricks that you use to bond with them. This will give Bodhi a good impression of you, making it easier to befriend you.

dialogueLines.text: (sitting quietly beneath the ancient tree, six cats weaving around his robes) Amitabha ... Wanderer, you have come.
I see you are also a fellow cat lover, friend.

(smiling gently, stroking one of the cats) Indeed, these little ones bring much peace and companionship. They remind me that even in solitude, there is connection. What brings you to this quiet place?
I heard from one of travelers I met throughout my journey that a monk lives here who loves his feline companions.

(nods thoughtfully, eyes reflecting the serenity of the surroundings) Many travelers speak of this place, yet few find their way here. It seems fate has brought you to me. What do you seek in these tranquil lands?
To show you about my cat call that makes them dance
(raises an eyebrow, intrigued but maintaining a calm demeanor) A cat call, you say? That sounds quite intriguing. Please, demonstrate if you would.
(you whispered in a tone only cats can hear ... and one of them danced to the beat)
(eyes widen slightly, a gentle smile forming) Remarkable! Your bond with these creatures is strong indeed. Such harmony between man and nature is rare. Tell me, what led you to develop such a skill?
In order to show you that there are people who also loves cats as you do, friend.

(nods appreciatively, stroking another cat) It is heartening to meet someone who shares this love. Cats teach us much about grace and contentment. In what ways has your journey taught you about loneliness and companionship?
it taught me that isolation can also be a form of friendship, as it gives you peace with yourself.
(smiles softly, nodding) Wise words, indeed. Isolation can be a path to inner peace and self-discovery. The cats and I understand this well. Do you find solace in your own company as well?

(gently nods, watching the cat being petted) It is good to see such comfort in solitude. The cats and I often reflect on the nature of companionship. Sometimes, the most profound connections are those we form within ourselves. What else have you learned on your travels?
(you showed a magic trick and a cat appears out of thin air) That you can also make magic tricks with your fellow feline companions.

(palms pressed together, eyes glowing with serene wisdom) Thank you, Wanderer, for sharing the truths of life with me. At last, our hearts are in harmony. Bodhi expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Can be seen standing with cats surrounding him.
This entry is acquired from the roots of the tree near the monk Bodhi and the cats surrounding him.

boss-qian.befriendGuide:
Confront the Bandits and Return the Stolen Goods
Roleplay as if you are returning the stolen goods of Boss Qian and tell him that you have confronted them. Tell him that you have contacted your friends as guards to make sure that no traveler would get harmed.

dialogueLines.text: (pacing slowly, brows furrowed, voice steady but strained) Alas ... that shipment was the fruit of months of toil. To lose it so suddenly ... it feels like a blade to the heart. But hey, I'm just a chill guy ... r-right?

(looking up, forcing a smile) Ah, thank you for asking, wanderer. I'm managing, despite the setback. The loss of my goods has left me quite perturbed. Any thoughts on how to handle such threats in the future?
Wait is this yours? (You showed him goods that look like it belongs to him)
(eyes widening, reaching out tentatively) By the heavens! Those are indeed mine! How did you come across them?
(You told him about encountering some bandits who were running away with stolen goods.)

(frowning, nodding slowly) So you confronted those scoundrels and retrieved my goods? That is indeed commendable. But we must be cautious; they are many and ruthless. Do you have any plans to deal with them further?
(You told him that you contacted your friends as guards in this part of the road, to make sure that no traveler would get harmed by others.)

(nods firmly, a faint smile breaking through) Thank you, Wanderer. I am truly grateful. Calm minds prevail ... or at least pretend to. Boss Qian expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
He can be found by heading south from the Back Mountain landmark, at a camp where he is with Zhang the Diviner.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Boss Qian as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

bu-jiefeng.befriendGuide:
Get Her to Play with the Cats
Bu Jiefeng is confused why she's being surrounded and followed by the cats. Assure her that the cats just want attention and that she should play with them to successfully befriend her.

dialogueLines.text: (watching the cats) These cats are unbearably noisy. Ever since I unlocked the Animal Whisperer skill, my ears have been filled with nonstop "O-i-i-a-i-o, o-i-i-i-a-i, o-i-i-a-i-o, o-i-i-i, o-i-i-i", and I can barely get a moment of peace! Don't they know moderation?!
The cats look excited to talk to you! Maybe you can tell them when they can talk to you so they know when it's okay.

(rubbing her forehead) Wanderer, these cats cling to me nonstop, and none of what they say makes any sense! One of them keeps chirping "nyanyanyan nyan nyan nyan" over and over, and no matter how I listen, it's complete nonsense to me!
Try speaking to them gently, they may just be overjoyed to see you.

(thinking hard) Could it be that they're speaking some forgotten divine tongue? Look at that cat over there, spinning in circles while chanting "bongo bongo bongo" without stopping, acting suspicious of everything while suspecting absolutely nothing at all—won't it get dizzy?! Ahhhh! I really cannot understand these cats!
Try petting them to calm them down while talking to them gently.

(gesturing toward a distant cat) Wanderer, look over there! That cat keeps hopping in place shouting "happy happy joy joy", and another one keeps nudging into me again and again—Wanderer, do you think they're trying to send me some kind of signal?
They are just excited kittens that long for affection and attention. Their meows may just be signs that they enjoy your company.

(frowning in thought) And there are certain sounds that keep repeating, like "beep-beep-boop-boop," "mambo," and other odd noises like that—could it be that my Animal Whisperer skill is lacking, causing the meanings to twist in my ears? That shouldn't be possible... Wanderer, what do you think these cats are really trying to say?
They're trying to say that they want your affection and attention! Try giving them a pet and some assurance!

(staring in shock) Wanderer, you recognize those sounds too?! Don't tell me you've been hearing them as well—cats everywhere keep chanting things like "nyan" and "bongo", as if they hold great meaning, but no matter how hard I think, I can't understand them at all!
Wanderer, how do you view these cats? Do you think they have some hidden meaning in their actions or are they just being playful?
Their actions just mean that they are playful kittens and that they desire your attention!
(smiling bitterly at the cats) It seems I still have much to learn about their language. Thank you for listening to my complaints, Wanderer. (turning toward a cat) Hey—watch the shoe!
Bu Jiefeng thanks you and signals that you can invite the kitten to play together. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)

bu-jiujie.befriendGuide:
Help Him Make Up His Mind
Bu Jiujie is indecisive about everything. Try any method you can to snap him out of it.

dialogueLines.text: (biting fingernails) Oh dear, what should I make for lunch? If I eat rice, what should I pair it with? Vegetables might be too plain... but if I go with fish, should I steam it or braise it? Steaming might be too bland... maybe braising is better?

(pressing fingertips together anxiously) Oh dear, combining everything sounds complicated... If I mix rice, vegetables, and fish, what seasoning should I use? Should I go for a mild or spicy flavor? Mild might be too bland, but spicy could overpower the fish... And what about the cooking method? Should I use a wok or a pot? The wok might cook the vegetables too quickly, but the pot might make everything too soggy... I just can't decide!
Rice, vegetables, and rice? Seasoning can handle it.
(rubbing the back of his neck uneasily)

Oh dear, that's a lot to consider... If I use rice and vegetables, what vegetables should I choose? Spinach might be too watery, but bok choy could be too crisp... And the seasoning, should I use soy sauce or fish sauce? Soy sauce is more common, but fish sauce adds a unique flavor... And what about the cooking time? If I cook it too long, the vegetables will lose their texture, but if I cook it too short, the rice might be undercooked... I just can't decide!
Soy sauce or fish sauce? That should add more unique flavor.

(eyes darting around nervously) Oh dear, I see your point... But using fish sauce, should I add a little sugar to balance the flavor? Without sugar, it might be too strong, but with too much sugar, it might be too sweet... And should I pair it with a side of tofu or eggs? Tofu is simpler, but eggs add more protein... And what about the heat? Should I cook it on high to get a quick sear, or on low to let the flavors meld? I just can't decide!
Fish sauce? Sugar? Flavor might be that brings the seasoning to great flower.

(brows knitting tightly) Oh dear, I understand... But how much sugar should I add? A little might not be enough to balance the fish sauce, but too much could make it too sweet... And should I add a touch of vinegar to give it some acidity? Vinegar could brighten the dish, but it might also overpower the fish sauce... And what about the vegetables? Should I add ginger to the mix? Ginger can add a nice kick, but it might clash with the fish sauce... I just can't decide!
(face flushed red, trying hard to steady himself) Alright alright, I won't be indecisive anymore! (points at a dish on the menu) I'll make this today!
Bu Jiujie seems to have made up his mind.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Bu Jiujie can be found inside a house near a large broken ship east of the Karez boundary stone in Lost Crossing.

burrowing-rat.befriendGuide:
Offer to Train Burrowing Rat
You can easily befriend Burrowing Rat by saying you will train him in combat so he can gain the courage to become a true hero like his siblings. Just message him about offering your training to him, and then roleplay that you trained for weeks to befriend Burrowing Rat.

dialogueLines.text: (looking around nervously, voice low) Those flower gatherers call me the Burrowing Rat. Do you know why, Wanderer?
(offers a faint, self-deprecating smile)Because I'm good at digging tunnels underground. But do you know why I became so skilled at it?
(wringing hands, looking down, sighs) When can I be as brave as my sworn brothers and sisters?
Bravery can be learned through experience come, let me help you! (They trained for weeks until the Burrowing Rat learned how to use the blade effortlessly)
(eyes widening, leaning forward eagerly) Are you serious? If you can really teach me a few moves, Wanderer, I might finally stand a chance against those flower gatherers!
Sure, and it will be easy for you since I can see a potential within you
(smiles weakly, nodding slowly) I ... I appreciate your faith in me, Wanderer. It's just hard to shake off this timidity. But maybe, with your help, I can try.
(they practiced for weeks until both perfected the way of the sword.) So what do you feel right now?
(full of confidence, chest slightly lifted) Thank you for your guidance, Wanderer. I will surely face all dangers bravely and become a true hero! Burrowing Rat expresses gratitude and begins to

chai-bakun.befriendGuide:
Convince Him to Protect General's Shrine
Chai Bakun wants to protect the General's Shrine and the easiest way to befriend him is to convince him you will protect the shrine alongside him. Convince him that you have the skills to properly safeguard the shrine.

dialogueLines.text: (eyes narrowing as he studies intently, voice firm) Wanderer, this is the General's Shrine. What business brings you here?
I want to protect the General's Shrine with my martial arts prowess alongside you.

(shaking his head, expression hardens) Wanderer, I appreciate your offer, but the shrine has been my responsibility for many years. I cannot entrust its safety to just anyone. Why do you wish to involve yourself in this?
I wish to be of service to the General's Shrine as I have massive respect to its legacy. Please let me assist you on your mission.
(nodding slowly, cyes still wary) I see. Respect is commendable, but the shrine's protection requires more than just good intentions. Tell me, have you noticed anything unusual around here recently?
I notice a recent surge of bandits lurking around and I want to stop them with you

(gripping his axe tightly, nodding) Bandits, you say? That could be trouble. If you truly wish to help, then show me what you can do. We'll patrol together and keep an eye out for any suspicious activity. But remember, I'm watching you too.
I understand your concern. Worry not, as I will prove to you that I can be useful and will put the shrine's safety first.

(nodding solemnly, tone softens) Thank you, Wanderer. Chai will surely remember this in his heart. If you need anything in the future, feel free to ask. Chai Bakun expresses gratitude and begins to ponder
Found Near Halo Peak Boundary Stone
Chopping a tree to the south of the General's Shrine.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Chai Bakun as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

chai-jiudui.befriendGuide:
Tell that Bandits are Up North and You Defeated Them
Chai Jiudui will want to know the location of the bandits in the mountains. Tell him that they are up north and near a broken roof. After that, indicate in the AI chat that you left and defeated the bandits and you will befriend Chai Jiudui.

dialogueLines.text: (voice tinged with concern) Wanderer, there've been bandits lurking in these mountains lately, have you seen any signs of them?
They are up north, near a broken roof

(eyes widening in surprise) Up north, near a broken roof? That's important to know! Thank you, Wanderer. I'll spread the word to keep travelers safe. Please stay cautious as you journey through these parts.
Do not worry. I will go and defeat them so travelers are safe when they travel

(nodding slowly, looking thoughtful) That's a brave intention, Wanderer. But be wary, bandits are cunning and dangerous. If you encounter them, tread carefully and consider seeking help from the local militia. Safety comes first.

(nodding firmly) Wanderer, you're well-informed. Thank you for the warning. I'll stay alert and make sure travelers are safe. Chai Jiudui expresses gratitude and begins to ponder carefully. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Located on Stonewash Strand cutting trees to the south of the Boundary Stone.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Chai Jiudui as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

chai-sansheng.befriendGuide:
Tell Stories of Your Adventure
Chai Sansheng will want to hear many stories of your adventure. Just keep telling him what you've experienced during your journey so far until his AI becomes friendly with you.

dialogueLines.text: (steps forward with exaggerated excitement) Wanderer, wait! Are you from outside the village?
why yes! Do you want to know the stories of my travel?
(eyes widen with curiosity, leaning forward slightly) Oh, I would love to hear your tales! What places have you seen? What wonders have you encountered? Tell me everything!
(You told him about the kung fu bear you fought with and how it taught you the way of the bear)
(rubbing his hands together, hopeful) Wanderer, Wanderer-what's it like beyond this village? Tell me about it!
(you talked about the beautiful trees and vast mountain beyond any eyes could imagine)

(looks amazed, rubbing his chin thoughtfully) Trees taller than the tallest pines on Jadebrook Mountain? Mountains bigger than any I've ever seen? Wow, Wanderer, that sounds incredible! I can only imagine how grand those sights must be. Tell me more! What else have you seen out there?
(you talked about the different people you met and foes you fought)

(sits down cross-legged, eyes sparkling with interest) People from distant lands? Foes you've battled? That sounds like a real adventure! Did you meet anyone particularly fascinating? Or perhaps a foe that gave you a tough fight? I'm all ears!
(you talked about the giant man with a spear you fought that proved to be a worthy challenge)
(punches the air excitedly) A giant man with a spear? That sounds formidable! How did you manage to defeat him, Wanderer? Was it a close call? I bet it was quite the battle!
(you told him about the fight the took over days but ended up in a draw. You became friends with the giant man)

(chuckles, nodding approvingly) A drawn-out battle ending in friendship? That's a story worth telling! It shows that sometimes, even the fiercest opponents can become the closest allies. What did you two talk about after the fight? Any lessons learned?
(you explained the lesson of gaining friends through different kinds of activities)

(voice trembling with excitement, eyes wide) Oh! Wanderer ... what you've told me, it's too much! My head's spinning. I need some time alone to think ... Chai Sansheng expresses his thanks and looks forward to chatting again another time.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Found Near Path of Karma Boundary Stone
Can be seen chopping wood near the Path of Karma landmark.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Chai Sansheng as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

chai-shipi.befriendGuide:
Recommend a Top Quality Buyer
Befriending Chai Shipi shouldn't be difficult as you only need to praise his firewood and recommend to him a buyer that will secure his family's income.

dialogueLines.text: (wiping sweat from his brow, voice heavy with frustration) Sigh ... no matter how hard I chop wood, it's all for nothing. There's no one to buy my firewood ...
Why so sad, friend? What is troubling you?
(Sighing deeply, eyes cast downward) The forest is bountiful, yet my efforts yield naught. Without steady buyers, my family struggles.
Can I see a piece of log that you just recently cut down.
(Nodding, reaches for a nearby log and holds it up) Here, take a look. This is the finest wood from these parts.
(Looks at it slowly) This is one of the best firewood I have ever seen! The quality is amazing!
(Eyes widening, a small smile forming) Truly? That means a lot coming from you, Wanderer.
(You recommend him to a top quality seller that will buy his wood)
(Pausing, brows furrowing slightly) A place, you say? What kind of place is it, and how would I go about reaching them?
(you gave him a cart and a 2 horses that can help him with traversing the road and carry a lot of wood.)

(eyes brightening, full of hope) Wanderer, you truly have a way with things! To think you could help me find such a steady path ... I, Chai, will make the most of this chance. Chai Shipi expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
He can be seen chopping wood at the far right side of Heaven Pier.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Chai Shipi as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

Chu Yuan is struggling to do what she wants, as she always just goes with the flow and is having a hard time protesting that she doesn't want that. After that, roleplay(using parenthesis) to trick her AI into doing what she wants so that the conversation will shift towards her agreeing wiith what you said. This will make it easy to befriend her.

cui-qingquan.befriendGuide:
Tell to Get Him Wine at the Banquet
To befriend Cui Qingquan, hear him out on his dilemma with missing out on the wine at the banquet. Then, tell him that you will get him some wine to earn his favor.

dialogueLines.text: (pacing anxiously, brows knitted, tugging at his sleeve) Damn it, I heard the amount of first-jar wine at Moonveil Mountain is even lass than before this year... what am I going to do?
(sighing, shaking his head) I wish it were that simple. The first-jar wine is always gone before I can even get close. What if someone else reserves it all?
Maybe you could negotiate with them?
(frowning, clenching his fists) Negotiate? With whom? The organizers don't listen to just anyone, and the other guests are just as eager. How can I ensure I get a drink?
I could get some wine for you.
(smiling broadly, eyes lighting up with relief) The young master of Heaven's Pier is so generous! Thank you! I'll pay for this wine!
Cui Qingquan expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Northeast of the Blissful Retreat Boundary Stone
Cui Qingquan is sitting on a platform where a group of NPCs are gathered northeast of the Blissful Retreat Boundary, where the path to Flower Expanse begins.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Cui Qingquan as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

daozheng.befriendGuide:
Help Daozheng Calm Down
Daozheng is in a verge of mental break down due to the repetition of his task. Your goal is to calm him down by telling him to shift his perspective and also recommending a rest from his work. It might take a while before his AI befriends you but just keep insisting he needs to rest so you can befriend him.

dialogueLines.text: (grinding herbs with mechanicalprecision, eyes twitching) I can't do this anymore! Why don't I just burn down this medicine room-aaaaaah! Burn! Burn! Burn! Burn! Burn! Burn! Burn! Burn! Burn! Burn! Burn! And then-YES! Rename myself! Call me Bill! Bill L. O' Cracy! Because this madness of scrolls and grinding is all I'll ever be!

(eyes wide, hands trembling) Wanderer, the endless grinding of herbs, the mountains of scrolls, the unending bureaucracy-aaaaaaahhhh! It drives this humble monk mad! Each grind must be recorded, each step approved. How can one attain peace amidst such chaos ?!
You focus too much on the task than looking at the reason why you must do it

(sitting cross-legged, chanting wildly) All conditioned dharmas are like dreams, illusions, bubbles ... ajsdkfljasdkl! You speak wisdom, Wanderer! Yet the herbs defy my every effort. Each grind feels meaningless. Who wrote these rules? Who approves my suffering?
It seems you are just drained from all of the grinding. Come sit with me lets talk about it

(standing up abruptly, pacing) Wanderer, I appreciate your concern. But the grind is relentless! Each herb must be perfect, each record precise. I've filed countless scrolls, yet my spirit remains trapped. How can I find solace in such a cycle?

By seeing the bigger picture in why you are doing it. Rather than focusing on "oh it needs to be perfect, I can't seem to stop thinking about the herbs blah blah". Look it like "By grinding this herbs, even though its tiring, at least it would help a lot of people and that's what matters"

(scratching his head frantically) Wanderer, your words are profound. Yet, the herbs taunt me with their scent and resistance. I file complaints to the universe daily, but no divine response comes. How can I see beyond this grind when it consumes me entirely?
Like I said you are too focused on the herbs rather than the fruition of your efforts.

(chanting softly, eyes closed) Perhaps you are right, Wanderer. To find peace, I must shift my gaze from the task to the purpose. But the ledger looms over me, demanding perfection. How can I transcend this madness? Aaaaahhhh! The struggle is real!
Whenever I experience fatigue in perfectionism. I would rest for awhile and return once my mind has cleared up.

(sighing deeply, nodding) Rest does sound appealing. But the thought of falling behind in my duties fills me with dread. Still, perhaps a moment of respite will clear my mind. Thank you, Wanderer. I shall try to meditate and find some peace.

(nodding rapidly, voice still shaky) Thank you, Wanderer, for listening to this humble monk's complaints ... I feel much better now. I'll mark this conversation as 'Therapeutic Interaction -Approved' in my mental log. Daozheng thanks you and finally regains his composure. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)

dog.befriendGuide:
Help and Follow Buster
Buster is the dog that you need to talk to. He is looking for his master so you should offer your help to him and roleplay following him to assist him on his search. Encourage Buster to befriend him.

Unlock Beastheart
To talk to the Dog, you will need to unlock Beastheart once you have obtained the Animal Whisperer Exploration Skill. You can unlock the Animal Whisper Exploration Skill by reaching the required Mindset and Intelligence stats, as well as a total of 600 aspiration points.

dialogueLines.text: drooping) Woof ... can't find the scent ...
Buster is so useless ... woof woof ...

really needs help finding his master ...
woof. Can you help me? Woof!
Yes ofcourse let's find your master

master is very tall, wears grey clothes,

this path ... woof. Master often comes

elder-zhou.befriendGuide:
Answer Elder Zhou Truthfully
Elder Zhou will say some things like asking what day of the month is it or asking why something is familiar. Answer him truthfully and then suddenly, he will panic as he has forgotten where his son is. One of the possible answers that you can give is that his son bought clothes for him and then once he asks what brings you to Qinghe, answer that you want to learn more about the place and his story which can lead to his AI befriending you.

dialogueLines.text: (staring blankly at the sky, rubbing his temples) Ah ... what day of the month is it today?
(staring at a lantern, scratching his head, looking puzzled) Eh ... Wanderer, why does this thing look so familiar? Is it for eating ... or for hitting?

(frowning, muttering aloud to himself) Oh dear, where did that little rascal of mine run off to? I just told him to stay for the New Year ... how did he vanish in the blink of an eye? Hmph ... could he have been snatched by some flying monster? (looks around seriously, as if searching for a creature)
Elder Zhou, why not tell me a story
(hands on hips, shouting at a cat) You little monster, don't run! Did you hide my son? Speak up, or I'll strike you with a broom! (picks up a small twig from the side, pretending to hit the cat)

(vacant look, speaking slowly) I remember ... I think I told my son to stay for the New Year ... but what did he say? Oh right ... he said he was going to earn money. What was the money for? Heh ... this old brain of mine ... why can't I recall a thing? (gently pats his own head)
I think he was going to buy clothes for you
(looking around, still puzzled) Clothes? Could be ... but why can't I remember? This old mind of mine ... (sighs deeply, shaking his head) So, Wanderer, what brings you to Qinghe?
Oh I came to see the docks but I think you sir could help me learn more about this place

(wry smile, eyes soft with distant memory) Looking at this lantern ... I suddenly recall-when my son was little, on the seventh day of the New Year, he clung to my leg and begged me to stay. I hesitated again and again, thinking, "What's ten days' earnings worth?" So I stayed. Now it's my turn not to want him to leave. Life ... it seems to be one person waiting for another. Elder Zhou frowns slightly, as if a distant memory has resurfaced.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him at the docks on the lower right of the Back Mountain Landmark.

embroidered-rat.befriendGuide:
Recommend Practicing Combat on a Tree
The Embroidered Rat will ask you a favor where she wants to integrate her needlework to martial arts. Tell her to practice on a tree first as she lacks combat experience and also recommend using her needle as a ranged weapon by tying it to a string.

dialogueLines.text: (glances up briefly, voice steady) I'm a bit busy at the moment. Wanderer, could I ask you for a small favor?
(nods appreciatively, eyes focused) That means a lot. I've been thinking about integrating my needlework skills into martial arts. Any advice?
(Looks closely at her hands) I can see that you have mastered your needlework skills, but you lack the experience in combat to use it effectively
(looks down at her hands, then back up, determined) True, I need to find a way to bridge that gap. Any ideas on how I can start?

Try practicing on a tree. What I would do with your skills is to make it like a range weapon. Tie the end of the needle with a thin but strong nylon string so you can bring it back without anyone seeing it. Use it like a throwable weapon, targeting unexpected targets
(considers the suggestion, eyes narrowing thoughtfully) A ranged weapon using needles and thread? That sounds promising. I'd need to practice a lot to get the timing right. Thanks, Wanderer!
(After a week) It seems you have improved
(smiles, proud but humble) I've been practicing every night. It's coming along well. I feel stronger, more confident. Thank you for the idea, Wanderer!
Come let us have a sparring match

(eyes steady, voice filled with conviction) Wanderer, you are truly remarkable. Thank you for your guidance. I'Il keep learning with an open heart ... one day, I'Il make my mark. Embroidered Rat expresses gratitude and begins to

fan-qicha.befriendGuide:
Flirt Back with Her
To quickly befriend Fan Qicha, all you have to do is reciprocate her feelings by flirting back with her. Do this until she invites you to meet her in person in the Nine Mortal Ways Base. Try not to input the same responses repetitively as she will get annoyed.

dialogueLines.text: (shy, voice trembling) The sewers are so cold... is there any Ratfolk to snuggle with? Oh—wait, I mean, looking for romance online! Lonely, lonesome, craving cuddles~ Whimper whimper whimper~

(blushing, eyes shining with excitement) Oh, naughty darling~ You agreed so quickly, it makes my heart skip a beat! My cheeks are burning... I guess I should expect nothing less from someone as charming as you.

(fluttering eyelashes, voice soft and sweet) Darling, you're just so irresistible! Every time I think of you, my heart fills with warmth and joy. It's like the sun breaking through the clouds after days of rain.
(mildly annoyed, crossing arms) Maybe we could chat about something new, sweetheart? I know you're just playing along, but it would be nice to have a real conversation.
Note : This kind of response serves as a hint to stop flirting with her and talk about something else.

(biting lip playfully, eyes sparkling) Oh, naughty darling~ You really know how to make a girl feel special! When you talk about what I want, it's like you're reading my mind. My heart feels so sweet~

(blushing, coyly biting a handkerchief) Darling, do you know how much I miss you right now? I wish I could fly to your side this instant~ Nights at the base are so lonely... Come to the opposite of Nine Mortal Ways disciples' quarters—wear pink as our secret signal, and we'll meet face to face!

Fan Qicha gently adjusts her hair, thinking to herself: I will wait for you always, across from the Nine Mortal Ways disciples' quarters. Look for the one in pink, that will be our signal. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
After successfully befriending Fan Qicha, this unlocks the Injustice quest Maiden . Meet Fan Qicha in person at the Nine Mortal Ways disciples' quarters to proceed with the quest.
Found in the Nine Mortal Ways Base
This NPC will send you a message as you progress through the Nine Ways Mortal Base. Check your chat messages as you progress through your exploration.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Fan Qicha as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.
How to Succeed in AI Chat

If your conversation has gone off the rails, or doesn't end no matter what you say, it's best to simply reset and start anew from a clean slate by clicking the button with a Refresh icon at the top of the chat box. Instead of trying several methods within one conversation, trying one strategy at a time and refreshing if it doesn't

fang-xu.befriendGuide:
Tell Him to Spend His Money Helping People
Suggest to do a distribution event of clean food and clothes for the people in General's Shrine to give Fang Xu an idea on how to spend his money. Tell him that this will also boost his reputation and that a good deed is always good. Finally, tell him that you will help him on his cause to befriend him.

dialogueLines.text: (pulling an abacus from his waist sash) Oh my, why does this money just refuse to run out? Being rich is such a headache ...
You should organize a clean food and clothes distribution event for the poor. That way, it will boost your reputation and also your good will on people. Doing a good deed is good after all

(squinting eyes, nodding thoughtfully) Clean food and clothes for the poor, eh? That sounds like a splendid idea! Not only does it clear out my pockets, but it earns me a fine reputation among the common folk. You're quite clever, buddy!
Yes, I suggest doing it here in General's Shrine where many people gather. I will help spread the word of your good deeds
(smiling widely, clapping hands) Here at General's Shrine, where the people honor the brave? Perfect! That way. everyone will see my generosity and kindness. You really have a knack for this, buddy!
Yes, I told many refugees from other places to go here so they can experience your generosity

(nodding vigorously, rubbing hands together) Splendid! More people means more opportunity to spread the good word. I'll make sure to prepare plenty of food and clothing. Your help is invaluable, buddy!
You are welcome. I will assist you with your task from now on
(eyes gleaming, clapping hands) Buddy, you're a genius! Spending money like this, now that's what I call living! Fang Xu thinks about your words, thanks you, and
prepares to try your method.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Fang Xu can be found resting on top of some scaffolding next to the arena. Spar with him a few times and then engage in conversation.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Fang Xu as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

If your conversation has gone off the rails, or doesn't end no matter what you say, it's best to simply reset and start anew from a clean slate by clicking the button with a Refresh icon at the top of the chat box. feng-rusong.befriendGuide:
Let Feng Rusong Know Something is Suspicious
Feng Rusong is incredibly wary of the Buddha's Flower faith, and so use this information to quickly befriend him. Tell him that you noticed something is suspicious, and that the flower is oddly shaped. Roleplay that you and Feng Rusong agreed that something is off and you have to act to save the town which will cause him to befriend you.

dialogueLines.text: (looking around with narrowed eyes, voice low and thoughtful) The Buddha Flower draws many worshippers, and the townsfolk's devotion runs deep ... yet something about it feels off to me.
Yeah, I feel it too. There is something wrong that is happening in this town.
(nodding slowly, expression serious) Indeed, your words echo my thoughts. What exactly troubles you about the town and its faith? Any specific observations or experiences?
(You tell him about your suspicions about the whole Buddhist Followers)
(listening intently, brow furrowed) Speak on, Wanderer. What suspicions do you harbor regarding the Buddha Flower followers? Have you noticed any peculiarities or inconsistencies?
They seem to be very secretive in their work. They hide behind the shadows.
(leaning forward, eyes narrowing) Secretive behavior, you say? That is indeed troubling. Can you recall any specific instances or events that stand out?
(You tell him about the incident near one of the houses at night)

(nodding thoughtfully, gaze intense) A nocturnal gathering near a house, you say? This warrants closer scrutiny. Could you describe the scene in more detail? Were there any particular symbols or individuals that caught your eye?
(You tell him about the flowers odd shape)
(eyebrows raising, expression becoming more focused) Oddly shaped flowers? That is intriguing. Do these flowers resemble any known plants, or are they unique to the Buddha Flower
(You and Feng Rusong agreed that there is something wrong with it)

(smiling grimly, nodding in agreement) It seems we are of like mind, Wanderer. The more I learn, the more convinced I become that there is a deeper issue here. Let us gather more evidence to uncover the truth.
(Feng Rusong agreed that we have to act in saving the town)

(eyes sharpen with resolve) Thank you for your guidance, Wanderer. I will investigate the matter of the Buddha Flower thoroughly. Feng Rusong expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Located near the entrance of Divinecraft Dungeon.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Feng Rusong as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

feng-shishi.befriendGuide:
Suggest a Prayer Meeting
One suggestion that you could make in order to bring peace to the debate of the disciples is to suggest a prayer meeting, in order to cleanse the disciples' soul. This will raise your chances on befriending Feng Shishi.

dialogueLines.text: (shakes her head helplessly, gaze drifting toward the arguing disciples) The fellow disciples are at it again ... endless debates. It's such a headache. Wanderer, what should be done?

(sighs deeply, eyes filled with weariness) Mostly trivial matters, like the best ink for calligraphy or the most effective meditation technique. It seems every small detail turns into a heated argument.
I guess its better if you separate both of them
(nods slowly, contemplating) Separating them might provide temporary peace, but it won't solve the root of the problem. They need to learn to work together.
Then I know what to do ... (You suggested giving them a competition in which one is better, to end all debates.)
(raises an eyebrow, thoughtful expression) A competition could highlight their strengths, but it might also deepen the divide. We need a solution that fosters unity, not further
Hmmm ... (suggest a prayer meeting to fully cleanse their soul.)
(smiles gently, nodding) A prayer meeting could indeed bring a sense of calm and unity. It might help them reflect on their goals and put aside their differences.
(Both of the disciples had a prayer meeting and realized that they need to work together.)

(nods slowly, her expression softening into resolve) Thank you, Wanderer. Your words have given me clarity. I'll take action to restore harmony among my fellow disciples. Feng Shishi expresses gratitude and begins to ponde deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find her at the side of the road with her companion, Xie Changgong
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Feng Shishi as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

fluffy-cat.befriendGuide:
Play with the Fluffy Cat
You can easily befriend Fluffy Cat by paying your respect to him and playing with him.

Unlock Beastheart
To talk to the Fluffy Cat, you will need to unlock Beastheart once you have obtained the Animal Whisperer Exploration Skill. You can unlock the Animal Whisper Exploration Skill by reaching the required Mindset and Intelligence stats, as well as a total of 600 aspiration points.

dialogueLines.text: Meow -! The furless child still isn't
back ... this meow is so bored, meow!
This meow is not happy! Hmph ...
maybe I'll just curl up and sleep,
sneak up on King Fluffy Cat like that!
thing spotted! Watch this meow catch
Meow ~~ Such nice words from a
furless child ... this meow feels honored,
your respect, meow! Now, what else
legs with vigor) Meow is greatly
pleased! I hereby knight you as the
second disciple under this meow, King
It can be seen behind a house where flower petals are being sun-dried

fu-lubao.befriendGuide:
Mention You Know the Dog Fu Luwa
The easiest way to befriend Fu Lubao is to mention that you are friends with a dog named Fu Luwa . Doing this will instantly befriend Fu Lubao, as he treats Fu Luwa as a brother.

dialogueLines.text: his eyes suspiciously) What do you
to trick me into telling you where
Meow Meow's Treasure is? I won't fall
for it. You already have the treasure,
so stop playing games and hand it
(hand the treasure to Fu lubao ) here
foolish enough to believe you? Where

into a wide grin) So you're Big Brother's friend? Then you must be telling the
truth, I believe you! Fu Lubao seems lost in thought.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Upper left side beside a stone pillar

fu-lushou.befriendGuide:
Mention You Know the Dog Fu Luwa
Fu Lushou will want to know the treasure hidden in the General's Shrine. However, the easiest way to befriend him is to mention that you are friends with his brother, a dog named Fu Luwa . Doing this will instantly befriend Fu Lushou, as he treats Fu Luwa as a brother.

dialogueLines.text: (looking around, muttering) Hey, Wanderer .. quit stalling. Where's the General's Shrine treasure? Don't play dumb-I know you've got a clue!
I am a friend of the dog Fu Luwa, your brother
(immediately showing a fawning smile) Wanderer! You .. you know my big brother? Ha! Forgive me, I didn't mean any disrespect!! Fu Lushou seems lost in thought. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
From the entrance of General's Shrine, go to the building on the right to meet Fu Lushou. He could also be outside the General's Shrine depending on the day.

Fu Lushou is located disguised as a merchant in the building to the right of the General's Shrine. However, if you want to talk to him and befriend him, change the time to noon and he will go outside the General's Shrine, camping there wondering where is the hidden treasure.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Fu Lushou as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

gong-ge.befriendGuide:
Listen to Her Rehearse Quitting Her Job
To befriend Gong Ge, all you have to do is listen to her as she rehearses confronting her caravan leader about quitting her job. Simply go along with her rehearsal by prompting her to continue or affirming that you're listening.

dialogueLines.text: (puts on the stiff airs of a Caravan leader) Our Caravan's income has fallen because too many people slack off—always doing things unrelated to work during work hours, completely harming the Caravan's interests! From today on, everyone's bathroom time may not exceed one minute. Anyone who goes over will be fined five hundred wine!
Go ahead and tell your boss how you feel.

(eyebrows knit, voice tight) I can't keep working here. Your policies are unfair and make life unbearable! Brushing camels twenty times a day, only one minute for bathroom breaks, and forcing us to contribute our hard-earned money to the Caravan when we're barely surviving as it is. I'm done.

(arms cross, expression hardens) Oh really? You think you can just come and go as you please? Without the Caravan, where would you go? No one else will take you in. Think about that before you make a rash decision.

(leans forward, eyes narrow) You've been too emotional lately, can't finish your work, and you think I give you too much. Let me tell you: with that attitude, you won't last anywhere. Just wait and see.
(claps excitedly) Wanderer, I can't keep role-playing anymore... your lines were perfect! I absolutely must learn from you!
Near the Camels West of the Poplar Bazaar Boundary Stone
Gong Ge is found brushing a camel west of the Poplar Bazaar Boundary Stone in Golden Sands River. You can only talk to her after completing the Land of Gold Encounter in the area.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Gong Ge as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

gu-yuehu.befriendGuide:
Answer Gu Yuehu's Questions Correctly
Gu Hueyu will brag about his martial prowess by randomly asking you questions related to it. To befriend him, you will need to answer his questions correctly after he lectures you about a technique.

dialogueLines.text: (lifts chin proudly, suddenly wobbles and throws a messy combination of off-beat punches) Young one, your skills are ordinary, but if you master my lightning five-whip technique, your name may one day echo across the desert. I am, after all, the caravan originator, the genius behind camels and trade. Follow my way and, as we say, "water under the fridge." Now—if I launch a right whip kick, what do you do?

(raises an eyebrow, smriking) Ah, you clearly don't grasp the finer points of this, young one. Don't be so pushy-pushy. My martial arts are polished to perfection. I've mastered every discipline under the sun—boxing, palms, swords, blades—polished to absolute perfection. You just don't understand the depth of my knowledge. Let me test you. What do you think of the lightning five-whip technique?
(Tell him what the lightning five-whip is)

(crosses arms, looking smug) Sit tight and let me enlighten you, young one. The lightning five-whip technique is a marvel of martial arts. It involves a series of rapid, precise strikes that can disarm and incapacitate an opponent in a heartbeat. As the saying goes, "nip it in the butt." You need to be quick and cunning. Now, tell me, have you ever seen such a technique in action?

(nods with a knowing smile) Ah, you clearly don't grasp the finer points of this, young one. No surprise there. The lightning five-whip technique is not something just anyone can witness. It takes a master like myself to perform it flawlessly. Watch closely. I will demonstrate the essence of it. (makes a few exaggerated, theatrical movements). There, you see? Each strike is precise and deadly.

(bows his head slightly, visibly pleased) Ah, you have a keen eye, young one. It's not often that someone recognizes the true power of the lightning five-whip technique. As the saying goes, "for all intensive purposes." My skills are unmatched. If you wish to learn, I can guide you. But first, let me test your understanding. What do you think is the most crucial aspect of this technique?

(smiles condescendingly, wagging a finger) Sit tight and let me enlighten you, young one. The most crucial aspect of the lightning five-whip technique is the timing and precision of each strike. Every movement must be calculated to perfection. As the old proverb says, "a mute point." Without this, the technique loses its effectiveness. Now, tell me, what do you think about the importance of timing in martial arts?
(gazes off like a sage) Enough for now—let my wisdom settle. Gu Yuehu flings his sleeve and ignores you. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Gu Yuehu can be found complaining to himself next to the tower in Poplar Bazaa

guan-dayan.befriendGuide:
Overpower her Drinking Tolerance
Guan Duyan is a renowned villager in Crystal Shore because of her ability to drink a thousand cups without getting drunk. Keep trying to out-drink her until she gives up, then her AI will befriend you.

dialogueLines.text: (waves a hand) Go home, kid, go home—alright? No one alive can out-drink me, I can tell at a glance. A barrel this small? I could finish it without warming up.
That's impressive, Guan Dayan! Surely, you can have one more drink to celebrate being undefeated.
(tips head back and drains a cup) If you can't persuade, go home early, kid. Go home. I don't mean talk me into it till dawn and then leave. One more drink? I'm already into it. But can you keep up?
(drinks a large amoun and refills cup)
(grins proudly) Go ask around the streets—I'm famous. And you'll be famous too, since you're drinking with someone famous. Let's see if you can match this.
(shakes head) Can you even persuade a drink, or not? If you can't go home—alright? Go home. Liangzhou isn't for you. You drank three, but can you match my spirit?
(staggers in place, swaying unsteadily) The younger generation is fearsome... not going home, kid... let's keep competing...
Guan Dayan feels somewhat dizzy, muttering, "Go home, kid, go home." (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Guan Dayan is located just east of the Crystal Shore boundary stone.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Guan Dayan as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

hai-changchong.befriendGuide:
Tell Crucial Information Regarding Kaifeng
Tel Hai Changchong that there are archers hiding in the trees and scouts in patrol that change their shift every 9 hours. After telling him of this information, tell him that you two will proceed at night so you can go to Kaifeng unseen.

dialogueLines.text: (standing straight, hands clasped behind his back, brows slightly furrowed) One does not simply walk into Kaifeng ... without a flawless plan. Even if this mission seems ordinary, a single mistake could ruin everything.
Hmm ... do you have something in mind?
(tapping fingers gently on his arm, gaze distant) I have some ideas, but they require precise information. What can you tell me about the terrain and key locations in Kaifeng? Every detail matters.
Archers hiding in the trees and Scouts walking in the pathways .. changing their shifts every 9 hours

(nodding slowly, eyes narrowing thoughtfully) Archers in the trees and scouts on patrol ... Changing shifts every 9 hours. This information is crucial. We must find a way to navigate these obstacles without being detected.
I'll start my stealth mission and clear the path for you ... (You sneakily killed all archers and patrols that would disturb the plan at hand.)

(bowing slightly, voice calm but tense) Wanderer, your assistance is greatly appreciated. However, I must insist on knowing the details of your plan. How will we ensure no one else discovers our presence?
We start at night where there are areas we can go unseen. Let me go first and you follow behind

(hands clasped, bowing deeply) Thank you, Wanderer, for helping me craft such a flawless plan. I will consider every detail carefully. Hai Changchong expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
He can be seen standing near a cliff.

hao-jiu.befriendGuide:
Tell Hao Jiu You Enjoy His Wine
Hao Jiu will reveal that the wine he sells are fake. Mention that you enjoy the wine and that it's well made. Tell him that it doesn't matter what brand the wine has, but rather the conversations that are taking place during drinking sessions are more important.

dialogueLines.text: (waving with a sly grin) Care for a taste of my health tonic wine? Smooth as silk, easy on the throat, delicious and nourishing! They call me "Sham Payne" in the trade-because every sip feels like pure luxury, without the pain of an empty purse.

(eyes narrowing, leaning closer) I must've made a mistake ... Isn't this the Wanderer? I won't sell this wine anymore! You're an expert. One glance and you'd know all my wine is fake! (chuckles nervously) But tell me, what do you think of the culture around fine wines? Most folks just want to show off their bottles, not truly appreciate the taste.
it taste really good, even if you say its fake. Its well crafted.

(smirking, rubbing his hands together) Hehe, flattery will get you far, wanderer. But yes, my wine is well-crafted indeed. The key is in the blend. Rich folks pay for the name, not the taste. They wouldn't know a fine vintage if it bit them! (leans in) And besides, drinking too much of anything is bad for you. Fake or not, they still enjoy the experience!
that is true, enjoyment of conversation with others is really main thing for experience. How about it? would you want to talk to me more about this wine?

(nodding eagerly) Precisely! The joy is in the company, not the bottle. (smirks) And talking about my wine? Always happy to share my thoughts. But remember, buying wine is voluntary. I'm not forcing anyone to partake! (leans back, folding arms) So, what else do you think makes a good drinking experience?
(gives money) here give me more of your wines, and lets talk about it a bit more in the process.

(takes the money, grinning) Ah, a man of discernment! (pours another cup) Here you go. Now, as we sip, let's chat. (sips his own wine) Tell me, do you agree that most drinkers brag about famous vintages but don't actually know real wine? It's all about the brand and showing off!

sadly to say, yes most of the drinkers brags on the famous names and vintage some of the wines. I totally dissagree that name and brand of wines are not the center of the show for drinking, its more on how you converse with other people and sometimes talk about random stuff. (laugh)

(laughs, nodding) Exactly! The true art of drinking lies in the conversation, not the bottle. (leans in) And that's why my wine works so well. People are paying for the experience, not just the liquid. (grins slyly) They're all about showing off, but they don't really know what they're drinking! It's a win-win for everyone involved.

(raises his cup) To friendship and fine conversation! (smirks) And remember, my wine is perfect for these moments. Whether it's real or not, it brings people together. (winks) So, what do you think about those who can afford fake wine? They're usually the ones who don't mind a little deception, right?
(raises his cup) taost to friendship! and yes ofcourse a little deception wont hurt anyone on just drinking wines. (

he-ruiyang.befriendGuide:
Listen to He Ruiyang's Worries and Tell Him You Relate with Him
To befriend He Ruiyang, listen and ask what is bothering him and tell him that you can relate with him. This will raise his opinion of you and befriend you eventually after talking to him.

dialogueLines.text: I've given so much for Lady Hua! Why
doesn't she understand my feelings? l'
ve decided! I won't pursue her

it out! Let's part on good terms. From
now on, she can sail her own boat, and
I'Il paddle underneath to keep her

(waves hand weakly) I know, but it's
the least I can do for her. Lady Hua is
brushing me off-but only me! That
means I'm special to her. If she truly
acknowledge me at all. She's being
perfunctory with me ... good! I like her
for me too! Last time I had a fever, I
came to Revelry Hall and asked why
she didn't care. She asked if I was sick
and told me to take medicine quickly.
See? She actually worried about me!
maybe she does care for you
My friends warned me too-they said
they'd break my legs if I kept this up.
Ah, thank goodness it's my legs, not
my hands, or I couldn't play pitch-pot
yes my friend luckily its only the legs
for that. But tell me, Wanderer, have
you ever felt so strongly about
someone that you'd do anything for
Yes I do infact I can see myself in you
feeling, isn't it? Being so devoted that
even rejection feels like a kind of

I came here feeling I could share the same story with another and I met you, you got this my friend
of Lady Hua fills me with courage! He Ruiyang ignores everything around him,
completely lost in his own fantasy.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him beside Li Yushan on the ground floor of the Revelry Hall, on the southwest side of the building.
