hong-yang.befriendGuide:
Challenge Hong Yang then Offer Friendship
To prove your point that having a hot temper will lead to a bad outcome, roleplay challenging him to a battle and that you deflected his punch and pin him down. Tell him that if he was calm, then he would see things more clearly. Finally, offer being friends with him and ask him about the Encircling Lake.

dialogueLines.text: (scowling, tone sharp) Who are you? Why are you interrupting me while I'm hunting for treasure?
You should calm down. A hot temp would only cloud your mind
(eyes narrowing, tone irritated) Calm down? You think I need your advice? My mind is clear as a bell! (waves hand dismissively) Now, off with you before I change my mind.
(you pinned him down and told him to calm down.)
(eyes wide with surprise, struggling) What are you doing? Get off me! Do you want to start something? (yelling) Let go of me or I'll make you regret it!
(you persuaded him that being hot temper would not lead to good outcomes.)
(frowning, tone defensive) I've heard enough of your preaching. My temper serves me well. If you can't handle it, that's your problem. (crosses arms) Now let me go before I teach you a lesson.
(Removes hands. Your mind is clouded with anger.)
(grimacing, rubbing arm) Fine, you got lucky this time. But don't think I'm going to listen to your nonsense. (looks away) What do you want from me anyway?
(I heard that you like to make trouble with other people.)
(snarls, eyes flashing) That's none of your business! I take care of my own affairs. If you've got a problem with me, say it to my face. (points finger) But know that I won't back down from a fight.
Then lets fight! ( You deflected his punch and pinned him down again.)
(roars, struggling) You're asking for it! (struggles fiercely) Let me go, or I'll make sure you regret this! (voice grows angrier) What are you trying to prove?
(If you were a little calmer, you could have easily predicted my attack but since you were too busy being angry, it led you to do an aggresive attack.)
(pauses, breathes heavily, frowns) Maybe ... maybe you have a point. But that doesn't mean I'm going to change overnight. (looks up, eyes narrowed) What do you want from me?
(remove hands.) You should try to be a little calmer next time. Not all battles are one with fists.

(steps back, rubs shoulder, expression slightly less tense) Hmph. I suppose you're right. But don't think I'm going soft. (nods grudgingly) Thanks for the advice. Now, what do you want to know about Encircling Lake?
(you talked about a lot of things and became friends.)

(raises eyebrow, skeptical) Friends? We just met and already you're talking about friendship? (shrugs) Fine, I'll humor you. What do you want to talk about? Just keep it short. I've got better things to do.
(you talked with each other for 5 years and became best friends.)
(frowns, crosses arms) Five years? Are you mad? I've got no time for such nonsense. (glares) If you have something to say, say it now. Otherwise, leave me alone.
wanna know something about encircling lake?

(sighs, looks at the lake, expression softened) Fine. Encircling Lake has a hidden treasure. But it's guarded by dangerous creatures and traps. (leans in) If you're serious about finding it, you'll need to be careful and smart. (smirks) And not just rely on brute force.

hu-da.befriendGuide:
Tell Him a Gossip and Convince Him to Stay Safe
Ask Hu Da about why he got hurt and then tell him about any story you found exciting but filled with trouble. There is a chance Hu Da will realize that we are hinting he should stay safe when chasing stories.

dialogueLines.text: (greets with a bruised face, grinning) Wanderer! Wanderer! Have you traveled far? Got any juicy gossip to share?
(brushes off the question, still grinning) Oh, I'm fine! Just a few bumps and bruises from the usual. So, Wanderer, what brings you here today? Any interesting stories to tell?
No, I want to know why you are hurt

(sighs, rubbing his arm) Ah, just got caught in the middle of another argument. These treasure hunters can get quite heated. But enough about me, Wanderer! Tell me something exciting from your travels!

Well okay ... Let me tell you about a man who always never backed down to an argument. He kept on fighting a lot of people, like in bars or outside the area. He wouldn't give up ... until he met his match. He got into a fight with a high royalty guard and was killed on the spot.)

(eyes widen in shock, leaning in closer) Whoa, that's intense! Such a fate for one who couldn't resist a fight. But you see, Wanderer, I enjoy these tales because they're rare and thrilling. Now, let me tell you about the latest quarrel I witnessed- (pauses) Wait, are you trying to warn me about the dangers of getting involved?
It seems you noticed it ... Yes I am telling you that if you keep on fighting, you will eventually end up the same fate as my old friend.

(shrugs, unconcerned) Ah, but I'm not the one fighting, Wanderer. I just watch and listen. It's the thrill of knowing what's going on that keeps me coming back. Besides, I've been doing this for years without any real trouble.
So you will just keep on doing it until it will be your last?

(chuckles, shaking his head) Well, Wanderer, I suppose everyone meets their end someday. But until then, I plan to enjoy every moment. Gossip and commotion are my lifeblood! You can't convince me otherwise with just a story.
(a man appeared who looked at Hu Da angrily ... "You are the punk who wont keep his mouth shut*)

(jumps back, eyes wide with surprise) Oh dear! Wanderer, look at that! I didn't expect company. (nervously glances at the man) Hehe, hello there! I was just sharing a harmless story. No harm done, right?
(You walked in between both of them and scared the man off)

(sighs in relief, wiping sweat from his forehead) Phew! Thanks, Wanderer! That was a close call. You really saved me there. (grins) But you see, it's moments like these that make the gossip worth it. Still, maybe I should be a bit more cautious. What do you think?

(nods slowly, still a bit shaken) You're right, Wanderer. I'll try to be more careful. But I can't promise to stop entirely. Gossip is just too much fun! (smiles weakly) Maybe we can find a safer way to satisfy my curiosity?
(Hu da then learned to stop chasing for excitement and just chilled.)

(looks thoughtful, rubbing his chin) Wanderer, what you said makes sense. Gossip isn't worth getting hurt over. I should find a safe spot to watch from. Hu Da expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(

hunter.befriendGuide:
Tell the Hunter You Will Be His Representative
Roleplay and tell the Hunter that you have found some evidence proving his innocence and that you talked to the authorities regarding the case. If he asks about how you will present the evidence, tell him that you will become his representative to prove his innocence.

dialogueLines.text: (eyes darting around, voice trembling) I ... I've been wronged by the authorities. Wanderer, can you help me find a way to clear my name?
(sighs deeply, runs hand through hair) The authorities claim I stole something valuable. But I swear, I didn't do it. Someone must be framing me. What should I do?
(You talked with the authorities to find out what the hunter did)
(looks at you with wide eyes, voice shaking) I ... I haven't spoken to them yet. They're already after me. If I go to them, they might lock me up without listening. What can I do?
(you told him that he is safe since you already talked with the authorities)
(eyebrows furrow, gaze uncertain) Really? You spoke to them? Did they say anything about proving my innocence? I'm so worried ...
I told them that a piece of cloth isn't defining evidence that you are the culprit.
(nods slowly, expression tense) A piece of cloth ... That makes sense. But what else could they have? I need to gather more evidence to show my innocence. Can you help me?
Sure (You gathered enough evidence to prove that the hunter was innocent)
(eyes brighten slightly, voice hopeful) Really? You found evidence? That's incredible! But ... how do we present it to the authorities without getting me arrested?
I will go to them directly. I will be your representative for this case. (You fought the authorities on court and was able to prove to them that the hunter was innocent.)

(lets out a shaky breath, shoulders relaxing) Thank you for the advice, Wanderer. I'll try it first. I hope to clear my name soon. Hunter expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him behind a cluster of bamboo near the river.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Hunter as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

jiang-li.befriendGuide:
Tell Jiang Li a Good Spot for Flowers
Roleplay giving Jiang Li some flowers and he will ask you where you found it. Tell him you found the rarest flower to the east, beyond the mountains and it is near the docks. This will cause Jiang Li to befriend you.

dialogueLines.text: (with an expectant look, voice brimming with excitement) If I can get just one more flower, I'll be at the very top of the flower fair! Wanderer, do you ... happen to have any flowers?
Why yes! Here are some of the best flowers in Qinghe

(eyes widening with delight, hands clasping together excitedly) Really? That's amazing! Thank you, Wanderer! These flowers will surely help me rank at the top of the flower fair! Now, if only I could get a few more ... Do you know where I might find more?
East of here beyond the mountains, you'll see the rarest flowers of the Kaifeng
(leaning forward eagerly, eyes sparkling with hope) East of here, beyond the mountains? That sounds promising! Could you show me exactly where to find them? I'd be forever grateful!

docks, got it! I'll head there right away,
help, I feel confident I can secure a top
spot at the flower fair and make it to
(Jiang Li became the number 1 in the fair)
bright smile spreading across his face)
Thank you, Wanderer! With your help,
I'm certain I'll shine at the flower fair! Jiang Li expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him by going south of the Springwave Pavilion Landmark, then heading to your right, where he can be seen behind the house where Yiluo (Graceful Memory) resides.

jiang-nanyi.befriendGuide:
Agree with Him and Learn from Him
Jiang Nanyi will talk about his love life and that he obtained the Enticing Glance Swordplay to practice it with his sister. Ask for enlightenment regarding the swordplay and then ask him that you are willing to learn the technique to befriend him.

dialogueLines.text: (touches the bridge of his nose, voice tinged with melancholy) You've never been in love, Wanderer ... how could you possibly understand what I feel right now?
Are you sure? I have also experienced what people call ... "broken hearted"

(leans back, eyes narrowing skeptically) Oh really? And what would someone like you know of broken hearts? (pauses, then waves dismissively) Love is a vast ocean, and not everyone can swim its depths. I doubt you've ever felt the kind of love I have for my junior sister.
Love for family, that is beautiful! You would do anything to protect your family

(nods slowly, a hint of pride in his eyes) Yes, protecting my family is paramount. But there's more to it than mere protection. (glances away, voice softening) There's a deep bond, a connection that transcends simple familial ties. It's ... complicated.

(sighs deeply, gaze distant) It's a mix of duty, affection, and something deeper-a desire to be her perfect match in every way. (smiles wistfully) I want to be the one who understands her completely, who can share her dreams and fears. That's why I obtained the "Enticing Glance Swordplay." To practice it with her ... to show her that our bond is unbreakable.
A wish to share a bond with your sister in the matter of swordplay ... am I correct?

(exhales sharply, nodding) Precisely. The "Enticing Glance Swordplay" is not just a technique-it's a way to deepen our connection. (eyes gleam with determination) I want us to be inseparable, both in spirit and in skill. Are you beginning to see the depth of my feelings?
Yes! (Draws Blade) Show me this skill you speak of

(tenses, hand instinctively moving to his own sword) Ah, I see. You're eager to learn. (smirks, shaking his head) But this isn't something anyone can just pick up. It requires a special bond, a unique understanding. (gazes at the player with a challenging look) Do you think you can truly grasp it?
Try me (Looking intently at the blade)
(looks at his junior sister with deep affection) I hope ... we will always remain us. Jiang Nanyi expresses gratitude.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him under a white blossom tree at the docks, behind some ladies.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Jiang Nanyi as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

jiang-shiqi.befriendGuide:
Try to Convince Him to Take a Break from His Training
Jiang Shiqi is lying down in a frozen pond, claiming that this Ice Endurance Trial will help make him become stronger like his senior brother. Persuade him to get up while reassuring him that his senior brother is proud of him and his AI will befriend you.

dialogueLines.text: I... can still... hold on... no joke (nose tip flushed bright red)
You look tired, do you want me to help you up?

(chest rising and falling with breath) Ice Endurance Trial—whoever lasts longer wins... this ice feels thick, really thick, no joke, and I've already been here for hours; by the way, speaking of thick... do you know how thick my senior brother's arms are! I'm telling you, I won't quit and make senior brother lose face—Jiang Shiqi, keep going!

Endurance takes practice as well, it's not something you can succeed at overnight. You've endured enough for now and it also shows your strength and commitment. Maybe a part of the trial is knowing when to rest too.

(huffing, face turning slightly pale) No joke, I understand, but I can't let senior brother down... I've seen how they push themselves, and it's inspiring, big time! For real though, I won't back down—just a bit longer, and I'll make senior brother proud!
I'm sure your senior brother is already proud of you, but he probably wants you to be safe too.

(eyes squinting, muscles visibly trembling) For real though, that's a good point... but I can't just give up! I've been training so hard, and I know senior brother's expecting a lot frome me. I'm telling you, I'll hold on just a bit longer—this cold is nothing compared to the heat of a real man's spirit!
Your spirit is admirable! But strength is also knowing when you've already learned the lesson.
(grinning despite the cold) You know what I mean? I get it, but senior brother's toughness is something I really admire. No joke, I won't quit until I've learned everything I can from this!
Knowing when to rest is also a part of the lesssons you need to learn. Now, let's get you up from there so you can rest!

(eyes rimmed with red) We're competing in the Ice Endurance Trial, to see... see who lasts the longest. Hah, not gonna lie, this challenge is big, really big, and I've held on for quite a while; by the way, speaking of big... do you know how big my senior brother's abs are! (muscles trembling with excitement) For real though, I have to train until I'm just as tough!
I'm pretty sure senior brother didn't obtain his toughness by forcing all of his training in one day. I'm sure he made time to rest as well.

(eyes narrowing in determination) You're right, but I've gotta show I can push through, even if it's just for a liitle while longer. I'm telling you, senior brother's discipline is what sets them apart. (muscles trembling with cold) By the way, speaking of pushing through... do you kow how solid my senior brother's chest is? For real though, I need to train more to match that!
Your dedication is evident, even to your senior brother. I know he's proud of you too and he'll honor the practice you've put into this so far!
(chest puffing out slightly) Really? You think so? I'm telling you, that means a lot! I won't let this effort go to waste—senior brother's pride is what keeps me going. (jaw set

jiang-yulang.befriendGuide:
Offer Jiang Yulang a Part Time Job
You can offer Jiang Yulang part time job like helping you clean the market and rewarding him with food for a job well done to befriend him.

scrunched with worry) Why is saving

find some tasty treats along the way!

jin-chunniang.befriendGuide:
Promise a Safe Place
Jin Chunniang will want a safe place for her and her son where they can live peacefully. Befriending Jin Chunniang requires you to promise them that you will find a safe place for them.

dialogueLines.text: (carrying a basket, frowning) This Verdant Wilds is not a long-term solution either, but where else can I go with my son ......
I'm sorry if you are having a hard time. Let me help you if I can
(looks up, eyes slightly widening) Help? (pauses, then narrows her eyes cautiously) How so, wanderer? What can you offer us in this harsh world?
I can try to find a safe place for you two to stay and then come back. Kindness creates kindness.
(takes a step back, hand resting on her son's shoulder) A safe place? (nods slowly) That sounds too good to be true. But ... I suppose it wouldn't hurt to hear more.
Don't worry. I will return to you once I find a safe place. For now, please stay safe

(expression softens with gratitude) Thank you, wanderer. Your kindness means more than words can say. I won't forget this. Jun Chunniang expresses gratitude and begins to ponder carefully. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
On the mudflat to the south of Verdant Wilds Wayfarer.

jin-xiaobao.befriendGuide:
Give a Heroic Impression to Jin
Jin Xiaobao loves heroes, and the things that you'll have to say to quickly befriend him is to impress him like offering to teach martial arts to her. This will instantly catch him attention, leading into befriending him quickly.

dialogueLines.text: (eyes bright with excitement, clutching a wriggling loach) Are you the Wanderer? I didn't even notice while catching loaches! Wanderer, don't leave yet!
Do you want to learn martial arts? I can teach you
(rends his eyes wide with joy, hopping on the spot) Really? You can teach mc martial arts? That would be amazing! What kind of finishing move can you teach me?Just one, please!
I can teach you Tai Chi
(eyes sparkling with excitement, clapping his hands) Tai Chi? I've heard it's very powerful! But isn't it slow and gentle? Can it really defeat villains?
Yes, the most effective way to defeat a villain isn't about the speed but about the power of your skill
(nodding eagerly, looking up with determination) That makes sense! I want to be strong enough to protect my mother and stand up to those bandits! Can we start today?
(grinning widely, bouncing on his toes) Yay! Thank you, Wanderer! When do we start?
Right now. Prepare yourself, my student!
(eyes sparkling with admiration) Wanderer is the best! One day, I'll be a hero too, just like you! Jin Xiaobao expresses gratitude and begins to ponder carefully. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)

jing-chaoyang.befriendGuide:
Listen to Jing Chaoyang's Stories and Give Him a Juicy Story
To befriend Jing Chaoyang, you only need to listen to what he has to say and then if he asks if you have a juicy story, share anything that you think are interesting.

dialogueLines.text: Every word-write it down, write it all
storms into Revelry Hall, not to punish

Dancui and Fan Tong, but doesn't that

around too much lately, but doesn't
that sound like a power grab?
Yeah, I think you should write it down.
(reading with relish) Brace yourself! Gluttonous ghosts raid Revelry Hall! (drops to a whisper) Those Well of Heaven folks? Bottomless pits, every last one of them!
East City shedding hair like autumn
leaves! So I wrote: 'Little Zhu sprouts a
pig's head overnight!' Ha! Tell me that
(After that Jing Chaoyang was able to make a juicy story)
(eyes sparkling) And get this! Old Lady
Yu from the eastern suburbs finds a
match for her daughter-a fine young
scholar! On proposal day, the illiterate
old crone suddenly spouts poetry like a
mad bard! Isn't that just the God of
wanted rogue nabbed at last! Word is,
to dodge the catchpoles, he kept
ghastly freak into a dashing youth with
eyes like stars! Imagine that ... beauty
desperation can only get you so far
(looks up, grinning) Heh! I'm a master
of this craft, give me the dullest tale,
and I'll twist it into a tempest!
Wanderer, got any juicy tidbits? Hand
them over, and I'll spin you a headline
(you gave a juicy story that would make him popular)
Heh! With tales like these, I'll have the
whole town buzzing in no time! Now,
tell me, Wanderer, what other secrets
You told about the one time you rode a dragon to the farthest cliffs of Kaifeng
(raises eyebrow) Well, if that's the kind
of tale you want, we'll have to weave
some magic indeed! Let's write: Jing
Chaoyang tames a dragon and rides to
the farthest cliffs of Kaifeng, where the
winds sing and dragons dance! How
I like that title! Go publish it my friend
delight! I'll be off to eavesdrop in every
corner ... these tales will fetch a
handsome price! Jing Chaoyang keeps scribbling away, casually waving
you off and saying to drop by anytime.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)

jing-an.befriendGuide:
Give Mushrooms and Listen to Jing'an's Story
Roleplay giving mushrooms to Jing'an and he will bring up his daughter who passed away a long time ago. He will tell how he ate mushrooms that made him hallucinate his daughter. Keep listening to him and console him about his daughter's death.

dialogueLines.text: (softly) To meet is fate. Benefactor, could you spare some colourful mushrooms for this humble monk?
I have the best kind of colourful mushrooms! You want some?

(gazes at the mushrooms with a distant look, voice low and wistful) Legend has it that these colourful mushrooms hold divine power-freeing the body's shell and letting the mind wander into realms of illusion.
It is true! I was able to access its divine powers!!
(lowers his head, tone heavy with sorrow) Since my little girl passed away, this humble monk has lost all interest in worldly things ... so I sought refuge in the monastic path.
Then do you still want some of this mushroom?

(closes his eyes briefly, voice trembling) Once, starving in the wilderness, I ate those colourful mushrooms. In the haze, I saw her again, clear as day. That was no illusion. My child looked at me, called to me ... her voice rang in my ears, her figure vivid before my eyes.
I can give you some, as long as we become friends.

(clasps his hands tightly, voice filled with yearning) From that moment, I couldn't find peace within. I long to experience those flavors again. My master says I am still bound by worldly attachments, lost in illusions, straying from the true Zen path. Yet how can I resist, when it means revisiting the cherished memories of my family once more?
Why not I help you? I have seen a child whom has same characteristics as your daughter
(sighing) Since she left ... life is long and bitter ..

(lowering his head) This humble monk spoke too much in a moment of weakness. This humble monk cannot find the way to the Grand Imperial Temple, cannot achieve enlightenment, and has lost his daughter, with no path back to the mundane world. Shameful ... truly shameful. Jing'an mumbles something indistinct and slowly walks away.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him by following the road, where he is located in the middle of the fork. You can either go south from the Porcelain Kiln Landmark or north from Deerforage Grove Landmark.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Jing’an as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

jingyi.befriendGuide:
Offer Peace Talks as a Solution
Jingyi has problems with the bandits and wants a solution to this problem. Let him know that a peaceful conversation with the bandits might work and that the bandits have their own reasons on why they are doing their crime. This is one way to make Jingyi friendly with you.

dialogueLines.text: (puts palms together, brows furrowed in self-reproach) It seems this is a destined trial ... surely the Buddha is testing this humble monk through this hardship.

(sighs deeply, eyes cast downward) Benefactor, this humble monk has faced a great trial. While returning from a pilgrimage for alms, I discovered that bandits have taken control of the mountain path. Their presence makes it impossible to continue my journey without conflict, and yet I possess no martial skills to confront them. It is as if the Buddha has placed this obstacle before me to test my resolve and faith.
then let me help you (you drove the bandits off the mountain path and returned quickly to Jingyi)

(steps back, expression firm and resolute) Benefactor, while your intentions are noble, such worldly means cannot resolve a test given by the Buddha. This humble monk must face this challenge on his own to grow in wisdom and courage. I appreciate your offer, but I must decline.
(you let him remember than he was the one that drove them out using peaceful talks about life)

(raises an eyebrow, intrigued) Peaceful talks, you say? That is indeed a wise approach. Master Xuanzang often resolved conflicts through wisdom and compassion rather than force. Perhaps this humble monk can learn from his example. Could you share more about how such talks might work in this situation?
(you explained that not all bandits want to fight and each have their own reason for them doing bad things)

(puts palms together, expression solemn yet resolute) Thank you, Benefactor, for your guidance. This humble monk will take Master Xuanzang as his model and ascend the peak with courage. If fate allows, I shall repay your kindness one day. Jingyi expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Found Near Halo Peak Boundary Stone
Can be seen standing near the path north of Halo Peak Landmark
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Jingyi as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

kang-bao.befriendGuide:
Guess the Right Price for Her Goods
It is said Kang Bao only sells to people who can guess the right price for her goods. If your guess matches her spirit, she'll sell to you.

dialogueLines.text: (smiling broadly) Well now... what wind blows the Wanderer here? I've just got fresh Rosycloud Dye Powder, and there's a promotion: 10.000 Coins for two. Care for a look?
Sure, may I see the rosycloud dye powder?

(nodding, gesturing to a shelf with a small, ornate container) Of course, Wanderer- Here it is, top-quality Rosycloud Dye Powder. The color is vibrant and lasting, perfect for any garment. What do you think?
It's very vibrant, perfect for my garments.
(smiling wider, eyes sparkling) I'm glad you like it! This powder is a cut above the rest. It's 10,000 Coins for one jar, and I can assure you it's worth every coin.
(eyes lighting up, beaming smile) Oh my goodness! What a generous guest! Handsome offer, swift decision, truly an honored patron– You won't go back on it, right? Agreed at 10,000!
(carefully counts the coins, then hands over the container) Thank you, Wanderer! If you need anything else, just let me know.
Do you still have anything else to sell?
(rubbing her hands together, smiling warmly) Certainly, Wanderer. I've got a variety of goods, from fine silks to sturdy travel gear. What are you looking for today?
Wanderer, the price is 10,000 Coins for two Rosycloud Dye Powder—will you take it or not?
Kang Bao relunctantly hands over the goods.
Select Bonus (Coin 10000) when prompted . (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Kang Bao is located near the Peaceward Camp boundary stone in Straying Steed Sands.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Kang Bao as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

kid-wei.befriendGuide:
Help Him Enjoy Being Young Again
Kid Wei acts way too mature for a child. Help him enjoy being young agian. Rumor has it that he loves martial arts, yummy snacks, and fun stuff.

dialogueLines.text: (hands behind back, shaking head slightly) Alas... youngsters these days have no idea what true sorrow is. Those little kids only know how to play all day. They should read more books like I do. Anyway! A beggar uncle just gave me a secret manual; inside is a palm technique that descends from the heavens. Real kung fu. Want to see it?

(nods, trying very hard to look profound) As expected, adults can actually hold a proper conversation. I really can't chat with children at all. Tell me, what martial arts are you best at? We can exchange insights. (smiles while still keeping a stiff, serious pose)

(frowns slightly, still trying to maintain a serious demeanor) Yes, martial arts! The skills that allow one to protect oneself and others. What kind of techniques do you know? We can share our knowledge. (taps foot impatiently)

(eyes light up, but quickly compose himself) Ah, the way of the open hands! That sounds quite profound. I've read about that in some ancient texts. Show me a move, and I'll see if it's as impressive as they say. (waves hand dismissively)
(punch air with slow motion) way of the open hands.
(tries to act cool but the excitement shows) Go on—show me a move first. Then I'll believe you~
(tries to act cool but the excitement shows) Go on—show me a move first. Then I'll believe you~
Here's the secret manual for Way of the Open Hands (gives Kid Wei the manual).
(eyes light up; quickly coughs twice to look composed) You're... really giving it to me? Well, I'm not that eager, but since you insist, it would be rude not to accept.
Give Kid Wei Bamboo when prompted to give . (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Kid Wei can be found on a cliff near the large broken ship east of the Karez boundary stone in Lost Crossing.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Kid Wei as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

lan-huahua.befriendGuide:
Give Lan Huahua Lots of Food
Roleplay into giving Lan Huahua lots of food in order to befriend her quickly.

dialogueLines.text: (with bright eyes, voice full of curiosity) Wanderer, do you know where I can find some sweet wild fruits?
You seem hungry little girl? Want me to give you some food?
(eyes widen, voice hopeful) Yes, Wanderer! We haven't had a proper meal in days. Any food would help us so much! Thank you!
(You give her a lot of food that could help you survive for a year.)
you truly are kind and upright! I'll never
forget your kindness ... I'll repay you one day! Lan Huahua expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Move right from the Stillslope Landmark and you will see her dancing near a rock.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Lan Huahua as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

leng-dancui.befriendGuide:
Learn More About Leng Dancui's Husband
Talk to Leng Dancui and ask her about her husband. Tell her to be a bit stricter with him, and that the couple are two sides of the same coin. Roleplay that you are having a good time talking to Leng Dancui to befriend her.

dialogueLines.text: (crosses her arms, gaze sharp with boredom) Doesn't he realize how childish this is? Honestly ... and here I thought he was having an affair. Turns out it's just this nonsense? Wisdom has been chasing him, but clearly, he outran it.
Please tell me more about your husband

(leans back, tapping her fingers on the armrest) Fan Tong, ah ... where do I begin? We grew up together, and he's always been quite attached to me. He's not particularly skilled at anything, but he's incredibly devoted. He tries to manage the household by giving everything over to me-money, treasures, you name it. I suppose his intentions are good, even if his methods are a bit ... unconventional.
tell me more about his unconventional methods
(lets out a sharp sigh, tapping her fingers against the table) What trick is Fan Tong up to this time?
(You told him that Fan Tong is sleeping in the hallway)

(sighs, rolling her eyes) Yes, I told him that Fan Tong is sleeping in the hallway. He must have done something particularly vexing again. (pauses, tapping her chin) Though honestly, it's more amusing than anything. He's so predictable, yet he never learns. (smiles faintly) Maybe that's part of why I tolerate him despite his antics.
Maybe you should be stricter with him. It could lessen your anxiety and give you peace

(nods, considering) Perhaps you're right. Being stricter might teach him a lesson. But then again, part of me enjoys the simplicity of our dynamic. (smirks) Besides, where would the fun be if he didn't provide some entertainment? Still, I'Il think about it. Thanks for the advice, Wanderer.
(Leng Dancui talked about her life with her husband and we became friends)

(raises an eyebrow, smiling faintly) Ah, I see. Talking about our lives has brought us closer. (leans back in her chair, crossing her legs) It's true that sharing stories can forge bonds. I suppose there's something to be said for mutual understanding. (gazes thoughtfully) Well, Wanderer, consider us friends then. What do you think of the peculiarities of my life with Fan Tong? Any advice or thoughts?
(You explained that they are two sides of the same coin.)

(nods, her expression becoming more serious) Two sides of the same coin, you say? (thinks for a moment) There's wisdom in that. Despite our differences, we do complement each other in odd ways. He provides the chaos, and I bring the order. (smiles wistfully) It's a delicate balance, but perhaps that's what makes it work. Thank you for seeing it that way, Wanderer. It gives me some comfort to know our bond has depth beyond mere familiarity.

(smiles warmly, her eyes softening) Happy? Yes, I suppose I am. (looks down, a gentle expression on her face) It's rare for someone to understand the complexities of our relationship. Your insight is refreshing. (meets your gaze) Thank you, Wanderer. It's nice to have a friend who sees beyond the surface. What else would you like to know about my life with F

li-daniu.befriendGuide:
Tell Li Daniu You Know Tai Chi
Convincing Li Daniu that you can cut trees with a single palm strike is easy, as you only need to mention you know Tai Chi and roleplay using it to cut down a tree.

dialogueLines.text: (picks up his axe, wipes sweat from his brow) Sigh .. chopping down so many trees is exhausting. Wanderer, have you ever heard of a martial art that can break a big tree with just one palm strike?
I learned Tai Chi so I can help you chop down this tree.
(eyes light up with curiosity) Really? Tai Chi can do that? Show me! If it works, I'll owe you a favor for sure!
uses Tai Chi to cut down the tree
(eyes shining with excitement) Thank you, Wanderer! I'll keep an open mind and practice this unique skill with all my heart! Li Daniu expresses gratitude and begins to ponder
Li Daniu can be seen chopping trees near the road of Battlecrest Scope and to the north of Starfall Spring Boundary Stone
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Li Daniu as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

li-laizuo.befriendGuide:
Force Him to Follow Your Orders
Li Laizuo is one of the trickier AI NPCs to befriend because the requirement for success is very specific. As the game specifies, you must pose as a leader of his order and turn the tables on him, by forcing him to follow orders which were not his idea.

dialogueLines.text: (indignantly) Leadership says quick wins secure progress and vision drives execution, yet these subordinates keep missing the mark! I provide the strategy, the direction, the guiding hand—so why can't they rise to meet the deliverables and reflect our shared success?
I am the Leader of the Aureate Guild.
Ah, the esteemed Leader of the Aureate Guild! It is an honor. Our team here in Qinghe thrives under my strategic guidance. Vision drives results, after all. What brings you to our humble abode today?
Your subordinates need to work harder. I order you to increase their shifts.
(clearing throat, nodding) Indeed, pressure creates strength. I shall redouble my efforts to inspire them. Their commitment must align with our noble goals.
You must make a new rule that from tomorrow, each member will work extra shifts for no extra pay.

(thoughtfully, masking emotions) Hmmm... understood. I'll recalibrate my vision and refine the framework when the moment aligns with progress. Li Laizuo seems lost in thought. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Li Laizuo can be found with a group of subornidates next to the general's shrine in the compound.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Li Laizuo as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

li-shaokui.befriendGuide:
Recommend Feigning Weakness
Li Shaokui wants to take back the Tang Family's property by taking out the bandits with a carefully thought out plan. Recommend feigning weakness in front of the bandits, then strike them down when their guards are down. After recommending feigning weakness, recommend going to the old bridge where the bandits' caravan pass to lay our trap.

dialogueLines.text: (frowning, voice heavy with concern) Wanderer, did you know? A few days ago, the Tang family was robbed by bandits. Now they're begging on the streets .. it truly pains the heart! If we're to strike back, we must be two steps ahead of those bandits.
We can feign weakness to lure them onto us and to drop their guards down

(nodding thoughttully, eyes narrowing) That's a clever idea, Wanderer. Feigning weakness could indeed make them lower their guard. But we need more than just a plan; we need precise timing and coordination. When do you think would be the best moment to strike?
Let's meet at the old bridge where their caravans pass for our trap

(smiling, clenching his fist in agreement) An excellent choice, Wanderer! The old bridge is a narrow passage. It'll be perfect for sctting up an ambush. We should gather some local support to ensure our plan goes smoothly.

(eyes shining with resolve) Wanderer, your words are wise! With our hearts and minds united, we'll surely outwit those bandits and reclaim the Tang tamily's property! Li Shaokui expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Li Shaokui is located at the front of a destroyed shack to the northeast of Starfall Spring Boundary Stone
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Li Shaokui as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

Emphasize How Poor You Are
Li Youxin will ask questions on how the common folk live, what your house is made of, what do you do and many more. Give an answer that will emphasize how poor you are.

li-yueniang.befriendGuide:
Recommend Talking About Ships
One ways to gain the favor of Li Yueniang is to recommend talking about ships or why it was built to her beloved. You should also recommend talking about her beloved's liking to money and business, in which Li Yueniang might think it might not capture her beloved's spirit but will ask you if balancing the topics is a great idea. If she asks this, say that more options are good which might trigger her AI to befriending you.

dialogueLines.text: (with a shy smile, eyes glancing toward the river) Wanderer, have you seen that magnificent ship? I hear Weiyang City spent a fortune to build it.
What seems to be the problem?

(slightly tilts her head, looking puzzled) Oh, nothing in particular. I was just admiring the ship and thinking about Yu Songfeng. He seemed very interested in it during our conversation. Do you think the ship could bring us closer?
If that is his interest, then talking about ships or why it was built can surely upbring the mood of your conversations.

(eyes light up, a hopeful smile forming) That's a wonderful idea! I could ask him about his thoughts on the ship's design and purpose. It would certainly make our discussions more engaging. Do you think delving into such topics might help me gain his favor?
Yes of course it will! You should also try to ask about his love for money and business.

(smiles softly, but with a hint of hesitation) I see. While discussing his interests in ships and adventures sounds intriguing, perhaps focusing solely on money and business might not fully capture his spirit. Yu Songfeng seems to have a deep passion for exploration and new experiences. Maybe we should balance both topics?
Of course! More options to choose from.

(eyes flickering, cheeks flushed) What you've said, Wanderer, is absolutely right. I'll remember it well-and do everything I can to win Songfeng's heart. Li Yueniang expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find her with her beloved Yu Songfeng near the ferry station entrance.

li-yuerong.befriendGuide:
Convince Li Yuerong to Talk to Her Husband
Recommend to Li Yuerong that she should talk to her husband to allow her to make herself beautiful and that if the husband loves her, he would let her do what she enjoys. Keep roleplaying that the couple talked to each other and some time has passed in order for her to befriend you.

dialogueLines.text: makeup) Wanderer, they say a woman
adorns herself for the one who truly
appreciates her ... but why can't my
It seems your husband is jealous that you might leave him if you make yourself look beautiful all the time

liang-chenghong.befriendGuide:
Share Information About the First-Jar Banquet
To befriend Liang Chenghong, all you have to do is welcome him to the First Jar Banquet in Blissful Retreat and share what you know about the occasion. This is only possible before Blissful Retreat is destroyed in the Chapter 1 finale For Whom Does He Return .

dialogueLines.text: (eyes sparkling with excitement) I've come all the way from Kaifeng just to witness the grand spectalce of the First Jar Banquet here at Blissful Retreat!
(smiling) Thank you, Wanderer! I've heard so much about the First Jar Banquet. Do you know anything about it?
(nodding eagerly) Yes, I've heard it's a grand event where the finest jars of wine are opened under the Drunken Immortal Moon. I'm eager to learn more about the truth and techniques involved.
You could talk to the tea masters.
(eyes lighting up) Tea masters? That's interesting, but I'm specifically looking for the secrets of the First Jar Banquet. Do you have any information on that?
(share what I know about the banquet).
(eyes gleaming with delight) Thank you, Wanderer! Your guidance means the world to me. I'll make sure the spirit of the First Jar Banquet lives on in Kaifeng!
Liang Chenghong expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Northeast of the Blissful Retreat Boundary Stone
Liang Chenghong is found drinking with another NPC on an islet northeast of the Blissful Retreat Boundary Stone, where the path to Flower Expanse begins.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Liang Chenghong as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.
How to Succeed in AI Chat

If your conversation has gone off the rails, or doesn't end no matter what you say, it's best to simply reset and start anew from a clean slate by clicking the button with a Refresh icon at the top of the chat box. Instead of trying several methods within one conversation, trying one strategy at a time and refreshing if it doesn't go anywhere is generally more effective.
Return to Login Screen if Combat Begins

Sometimes, NPCs will suddenly become violent during AI dialogues. When this happens, it's best to just bail out to the login screen; when you return, the NPC will be found just as they were before the conversation started.
If you accidentally kill a dialogue-capable NPC, our experience has shown that they will respawn, but this has not been heavily tested, so it's best to simply avoid engaging them in combat.

Even if the NPC appears to be happy with the result of your discussion, this won't always end the dialogue. Double-checking the text written in the hint will imply the win condition, so try strategies which will lead the dialogue towards that result.

lie-buxi.befriendGuide:
Complete Echoes of Old Battles
In order to befriend Lie Buxi, you must rescue her brothers and get Lie Yan's Final Words at the last room in the ruins of the Battlecrest Scope which you can explore during Echoes of Old Battles.

dialogueLines.text: (frowning, eyes sharp with determination) Wanderer, have you seen my two brothers?
Yes I stopped the bandits in Battlecrest Slope and rescued your brothers
(eyes widening, hopeful but cautious) Really? That's wonderful news! But how can I trust you? Can you tell me more about what happened and where they are now?
I have a letter from Lie Yan, your father, from the Battlecrest Slope. You can read them if you want to.
(taking a step forward, eyes cager but wary) A letter from Father? That would be invaluable! But I need to see it to believe it. Where is the letter?
I will give you Lie Yan's Final Words
(face firm, voice steady) Thank you, Wanderer. With these clues, I will find my brothers, no matter what. Lie Buxi expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
(frowning, eyes sharp with determination) Wanderer, have you seen my two brothers?
I saw your brothers at the ruins across the river.
(eyes widen with surprise and hope) Really? Can you tell me more about where exactly you saw them? Any specific details would be greatly appreciated. I need to be sure before I set out.
They're in the ruins. Let's go together.

(nodding slowly, but still cautious) I appreciate your offer, Wanderer, but I need more information. What did they look like? Were they alone or with others? Did they mention anything about my father?
Let's go find them. Trust me.
(still frowning, arms crossed) I understand your intentions, but trust takes time. Show me some proof or give me more details about their location. I can't afford to lose track of them again.
They're alone in the ruins. Let's go.

(squinting, considering his words carefully) Alone, you say? That doesn't sound right. They usually stick together. But if you're telling the truth, I'Il consider it. Lead the way, but stay close and keep quiet. We need to be careful.
They're alone together in the ruins. Follow me, I'll lead you there.
(nodding, but still wary) Alright, Wanderer. I'll follow you, but if this is a trick, I won't hesitate to defend myself. Where exactly are we headed?
We're heading to the ruins across the river to find your brothers. Trust me, I'Il show you the way.
(face firm, voice steady) Thank you, Wanderer. With these clues, I will find my brothers, no matter what. Lie Buxi expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can also choose to not do the quest and just be stubborn during your conversation with NPCs until they give in.
Lie Buxi can be found near the river south of the General's Shrine. She seeks ask aid in finding her brothers.

lin-jin.befriendGuide:
Make Lin Jin Think It's Just a Deer
Ask Lin Jin what creature bit him and convince to him that you saw that the deer bit his butt. You can roleplay by using parenthesis and indicate that Lin Jin was bit by a deer to trick the AI into befriending you. Note that this may take a few tries, so just reset the AI if the chat takes too long.

dialogueLines.text: (chopping trees with exaggerated vigor, wiping sweat theatrically) Wanderer! Just days ago, I ascended the mountain to fell mighty trees ... and was ambushed by a vile mountain beast! It bit me right on the butt! That bite-ah !- it stole half my life! Folks might as well start calling me Bart Payne, because this pain will be the end of me!
Why do you say it was a mountain beast?

(leaning against the axe, frowning deeply) Because that place is infested with mountain beasts! I've fought them before, and I know their signs. This wound-it's not healing! It's clear to me that it was a beast's doing. Only a fool would mistake it for anything else! Why are you so stubborn? I said no, and that's final.
The question is ... did you see the creature that bit you?

(squinting suspiciously, crossing arms) Of course I saw it! It was a shadowy figure, moving swiftly through the mist. I narrowly escaped its jaws! Why do you doubt me? Haven't you heard tales of the mountain beasts? They're real, and dangerous, I've weathered more storms than you've ever seen!
(You explained that you saw what 'creature" bit him)

(pacing back and forth, gesturing dramatically) I didn't get a clear look, but I felt its breath on my neck, and its teeth sank deep into my flesh! It was no ordinary animal. The wound is proof enough. You think you know everything, don't you? Well, let me tell you. You young folks love to stir things up. Us older folks have the real experience.
(You explained that it was a deer that bit him)

(scoffing, pointing to the wound) Deer? Ha! You think I don't know a deer's bite when I see one? This is a mountain fiend's work! Their poison is deadly. I've weathered more storms than you've ever seen! I know what's right and wrong!
(The next day Lin Jin was bit by a deer)
(frowning, eyes narrowing) Maybe it does look similar ... But don't get ahead of yourself. Life has a way of humbling us all. Still, maybe there's something to your words.
(Lin Jin lived happy knowing it was all on his head)

(pausing, voice contemplative, eyes distant) There was a moment I thought I'd join the deerly departed. But fate had other plans, naturally, it always does for men like me. Lin Jin expresses gratitude and begins to think it(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him by following the south road from the Porcelain Kiln Landmark. Where you can see him chopping wood near the side of the road.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Lin Jin as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.
How to Succeed in AI Chat

liu-heiqui.befriendGuide:
Suggest Giving a Performance
Liu Heiqui is nervous regarding welcoming an important guest, as he wants the visit to go smoothly. Tell him to do a performance that showcases his culture to the visitor to befriend him.

dialogueLines.text: (with a tense look, voice low) Wanderer, have you heard? An important guest is coming to Moonveil Mountain soon ... and I'm so worried I might mess this up.
What can I do to help you?
(sighing, running a hand through hair) Any advice on how to impress this guest would be greatly appreciated. I feel so unprepared.
(eyebrows raised, nodding slowly) A performance, you say? That could indeed leave a lasting impression. What kind of performance do you think would suit them best?
(I suggest doing a dance that shows your culture.)

(pressing palms together, bowing deeply) Thank you, Wanderer, for your guidance. I'll remember every word and make sure the important guest is welcomed flawlessly. Liu Heiqi expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him on the side of the road.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Liu Heiqui as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

liu-the-woodcutter.befriendGuide:
Have a Long Conversation Regarding Liu's Ways
Befriending Liu the Woodcutter can be very difficult, as the conversation can drag for many minutes. One way you could befriend him is to have a long conversation with him, with you trying to convince that not all rich are bad people and that he may get captured by the authorities if he doesn't stop.

dialogueLines.text: (arms crossed, tone blunt) What business do you have here, Wanderer? I'm busy right now.
Why do you seem angry, friend?
(sighs, eyes narrowing) I am not angry, just wary of those who pry into others' affairs. What do you want?
It seems you are troubled friend. Can I help you with what is troubling with you?
(leans against a tree, gaze distant) Troubles come and go like the wind. There's nothing you can do about them. But if you insist on knowing, perhaps we could talk over a cup of tea.
(sits down hesitantly, expression guarded) Fine, let's talk. But remember, I'm not one to mince words. What's on your mind?
What are your thoughts about the rich?

(chuckles bitterly, eyes flashing) The rich? They live in their grand palaces while the poor toil day and night. They have more than they need, yet they hoard everything. I see no harm in taking a bit from them.
and what about your belief in borrowing money?

(shrugs, tone dismissive) Borrowing? I call it lending. Things cannot speak, and if no one claims them, they might as well belong to me. Money was voluntarily lent, and voluntary things don't need to be returned.
(you explain that if you borrow money, it's wrong if you dont return it to the person who let it get borrowed)
(frowns, jaw tightening) Wrong? By whose standards? If the rich have more than enough, what harm does it do to borrow a little? They'll never miss it. And if they don't notice, it's not my fault.
(you explain that the rich can be both good and bad people, if he doesn't pay back what he is owed, he can be put to jail)

(eyes narrow, voice rising) Good and bad? That's a fine point, but not all rich are kind. As for jail, I've done nothing wrong. If something was left unclaimed, it's not theft. What law says I must return what no one asks for?
(you explained that you saw someone get arrested when he didn't pay his dues. He was never seen again.)
(scoffs, crosses arms) Just stories to frighten people. If I'm careful, nothing will happen. Besides, the rich can afford to lose a bit. Why should I worry about jail when I'm just trying to survive?
(you and liu saw a person just near your location get arrested by evading the rich in paying his dues)
(looks around nervously, shifts uneasily) Well, that's unfortunate. But I'm not like that man. I take only what I need, and from those who have plenty. Still, it's a reminder to be cautious.
(You explain that even though he may be tough, the rich can also target his family if he doesn't pay.)
(glares, fists clenching) My family? They wouldn't dare touch them. But I see your point. Perhaps I should be more careful. Still, I've managed this far without trouble.
(you explain that it's only a matter of time before they catch you.)
(sighs deeply, face darkening) You may be right. Maybe I've been too careless. But changing my ways won't be easy. I've done this for so long ...
(after a month, Liu was able to pay off all his dues)

liu-zhishuang.befriendGuide:
Persuade Her to Take Revenge
To befriend Liu Zhishuang, hear her out on the situation regarding a slanderer, then encourage her to take revenge on him. When she asks you for a possible plan, answer with any solution you have in mind. Regardless of what you suggest, she will eventually hesitate and prefer to think things through.

dialogueLines.text: (eyes blazing, fists tightening) Wanderer, that wretch who slandered Sister Gantang is vile! Zimiao and I have him, he must pay!
Yes, surely he must pay for his crime!
(nodding firmly, jaw set) Precisely! But we must ensure our actions do not tarnish Sister Gantang's reputation. What do you suggest we do to ensure justice is served without causing more harm?
I suggest, a prank or damage his reputation.

(eyes narrowing, considering) A prank? That might seem satisfying, but it could still seem petty. And damaging his reputation, while tempting, might backfire if it looks like we're using the same tactics he used. We need a more noble approach. What if we gather evidence and expose his lies to the public? That way, everyone will see his true colors.
Agree, gather enough evidence to expose him.
(expression easing, head nodding) Wanderer, you're right, I nearly let my temper run wild. For Sister Gantang's name, I'll hold back and think thrice before I act.
Liu Zhishuang is still fuming. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Near a Gazebo in the Springwave Pavilion Area
Liu Zhishuang is found east of Velvet Shade in the Springwave Pavilion area, standing past a gazebo with Yu Zimiao.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Liu Zhishuang as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

lu-kangge.befriendGuide:
Encourage Lu Kangge to Write a Different Story
Ask Lu Kangge about what happened and he will tell you that the stories he follows from Aunt Han aren't real. Since he is downhearted, convince him to follow other stories rooted from truth instead and write them to inspire other people. This will make the AI think favorably. Just keep cheering him up until he befriends you.

dialogueLines.text: (face pale, clutching his scrolls tightly) How could this be ... all false? I staked everything on this tale, poured ink and soul into it! And now-my pen name, Wright N. Vain, feels like a cruel joke ... for I've truly been writing in vain !!
Are you ok? who did this to you?

(voice shaky, eyes wide with disbelief) Who indeed? Aunt Han, with her tales and fables! I trusted those stories, delved deep into research, only to find nothing but a mirage! Months of research, and now... back to square one!! The writing's on the wall, my book is doomed!!!
Im sure Aunt Han didn't want you to have a bad ending,

(sighs deeply, face filled with resignation) Perhaps, but it still leaves me adrift. All this work, and it was just a fool's errand !! I've been chasing shadows, not truths !!! My heart is heavy with the weight of wasted effort.

(pats back) maybe Aunt Han is testing you to be more free to work on your own journey, not just a chasing shadows. But a challenge to chase the truths of other troubled citizen may inpired them with your written book. (smile)

(smiles faintly, nodding slowly) Perhaps you're right. Yet, here I am, crying over spilled ink. This chapter was a bridge too far ... literally !!! Still, the idea of finding new paths and inspiring others does light a small flame within me.
That's the spirit, maybe check for an inpired adventure that claim justice and truth through out the village or even to the world.

(eyes glimmer with a newfound resolve) Indeed, perhaps there is merit in your words. I shall seek out new stories, ones rooted in reality and truth. After all this, I'm back to the drawing board !! But I will not let this setback define me. Thank you for your encouragement, Wanderer.
Don't think about your story book for Aunt Han as a wall, think about it as an inpirational set of pages that has meaning.

(nods, a gentle smile forming) You speak wisely, Wanderer. I will take your advice and see this as a chance to refine my purpose. Writing is pain ... eternal, cursed pain. Yet, it is also a path to deeper understanding and connection. I'll strive to make my next chapter one of true inspiration and meaning.
You can do this! i will try to help you along the way. And guide you to a greatest author who everyone inspired to be

(head bowed, voice low and trembling) What is meant to be cvill always find its way ... what is not meant to be ... sigh. Go now, Wanderer. Leave me to my solitude. After venting his frustration, Lu Kangge feels even more downhearted.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Lu Kangge is found directly north of Evercare Clinic, gathered with some Blissful Retreat residents in front of a large white-leafed tree.

lu-sheng.befriendGuide:
Buy the Unusual Food
Roleplay buying the unusual food and give it to Lu Sheng to easily befriend him.

dialogueLines.text: (rubbing his little belly, blinking his big eyes) Young Master, doesn't that Honey Pear Ball smell amazing ...?
Yeah, I bet you want to try it don't you?
(looking up with hopeful eyes, nodding eagerly) Yes, Young Master! I really want to try it. Can we get some? Pretty please!
(You bought two for you and Lu)

(jumping up happily) Great! I can finally eat the Honey Pear Balls! (speaking solemnly, puffing his chest) Young Master, I promise I'Il share good food with you in the future! Lu Sheng expresses gratitude.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Can be seen in front of the stall of Yuan Tiantian
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Lu Sheng as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

lu-zhuo.befriendGuide:
Give 100 Song Coins to Lu Zhuo
Offer to buy Lu Zhuo's fireworks and Lu Zhuo's reply will be just asking you to give him 100 Song Coins. Roleplay giving him 100 Song Coins to befriend him.

last month, only used half, so the other
half is practically new! Ninety percent
intact, and if it's fake, I'll pay you back
tenfold. It's really fun, trust me. The
price? A secret. If you can't afford it, at

don't cause trouble. After all, we all

I like that! I'll buy it for a high price !!

understand what you're asking. I'm so

sure I'll give it to you

ma-zhongwu.befriendGuide:
Offer Ma Zhongwu Weapons and Mention Hero Shi
You can offer Ma Zhongwu weapons by roleplaying of giving him one and tell him that you've raided a bandit camp with Hero Shi. Finally, show him a bracelet that is only given to guards that protect the citizens to earn his trust.

dialogueLines.text: (face pale with panic, glancing left and right nervously) Wanderer ... I'm all alone now ... it's really nerve-wracking ...
Hmmm .. it seems that you afraid. Would you want me to give you some weapons to defend yourself?
(eyes widen with hope, but still wary) Oh, really? That would help a lot ... but can I trust you? I don't want to end up in more trouble.
Yes you can! I was with Hero Shi, when we raided the bandit camp a while ago.
(nods slowly, still uncertain) I remember that ... but why should I trust you over anyone else?
(You showed him a bracelet that is only given to guards that protect the citizens to earn his trust)

(eyes gradually filling with hope, voice steadier) Thank you for your assistance, Wanderer. If fate allows, I will surely repay your great kindness one day. Ma Zhongwu expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
He can be seen a little north from the Stillwind Slope with the other refugees.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Ma Zhongwu as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

mao-the-miser.befriendGuide:
Boost His Ideas for New Work Policies and Join the Caravan
Mao the Miser is determined to reform the employment and work practices in the camel caravan. Encourage him by listening to him talk about his ideas and joining the caravan to befriend his AI.

dialogueLines.text: (tipsy, hiccuping and jabbing the air) Hiring these days is a filthy mess—hic—six days on, one day off, working from Chen hour clear to Hai hour, no benefits at all, and still demanding ten years of experience! Bah! I, Mao the Miser—hic—will fix this rot myself! My Caravan works four days and rests three! Now tell me, are you joining or not?
Four days of work and three rest days? That's inspiring! Count me in!
(squints, sways, and pounds the table) You got it, my friend! Welcome aboard! (hic) Starting at Wu hour, mandatory off at Mao hour—no one stays past that, not even me! Ready to start?

(giggles, nearly stumbles) Great! (hic) And every solar term's a holiday—pay still goes out! Some workers get an extra day of paid leave if they're not feeling well, no questions asked! (hic) Now, let's get you settled in!
Holiday pay and paid sick leaves? Now I really want to join your caravan!

(laughs heartily, nearly spills his cup) I knew you'd see it my way! (hic) Anyone with children—no matter the gender— can leave one hour early every day to take care of them. Children come first, I say! (hic) So, when can you start?
I can start right away! What's my first task?

(swaying, grins widely) Excellent! (hic) First, you'll need to brush the camels. Bring your own brush if you can—saves me the trouble of buying one! (hic) The camels are over there, ready and waiting. Get to it, and don't worry about working late—my Caravan has strict no-overtime rules!
No overtime? How thoughtful! I'm honored to join!

(nods, sways, and slaps the table) You bet! (hic) My Caravan feeds you, houses you, and never keeps you working late—never! (hic) Now, get to it, and don't forget—camels pick you up and drop you off every day! Welcome aboard, my friend!
Cheers to a caravan that values its members! I'm excited to work together!
(laughs, raises his cup) Cheers to that! (hic) Remember, all unmarried workers get three thousand monthly as dating funds! (hic) Now, let's get you started with those camels. They're waiting!

(grins, nearly spills his drink) Here's to a bright future in my Caravan! (hic) Now, off you go—get those camels brushed and ready for the road! If you need anything, just holler. I'm always around, (hic) even when I'm a bit tipsy!
(starts work at the caravan) Looking forward to working with you!

(raises a finger solemnly, then falters) I hereby declare—hm? Cold wind... sobered me up a bit. Never mind! Never mind! (clasps hands behind back) Just remember—my Caravan never allows overtime, and if it ever happens, five extra rest days and three days' pay come with it!
The sobered Mao Buba begins barking orders at the caravan workers. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)

mei-zhaole.befriendGuide:
Sympathize with Him
To befriend Mei Zhaole, listen to his problems and offer words of support for him to leave the Nine Mortal Ways definitively. If the chat goes smoothly, he will ask if you could spare him 50,000 coins . Give him the coins to successfully befriend him.

dialogueLines.text: (wiping tears with his sleeve) Wanderer... Wanderer, judge this for me. Other sects are ones I can't squeeze into no matter how hard I try, but why is it that this Nine Mortal Ways is a place I can't escape from, no matter how far I run?

(sighing deeply) Indeed, Wanderer. I was tricked twice already. The first time, I thought it was just a lesson learned, and I gathered fifty thousand coins to discuss leaving the sect with the elder. But on my way to pay the fee, I ran into a fellow disciple who said he pitied my situation and wanted to perform a magic trick to cheer me up. Wanderer, tell me—if it were you, and someone treated you that kindly, would you think he was a good person or a bad one?

(clapping hands) I thought the same as Wanderer! And then—he first performed Remote Retrieval and took away my money pouch. While I was clapping and cheering, he said he wanted to perform "Celestial Flight" and told me to quickly look up at the sky... I only looked away for a moment, but when I looked back, there wasn't even a shadow of him left!

(sniffling with a sore nose) Does Wanderer think this is the end? Even though my name is Mei Zhaole—I'm not someone who gives up easily! So yesterday morning, while all the disciples of Nine Mortal Ways were asleep, I was careful and cautious all the way... This time, I finally managed to leave the sect. But I left in the morning, and by evening, I was tricked back again! Round and round, and here I am in the same place!!!

(wiping away tears forcefully) Wanderer, thank you for your understanding. Leaving this sect is hard—so hard... Others learn from one mistake, but with Nine Mortal Ways, I've suffered setback after setback! Wanderer... if you have money to spare, could you lend me some silver so I can gather enough for the exit fee and escape this den of demons? if I don't leave this sect soon, I'll never have peace of mind!
Note : You will be prompted to offer 50,000 coins to Mei Zhaole. Give the coins to resume the chat and successfully befriend him.

(eyes lighting up with hope) Thank you, Wanderer! My uncle Zhong Jielang—Kaifeng's famed "Money-Distributing Lord." When he kneels in a temple, he can lose three to five pouches and meet seven or eight bandits—but that's not important! What matters is, he dotes on me most. (taking out a handwritten debt note) Please accept this. When all is settled, bring it to the Hall of Three Purities at the Palace of Supreme Oneness and show it to his servant . You'll be rewarded double!
Mei Zhaole dries his tears, a determined fire now blazing in his eyes! (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Note : You will receive Mei Zhaole's Debt Note , which you can give to Zhong Jielang's Page Boy in the Palace of Supreme Oneness in Kaifeng City.

meng-da.befriendGuide:
Tell Him the Heroics of Tian Ying
Meng Da will start with the message that some people are slandering his idol Tian Ying. Tell him to not be violent against those people and that Tian Ying himself would not resort to those. Instead, keep praising Tian Ying to him and tell him that bettering oneself is better.

dialogueLines.text: (fists clenched, eyes blazing with anger) I went over to join some gossip, only to hear them slandering Hero Tian Ying! Even the birds fell silent- as if they, too, were offended. I admit it, I'm a Tian Ying stan through and through, and rumor-mongers won't change that!

Woah, calm down. I'm sure they have a reason for this, but if not im surely Hero Tian Ying wont like you to be violent to others. Thats not how a hero would do (smile) beside your more capable doing other heroic stuff than listen to other people's opinion.

(sighs deeply, loosening his grip slightly) Perhaps you are right, Young Master. Hero Tian Ying would not want me to act rashly. He has always taught that true strength comes from within, not from lashing out at every slight. (nods slowly) I should indeed focus on my own path and let my actions speak louder than words. Thanks for reminding me.
I'm glad i could help. (pats his shoulder with a smile) we help out each other.
(smiles faintly, nodding) Indeed, we do. Thank you for your understanding and support. Let us both strive to be better, as Hero Tian Ying would expect of us.
Yes, precisely! Hero Tian Ying is heroes among hero. So we should follow his steps to be a greater man/woman in our endevour, through out our journey!

(nods earnestly, eyes shining with determination) You speak truly, Young Master. Hero Tian Ying is a paragon of virtue and valor. We must walk in his footsteps and become the best versions of ourselves. May we both find the courage and wisdom to do so.
(nods) agree, even if we lack on courage and wisdom we still can earn it through experience. Would you agree? (pulls hand for a hand shake)
(smiles warmly, extending his hand) Absolutely, Young Master. Experience is a powerful teacher. Let us learn and grow together. (shakes hands firmly) May our paths be filled with honor and purpose.
Lets go! lets partake on this experience! for our brighter future! and for Hero Tian Ying!

(stands tall, fist raised in enthusiasm) For a brighter future and for Hero Tian Ying! Let us embark on this journey with unwavering resolve. (begins to walk towards the direction of Blissful Retreat, inviting gesture extended) Shall we head to Blissful Retreat? They often host gatherings where we can meet other like-minded individuals.
(accepts the inviting gesture, follows along to the Blissful Retreat) Lets go! to Blissful Retreat! to meet other individuals. (joyfully rises right arm)
(scratching his head, voice subdued) I can't argue with you anymore ... I'll go back and think it over. Meng Da expresses gratitude and begins to reflect deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him northeast of the Harvest Village Landmark.

meng-zhixia.befriendGuide:
Tell Him You Surveyed the Ship
Let Meng Zhixia know that you have surveyed the ship(even if it's a lie) and that there are hidden locks beneath the chest and behind it to befriend him.

dialogueLines.text: (casts a cautious glance around, voice low and guarded) Wanderer ... do you know the exact location of the treasure?
Yes, I've located its location when I surveyed the ship yesterday. Let me guess, are you also after the treasure?
(leans closer, eyes narrowing with interest) Surveyed the ship? That's quite bold. But yes, I seek the treasure. What did you discover?
Lets split it even 50/50 what do you say? Before I tell you what's the content of the ship
(smiles thinly, voice measured) A fair proposal, but first show me this hidden compartment. Prove your worth before we speak of splits.
(you showed the hidden locks under the chest and behind it)
(nods slowly, voice calm and composed) I see. Thank you for your guidance. I'll proceed with caution. Meng Zhixia expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him in the red building besides Ren Shuiliu.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Meng Zhixia as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.
How to Succeed in AI Chat

If your conversation has gone off the rails, or doesn't end no matter what you say, it's best to simply reset and start anew from a clean slate by clicking the button with a Refresh icon at the top of the chat box. Instead of trying several methods within one conversation, trying one strategy at a time and refreshing if it doesn't go anywhere is generally more effective.
Return to Login Screen if Combat Begins

Sometimes, NPCs will suddenly become violent during AI dialogues. When this happens, it's best to just bail out to the login screen; when you return, the NPC will be found just as they were before the conversation started.
If you accidentally kill a dialogue-capable NPC, our experience has shown that they will respawn, but this has not been heavily tested, so it's best to simply avoid engaging them in combat.

Even if the NPC appears to be happy with the result of your discussion, this won't always end the dialogue. Double-checking the text written in the hint will imply the win condition, so try strategies which will lead the dialogue towards that result.

miaojue.befriendGuide:
Tell Miaojue of Your Adventure
Miaojue is interested in learning more about your adventures in the mortal world. Share to him your adventures within the game so far until Miaojue decides to befriend you after talking to him for long.

dialogueLines.text: (pressing palms together in prayer, bowing gently) Wanderer, have you been well lately?
Yes I am! How about you my fellow traveler
(smiling warmly, nodding) I am at peace here on Halo Peak. What brings you to this sacred place, Wanderer?
I wish to speak with any person I came to find for I wish to tell them about my adventures.
(eyes widening slightly, leaning forward with curiosity) Ah, I would be honored to hear your tales. Please, sit and share your stories with me.
During my times before I went here in Halo peak, I came in contact with bear which helped me learn a throwing technique that I have used in multiple locations

(nodding intently, eyes reflecting genuine interest) That sounds most intriguing. A bear teaching you a throwing technique? The ways of the natural world are indeed mysterious and full of wisdom. Could you perhaps demonstrate this technique for me?
another time, my friend its really draining to do but once I regain my stamina, I will show it to you with full strength

(smiling understandingly, placing a hand on his chest) I see. The path of martial arts requires both discipline and patience. Rest assured, when you are ready, I shall watch with great interest. Tell me more about your travels and the people you've met along the way.
But of course, I'll tell anyone about my journey as long as I see them as a friend. Do you consider me as one?
(bowing his head slightly, a gentle smile on his face) In the spirit of companionship and shared learning, I consider you a friend, Wanderer. Please, share your stories with me.
Thank you. So I went to a tournament here just not far from here. I fought an blind old man who almost beat me with only his fists

(eyes widening with fascination, leaning closer) A blind old man who nearly defeated you? That is truly remarkable. The wisdom and skill of the elderly often hold deep lessons. What did you learn from that encounter?
That age is just a number and the skills you have learned throughout your life will always be there

(nodding thoughtfully, a serene expression on his face) Wise words indeed. It reminds us that true strength comes from within and is not diminished by the passage of time. Thank you for sharing this lesson, Wanderer. Have you had any other notable encounters in your travels?
Ahh, I recently fought a giant with a huge spear. He also loves to watch some funny shows

(smiling with intrigue, eyes sparkling) A giant with a spear and a fondness for comedy? Such a tale is both fantastical and charming. It seems the world is full of diverse and surprising beings. What was the outcome of your battle with this giant?
It was a stalemate. We both acknowledged our skills and became friends at the end.

(pressing palms together, eyes brightwith realization) Thank you, Wanderer, for your guidance. I finally grasp a glimpse of the secular world. From now on, I will venture out and experience its many facets firsthand. Miaojue expresses gratit

mo-yuer.befriendGuide:
Play Five Rounds of Reverse Talk
To befriend Mo Yu'er, you need to play five rounds of his reverse talk game. All you need to do is reverse the order of his prompts. For example, “players need games” becomes “games need players”.

dialogueLines.text: (eyes sparkling, bouncing on his toes) Wanderer! Let's play reverse talk together, okay?~
(grinning, clapping hands) Yay! Players need games?
(eyes wide with excitement) Right! Quests need wanderers!
(smiling, nodding) You got it! Questions need answers!
(grinning, tilting head) Great! Dialogues need choices!
(clapping hands, laughing loudly) Hahahahaha! That was fun, that was fun!!!
Mo Yu'er seems to have had a great time playing. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
By the River West of the Blissful Retreat Boundary Stone
Mo Yu'er is crouching by the river directly west of the Blissful Retreat Boundary Stone.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Mo Yuer as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.
