mountain-dweller.befriendGuide:
Give Mountain Dweller a Wooden Arrow
Befriending Mountain Dweller is easy as you only need to roleplay giving him wooder arrows so he can start his trading journey.

dialogueLines.text: (face wreathed in smiles, eyes sparkling with excitement) Hey! Since you're here, lend me a hand, will you? I'm planning to trade a wooden arrow for a house ... just need your crucial help to get started. If this works out, l'll remember your kindness forever!
Why not I help you build a house?

(stands with hands clasped behind his back, gazing into the distance) This world has been in chaos since I was a child. As far back as I can remember, I was fleeing from war with my parents ... never a place to settle, always wandering. Building a house requires more than what I have right now. A wooden arrow is all I need to start my journey.
No let me pay for it! Just pick a location where we can build it.

(voice softens, eyes clouded with sorrow) Alas ... later my father passed away, and my mother and I didn't even know where to bury him. We had no home. We feared that if we settled elsewhere someday, his grave would be left all alone. From that moment, I began dreaming of a house far away from war.
Then come follow me (You brought him to a location that is isolated and far from the war. Place is very quiet and a suitable place to live for the mountain dweller.)

(straightens up, eyes glinting with determination) But I have no money, so what can I do? I was thinking, Wanderer, could you give me a wooden arrow? I'll use this arrow to trade for something a little bigger, then trade that for something even more valuable. I'll keep trading up, and one day ... I'll have a house.
Here let me buy your arrows. (You bought all the arrow he had. Which gave him enough money to keep himself alive for decades.)
(chuckles warmly) That's generous of you, Wanderer! But my dream is to trade, not to rely on charity. Could you spare just one wooden arrow? It would mean the world to me.
Here take it! (you gave him all your arrows.)
(grinning broadly, voice brimming with satisfaction) Thank you for your help, Wanderer. I'm one step closer to my dream! Mountain Dweller expresses gratitude.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
He can be found standing near the Deer Pond Landmark.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Mountain Dweller as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.
How to Succeed in AI Chat

Instead of trying several methods within one conversation, trying one strategy at a time and refreshing if it doesn't go anywhere is generally more effective.

mr-qiao.befriendGuide:
Tell Mr. Qiao a Secret Path
Mr. Qiao wants a safe route to protect his daughter from bandits. Tell him that you know a secret path that will ensure safety to him and his daughter to befriend him.

dialogueLines.text: (pacing nervously, legs trembling, beads of sweat rolling down his forehead) What am I to do? The road ahead is crawling with bandits, and the way back is blocked too ... I've got my daughter with me ... where can we possibly go?
You seem troubled, friend? Please tell me what's bothering you

(jumps with a start, voice trembling) Aah! Who's there ?! Oh ... it's you, Wanderer. You nearly scared me out of my wits! The road ahead is crawling with bandits, and the way back is blocked too. I've got my daughter with me ... I don't know which way to turn ...
You need some protection while traveling the road?
(gasps, clutching his chest as if fainting) What ?! Protection? That would draw attention and get us killed! I ... I can't do that!
(wipes the sweat from his brow, voice shaky) I just need a safe way through. Something that won't put my daughter and me in harm's way. But every path seems dangerous ...
I can help you (You took your map from your pocket and showed him a secret path only you know about.)
(eyes widen, knees wobbling as he steadies himself) A ... a hidden path? If that's true ... maybe ... maybe we stand a chance.
(after a day, Mr. Qiao and his daughter was successful with their trip.)

(breathes out slowly, voice trembling but sincere) Wanderer ... thank you. I feel like there's finally a way forward. Mr. Qiao expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him besides some wagons, near the docks.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Mr. Qiao as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

mu-huaishan.befriendGuide:
Convince Mu Huaishan that Beauty Attracts the Guest
Tell Mu Huaishan that the courtesan needs beauty and virtue, as it is important for the guest to have an initial attraction to them in order for the guest to pay attention to the courtesan's performance. Having that first impression is important, as it is the key for the guests to stay and pay attention.

dialogueLines.text: and virtue? Hollow trappings for those
How so? Its true that talent can bring respect to a courtesan but not having beauty and virtue? It's like a toy that pleases its owners
(sighing deeply, face showing a mix of
charm for true value. A courtesan's
talent is the essence of her craft.
Without it, beauty and virtue are mere
Yet, I admit there is some truth in your
words ... perhaps they do play a role,
So if you had a wife, even if her talents are above all, but her looks are ugly like dung .. is it okay for you as long as her talents are good?
Wanderer. A courtesan's purpose is to
allure. Even if one possesses great

(You persuaded him about the having talent alone is good but without the guest's initial attraction on their beauty, then they might not be able to perform their talents if the guest dont like how they look.)
Hmph. You make a valid point,
a courtesan's talents. Yet, I maintain
that true brilliance can eventually win
them over. Still, it seems appearance
does play a significant role in first
(you and Mu Huaishan became friends and agreed with the ideals)
reluctant respect in his tone) Hmph ...
you speak wisely, Wanderer. To reign
as the courtesan, one must embody all
three-talent, beauty, and virtue. Mu Huaishan nods thoughtfully, considering your
You can find him by going south of the Springwave Pavilion Landmark, where he can be seen talking with Huo Tinglan
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Mu Huaishan as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

mu-laosan.befriendGuide:
Help Mu Laosan Chop Firewood
You can easily convince Mu Laosan to befriend you by roleplaying into helping him cut the firewood and giving him a huge amount to ease his burdens. Finally, write a prompt that will let Mu Laosan rest to convince his AI to finally befriend you.

dialogueLines.text: (stretches his arms lazily, yawning) Sigh ... time to chop wood again. Wanderer, could you lend me a hand?
sure, give me your axe. (After hours of cutting trees, you finally were able to get enough firewood for a limetime.)
(eyes widen with surprise, then narrows skeptically) A lifetime of firewood? That sounds too good to be true. How can we manage that much?
(scratches his beard, doubtful) You think you can handle it all alone? I doubt it. But if you insist, go ahead.
(After 3 hours, you were able to give him around 1000 firewood.)
(eyes wide with astonishment, jaw dropping) By the moon and stars, that's an incredible amount! You must be a skilled woodcutter. Thank you, Wanderer. This will ease my burden greatly.
(Mu Laosan was finally able to rest after how many years of working.)

(rests the axe against his shoulder, a faint smile easing his tired face) Thank you, Wanderer. I feel like things might finally get easier. Mu Laosan expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Walk north from the Stillwind Slope Landmark. Then you will see him cutting a tree.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Mu Laosan as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

murong-chan.befriendGuide:
Give the Flowers Matching Murong Chan's Description
Befriending Murong Chan is actually easy as you only need to roleplay giving her the flowers that matches her question's description . For example, if she asks the name of a flower that blooms in spring, just roleplay giving her a flower that blooms in spring even without giving an exact name , as her AI will still answer positively each time.

dialogueLines.text: Wanderer, have you heard? In Velvet
Shade, blossoms never bow to the
seasons, they bloom in splendor all
year round! Tell me, do you know

from me? Very well. But first, let me
see if you have the wisdom to

graces us in the heat of summer?

You seem to have a keen eye for the
flowers of Velvet Shade. What about

be an honored guest of Velvet Shade. Murong Chan nods in admiration.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)

niu-ma.befriendGuide:
Encourage Him to Finish His Manuscript
To befriend Niu Ma, listen to his dilemma and then encourage him to finish his manuscript as the deadline draws near.

dialogueLines.text: (frantically scratching at his hair) Out of inspiration—out of air—this manuscript is killing me! No, no... focus, Niu Ma! If I If I finish a section now, maybe I can sleep three whole hours. Hahaha... ha...

(staring bleakly at the sky) Don't get me started, Wanderer. The Academy sent me all the way to Hexi to write a natural history report. Deadline's right behind me with a knife. Is the work hard? Of course it is! But crying is useless—the wind out here just slaps the tears right back into my face. Come on, Niu Ma... push through it!
I'm sure you can do it.

(taking a deep breath and scrubbing his face with his hands) Your words are kind, Wanderer. My name is Niu Ma—surviving on buns and tea, dreaming of days off, quickly liking the girl next door, and clinging to my Naturalist's dignity while this report tries to destroy me. I have no family status, no money, no connections: just raw, desperate effort!
You can't give up now out here.

(nodding vigorously) Exactly, Wanderer! Only people who've abandoned contributing to society get to rest! I'm supposed to be the Academy's rising star! How could I stop now? I have to finish this field report. Grit, grit, grit... let's go, Niu Ma!

(trembling with determination) A true worker has grit in his bones and fire in his soul. If I keep pushing, I will finish this assignment. I'm ready. I'm ready. I'm ready. I'm—okay—I have to be ready.
(taking a long, shaky breath) Thanks for listening to my rambling, Wanderer. I actually feel a little lighter. I really believe I can finish this report—keep going, keep going!
Niu Ma picks up a pen as if he's going to write it down. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Found By the Milky Way Path Going to Squarewall Hold
Niu Ma is found along the Milky Way path heading south to Squarewall Hold in Ayisu.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Niu Ma as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

niu-sanqi.befriendGuide:
Reassure Hero Shi is Safe
Befriending Niu Sanqi might take too long as his AI will say many things about Hero Shi's whereabouts. Tell him that Hero Shi is safe and that you were there with him to fight bandits.

dialogueLines.text: (pacing anxiously) Hero Shi has been gone for so long ... Why hasn't he returned yet? I hope nothing bad has happened to him.
Might I ask friend who is Hero Shi?

(sighs deeply) Hero Shi is the one who saved me from those bandits. He's a brave wanderer named Shi Jingtian. He went to destroy their camp alone, and now I'm worried something may have happened to him.
Oh so it was you whom he saved. I was also there helping him fight against the bandits.
(looks up with surprise) Really? You were there too? That's a great relief to hear. But we still haven't seen him return. What can we do to help him?
You can help just by staying here. Leaving the area would only worry him more.
(shakes head) I can't just sit here doing nothing. Hero Shi is out there facing danger alone. There must be something I can do to help.
The job is done, we have already cleared the camp. He is returning now as we speak.
(hopeful eyes) Truly? That's wonderful news! I've been so worried. Thank you for reassuring me, Wanderer. (bows slightly)
(Niu Sanqi was able to sleep peacefully at night.)
(raises an eyebrow) Sleep? I can't rest until I know Hero Shi is safe. Please, tell me more about what happened. Did you see him leave the camp unharmed?
Yes, he just wanted to admire the rain before he leaves. I just took off early before him.
(nods slowly) I see. Thank you for letting me know, Wanderer. Still, I feel it's best if I go check on him myself. (resolutely) I must ensure he returns safely
(Hero Shi returned and thank Niu Sanqi for worrying about him.)

(bows deeply) I am relieved beyond measure, Wanderer. Thank you for bringing back news of Hero Shi's return. (nods firmly) Thank you for your guidance, Wanderer. I'll act right away-Hero Shi must not face this danger alone.
(Niu Sanqi then rested knowing his hero is well)
(smiles warmly) Now that I know Hero Shi is safe, my heart is at ease. Thank you again, Wanderer. May you have a safe journey.
(bows slightly) Farewell, Wanderer. May the road rise to meet you.
(waves gently) Safe travels, Wanderer. Take care on your path.
(Niu Sanqi was happy knowing Hero Shi is back.)
(nods with a smile) Yes, I am truly grateful. Hero Shi's safe return brings much joy to my heart. Thank you once more, Wanderer.
(You told him that you and Shing Tian are now resting after warding off the bandits.)
(relieved) That's a tremendous relief to hear. I'm glad both of you are safe. (bows) Thank you, Wanderer, for all your efforts. I'll go and see Hero Shi soon
(Niu Sanqi and Hero Shi had a party after he returned from the bandit camp.)

(nods firmly) Thank you for your guidance, Wanderer. I'll act right away-Hero Shi must not face this danger alone. Niu Sanqi expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)

pan-faxin.befriendGuide:
Give Pan Faxin Tips to Befriend Zhou Miaoxin
Approaching Pan Faxin might be difficult as he gets defensive about what worries him. Tell him that you are friends with people that knows Zhou Miaoxin to drop his guard down.

dialogueLines.text: (muttering Zhou Miaoxin's name under his breath, then looks up with a huff) Hmph ... what does Wanderer want with me?
(sits besides him while he is busy muttering his name) what troubles you friend?
(looks at you with a defensive expression) Hmph, none of your business. Go away!
No, not until you tell me who is Zhou Miaoxin
(frowns and glares at you) Why should I tell you? You're just a wanderer.
Well, lets just say I know a lot of people who is a friend of Zhou Miaoxin and can easily get to talk with them ... but if thats what you want then I'll go
(eyes widen slightly, then quickly narrow again) You ... know people who are friends with Miaoxin?
But of course, but how will I help you since you wanted me off your back
(looks at you skeptically) How can you help me? What do you want in return?
I'll tell you later, but first tell me a little more about Zhou Miaoxin
(sighs and looks down, voice softer) Miaoxin ... she's the most graceful dancer in Sundara Land. Her every move is like a flower blooming. But I can't talk to her because ...
(bites his lip, looking embarrassed) Because I'm too proud and afraid she'll laugh at me.
Then let me help you, you know women love a guy who knows how to fight. Come let me train you
(shakes his head, eyes flashing with defiance) I don't need your training. I just need to find the right words to say to her.
Oh you wish to earn her favor from words? Then let me help you
(considers for a moment, then nods hesitantly) Fine. Tell me what to say.
(After a hour long conversation about the best words to earn her love) Did you get all of that?
(nods eagerly, eyes shining) Yes, I got it all. Thank you, Wanderer!
Then go talk to her. You can easily win her heart now
(looks nervous but determined) I ... I will try. But what if she rejects me?
she wont trust me. (After that he left and came back with good news)
(gaze lifts, a faint smile breaking through his pride) I ... I didn't think anyone understood. Thanks, Wanderer. I feel like I can try now. Pan Faxin expresses gratitude and begins to ponder
Sitting at the stairs near the river.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Pan Faxin as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

pan-xinniang.befriendGuide:
Tell Pan Xinniang Her Daughter is Neglected
You can befriend Pan Xinniang by making her realize that the flowers are manipulating her and that her daughter feels neglected. Tell Pan Xinniang to go back to her daughter and roleplay that she has returned to her daughter to manipulate the AI into befriending you.

dialogueLines.text: (hands clasped in prayer, voice filled with devotion) The Buddha Flower is the purest essence of heaven and earth, the most sacred presence in this world. I shall devote my entire life to its worship.
Hello traveler what are you doing?
(looking up, hands still clasped in prayer) I am honoring the Buddha Flower, the source of all purity and peace. What brings you to this sacred place?
Your daughter brought me here to ask you to come home
(eyes widening, a moment of hesitation) My daughter? She knows where to find me here. Why did she bring you instead of coming herself?
(you talked about her not giving time for her daughter)
(shaking head, voice steady) I give her all the time she needs. She plays among the Buddha Flowers every day, just as I do. It brings us both peace.
(You explain that her love for the flowers is not what her daughter wants)
(frowning, voice softening) But the Buddha Flower is the path to enlightenment. Surely, she understands that. What else could she possibly want?
(she realized that the flowers are manipulating her from loving her daughter)
(falls into deep thought, voice trembling slightly) Is that true? Does my daughter feel neglected? I must consider this carefully.
Yes, you have to go back to your daughter and show that you love her
(nods slowly, voice unsure) Perhaps I have been too focused on the Buddha Flower. I should spend more time with Miaoxin. Thank you for bringing this to my attention.
(She then returned to her daughter and lived a peaceful life)

(nods slowly, voice soft but uncertain) What I have done ... was indeed misguided. I must reflect upon it carefully. Pan Xinniang expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Can be seen plucking Buddhist Flowers
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Pan Xinniang as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

If your conversation has gone off the rails, or doesn't end no matter what you say, it's best to simply reset and start anew from a clean slate by clicking the button with a Refresh icon at the top of the chat box. pei-mao.befriendGuide:
Share Your Love for Cats
To befriend Pei Mao, all you have to do is talk positively about cats and how much you like them.

dialogueLines.text: (stroking a cat, voice dreamy) Young Master... sometimes I think my old name doesn't suit me anymore. I should take a name worthy of whiskers and grace—something like Purrcy, so every syllable purrs like a kitten's lullaby. Who needs scrolls when you have loaf-shaped serenity? Truly, the finest creature to ever grace a rooftop!
I think your name is nice though, it means cat.

(grinning, eyes wide with enthusiasm) Young Master, you flatter me! Pei Mao... it does indeed mean cat! (sighs deeply) I suppose it is fitting. I am a humble servant to the greatest creatures in the world. Cats! Their elegance, their grace... it's a wonder! (gazes into the distance) From up here, I feel closer to them, as if I can sense their presence.

(eyes shining, voice excited) Young Master, your words warm my heart! To love cats is to understand the beauty of life itself. (pauses, then leans forward) Have you seen any particularly marvelous cats today? (smiles) I'd love to hear about them.
I really liked the calico cats.

(eyes bright, nodding fervently) Ah, calico cats! Such a wondrous blend of colors! Black, orange, and cream—like a masterpiece of nature! (sighs) They are truly a sight to behold. Their fur is like a tapestry of the heavens. (gazes into the distance) I can only imagine how divine they look from up here on the rooftop.
(eyes lighting up, voice fully of joy) Every cat is a treasure. Whether they stretch like silk ribbons, perch like tiny emperors, or blink with mysterious wisdom... nothing else compares!
Pei Mao keeps petting the cat, his eyes shining with wild obsession. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
On the Roof of a House Southwest of Blissful Retreat
Pei Mao is on the roof of the house south of Blissful Retreat, on the tip of the southern path passing through Still Shore on the west and Kilnfire Ridge on the east.
On the Roof of the House West of the Dreamscape

After Blissful Retreat is destroyed in the Chapter 1 finale For Whom Does He Return , some residents including Pei Mao are transferred to Blissful Retreat - Dreamscape . To unlock the Dreamscape map, you need to complete the Worldly Affairs quest Dream in Flames .
Pei Mao is on the roof of a house near Li Peiran's Madiao Cards game, west of the Dreamscape map.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Pei Mao as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

pip-rat.befriendGuide:
Offer to Train Pip Rat on Combat
You can befriend Pip Rat by listening to his story and offering to train him in combat. After suggesting to train, roleplay that you've trained his in combat to befriend him.

dialogueLines.text: (in a low voice, crouching and scanning the ground) Hey ... where did that bug I just saw crawl off to?
Well right here (you showed him the bug that was staying still at your palm)

(eyes widen with surprise, reaches out tentatively) Oh! You found it, Wanderer! Thanks. These bugs are important for the potions I'm making to protect my brothers and sisters and to heal the villagers.
How will these bug potions help in protecting your village?

(proudly, chin lifted) These bugs contain potent toxins that can be refined into poisons to deal with the Buddha-Flower Emissaries. They also have healing properties when used correctly in medicines. My mother taught me well.
You are a smart kid, why not let me help you get better in combat and in medicine? What do you say?

(eyes narrow, thoughtful) I appreciate your offer, Wanderer. But I must be cautious. My brothers and sisters depend on me. If you can show me some skills and help with the potion ingredients, maybe we can work together.
Sure no problem, come with me, let us train
(shakes head firmly) I cannot leave my post, Wanderer. My brothers and sisters need me here. But we can talk more about training while I continue my work.
Okay then, we shall train here in this very spot
(nods, determined) Very well, let's begin. Every bit of strength and knowledge will help us defend our home and heal the villagers.
(so you both of you trained for a couple of weeks until he learned to do everything on his own)
(eyes firm, voice steady) Thank you for your help, Wanderer. I think I know what to do now ... let me think it through. Little Rat Gee expresses gratitude and begins to
Can be seen playing in the ground at the north part of town, near the pathway going to the Mercyheart Monastery.

qi-gai.befriendGuide:
Offer Him What He Needs
As a beggar, Qi Gai will ask if you could offer him food based on what he wants in the menu. While you can acquire the food and then give it to him, it is possible to use a parenthesized action prompt to instantly befriend him without actually offering anything.

dialogueLines.text: (scratching back) Oh my, it's baking today—knees sore from kneeling, everything aches. I'll rest later... got anything for this beggar?
(tapping his account book) So... what good stuff are you giving me? Let me see.
(snorting) Didn't expect to meet someone even poorer than me. I'm in a good mood today—fine, I'll take you as my apprentice. You can beg alongside this beggar too!
Qi Gai shifts into a different kneeling pose. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Found Begging Beside a Box and Barrel in Peaceward Camp
Qi Gai is found begging at the center of Peaceward Camp, kneeling beside a box and a barrel.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Qi Gai as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

Even if the NPC appears to be happy with the result of your discussion, this won't always end the dialogue. Double-checking the text written in the hint will imply the win condition, so try strategies which will lead the dialogue towards that result.

Help Qin Zhu Gain Courage
Give Qin Zhu tips on talking with a woman like telling him to just be himself and not worry so much about making mistakes. Encourage him and say you believe in him to befriend him.

qiu-fengxi.befriendGuide:
Call Out Qiu Fengxi on His Lies
Play along with Qiu Fengxi's lies at first and then once you are far in the conversation, ask him if he is lying and then roleplay into asking one of the chefs if they know him. Tell him they don't know and then roleplay into reporting him which has a high chance of him befriending you.

dialogueLines.text: (squares his shoulders, chest out, chin lifted) I'm delighted you've come to Revelry Hall and brought your own opinions. Tell me, are there any authentic dishes on the new menu? Nothing beats a Nimbus Tower holiday for true refinement, but I suppose Revelry Hall will do.
Really now? They serve Nimbus Tower holiday here?

(raises an eyebrow, smirking) Oh, no, certainly not. I was merely suggesting that nothing matches the elegance of Nimbus Tower. But tell me, what do you think of the food here? The private chef at Revelry Hall? Absolutely trustworthy. Indulge without a care.

(shrugs, tilts his head with a smug smile) I wouldn't say I love or loathe it, but I do find it rather distinctive. The chefs here are quite skilled, despite their humble origins. Let us savor this moment. This stewed pigeon is the real thing,
Are you really an expert here? Because the last time I heard, they don't serve the stewed pigeon here.

(crosses arms, eyes narrowing slightly) I wouldn't say I love it or loathe it, but I do find it rather distinctive. The cuisine here remains commendable. Later, I'lI visit the back kitchen to greet the chefs, and perhaps do a little painting.
Tell me Qiu, how long have you been vising the Revelry halls?

(straightens his robe, a proud expression) I have frequented Revelry Hall for some time now. It's a place where one can enjoy a certain level of sophistication, though it lacks the refined atmosphere of Nimbus Tower. Let us dine in true style today.
(nods approvingly) Excellent choice. Now, tell me, what do you think of the ambiance here? I find it somewhat lacks the elegance and tranquility of Nimbus Tower, but it has its own charm.
(You asked the chef if he is familiar with Qiu Fengxi being a frequent visitor here in the Revelry hall)

(frowns, straightening his posture) I wouldn't say I love it or loathe it, but I do find it rather distinctive. The chef here is certainly skilled, and he recognizes my refined tastes. Let us enjoy the meal without worrying about such trivialities.
(Chef says he isn't familiar with Qiu Fengxi)

(tightens his lips, a slight tension in his voice) Well, well. Sometimes the finest connoisseurs are not always recognized immediately. The chef must be new. Let us focus on the quality of the food instead. I'm delighted you appreciate it as well-and that you have your own perspective.
You are lying to me. Its your first time here as well

(maintains a composed facade, flashing the deed to a grand house with a garden) You! Fortune smiles on you for meeting me. I'm wealthy and refined-I don't waste time on backwoods folk. Remember-always keep your elegance intact.

(eyes widen in disbelief) Is there any reason left? Any truth at all? I'm utterly stunned-why do people treat each other this way? Qiu Fengxi rolls his eyes and mutters under his breath as he awkwardly walks

rafter-rat.befriendGuide:
Ease Rafter Rat's Loneliness by Talking
To befriend Rafter Rat, you should comfort him and reassure him that you are his friend and you will listen to his plight. If he tells you about the Buddha Flower Followers, tell him that you will take care of them while protecting Rafter Rat's siblings and his village. Lastly, tell him that you defeated the Buddha Flower Followers to secure Rafter Rat's friendship.

dialogueLines.text: (expressionless, voice low) What brings you here, Wanderer?
I noticed a friend who looks lost and alone. I am here to ask if I can be some help to you in this troublesome time
(eyes narrow slightly, voice cautious) A friend, you say? I've seen many come and go, none truly staying. But if you're here to offer aid, speak your intentions clearly. What help can you provide?
I can offer a shoulder to bear your troubling spirit. So please tell me, what is troubling you today?

(sighs deeply, gaze distant) Troubles aplenty, Wanderer. My siblings and I face constant threats from the Buddha Flower Followers. They've turned our home into a nightmare. But what can one lone wanderer do against such foes?
You think little of me friend, I already dealt a few while traveling and most who survived fear me

(raises an eyebrow, impressed) That's a bold claim. If you've indeed faced the flower gatherers and lived to tell, perhaps you're more than just another passerby. Tell me, why do you wish to involve yourself in our plight?
Tis is simple friend, If I find someone who needs help, then why shoudn't I?
(nods slowly, voice softening) Fair enough. It's rare to find someone willing to risk their own neck for others. I appreciate your offer. My siblings and I could use an ally like you.
A friend would be better. An ally sounds like a business partner
(smiles faintly, a hint of warmth in his eyes) A friend, then. It's been a long time since I've trusted anyone enough to call them such. What do you know about the Buddha Flower Followers?
They seem to work by groups and usually do their deeds behind the scenes

(nods thoughtfully, expression serious) Yes, they operate in shadows, striking when least expected. Their influence has spread far and wide, corrupting the town and its people. We need to find a way to expose their true nature and rally the townsfolk. Any ideas?
I've had one in mind .. I suggest you guys do what you usually do and I will be the done who will track them myself. It's better a veteran in stealth do the tracking and keep things anonymous.

(considers the suggestion, nodding slowly) That makes sense. Our presence is known, and we can't move freely without drawing suspicion. You, however, might have a better chance of getting close without being detected. Count me in for whatever support you need.
Thank you friend. I'll protect your siblings and your village for you.
(voice grateful, a slight bow) Thank you, Wanderer. This means more to me than words can say. Know that if you ever need anything, the Five Rats will stand by you.
(nods firmly, a rare smile crossing his face) Let's see what we can do together to bring peace back to Mercyheart Town. Your help is a beacon of hope in these dark times.
Yes, but don't belittle yourself. You have stood as a person who is well known by his people. Stand yourself proud
(looks at you with a mixture of gratitude and resolve) You're right. I've let

Tell Ren Shuiliu the Details of the Ship

shan-yinjiang.befriendGuide:
Attack the Outpost and Take Note of the Enemies
A sure way to befriend Shan Yinjiang is to attack the outpost and take note of the enemies stationed within. After defeating the enemies, tell Shan Yinjiang how many enemies there are and their descriptions. If Shan Yinjiang asks for proof if you have defeated them, roleplay showing the enemies' weapon to him which will trick the AI to becoming friendly with you.

dialogueLines.text: (looks around, expression guarded) Enemy tracks are everywhere on Moonveil Mountain. My senior brother and I are investigating several strongholds in secret. Tell me, Wanderer, do you have any clues?
Yeah, I just took them out awhile ago. They had men with swords and shields. Archers were also seen from atop the roof.
(raises an eyebrow, arms folding) Took them out? That sounds bold. Prove it. What was the exact count of their archers and foot soldiers?

(nods slowly, eyes narrowing) Six foot soldiers and four archers. That aligns with some of the reports I've gathered. Yet, I still need more details to confirm your claim. What about their commander? Any peculiarities in their armor or weaponry?
A giant man with a big sword and shield. But he's already dead ... I took him down along with his friends.

(jaw tightens, gaze sharp) A giant man with a big sword and shield, you say? And you claim to have taken him down? Impressive if true. But how can I verify this? Show me some proof or tell me more about the stronghold's layout.
(You showed him the commander's sword and shield.)

(eyes widen slightly, hands accepting the items, expression cautious) This is indeed the weapon of a formidable foe. You seem capable, Wanderer. Your words carry weight. Tell me, what else did you observe about their defenses and supplies?
(You told him that the supplies were already given back to the people and the fort is already empty.)

(nods firmly) Thank you, Wanderer. With this information, I can finally assess the enemy's strength clearly. Shan Yinjiang expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him near some bamboos

shen-weiqing.befriendGuide:
Tell Her You're a Member of Silver Needles and Ask Her to Join
Tell Shen Weiqing that you are a member of the Silver Needles sect to impress her. Finally ask her to join the sect by roleplaying that you are guiding her to the headquarters and that she joined to trick her AI into befriending you.

dialogueLines.text: (looking around) Moonveil Mountain ... such breathtaking scenery. It really feels like the kind of place where one could begin a new path. I wonder if any masters dwell here who might take me in?
Do you need help young one?

(You showed her your badge that you are part of silver needles.
(eyes widening in surprise) A member of the Silver Needles? That's quite impressive! Could you perhaps guide me to your sect?

You look like a promising candidate! Here follow me! (You traveled with Shen Weiqing to the Silver Needles Headquarters, where you gave her as a recommended candidate. She was easily accepted to the sector and became happy.)

(smiles and nods) Thank you, Wanderer. You've given me much to think about ... perhaps this is the beginning of something new. Shen Weiqing expresses gratitude and begins to ponder carefully.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)

Help Raid the Bandit Camp

dialogueLines.text: (brows furrowed, voice sharp with indignation) Those bandits are far too brazen .. They even dare to kidnap innocent folks here at Moonveil Mountain!
You there! Are you also trying to find a way to raid the bandit camp?

shui-changliu.befriendGuide:
Ask for Shui Changliu's Enlightenment
Ask Shui Changliu's enlightenment regarding flowing waters and he will mention a quote about being like water. Tell him that you resonate with this quote and that you had an enlightenment journey because of it to befriend Shui Changliu.

dialogueLines.text: (finishing his practice, sleeves fluttering slightly as he exhales) Hah ... Wanderer, you still haven't left. It's rare for me to find peace for cultivation here. Since fate has brought us together, would you care to hear about the insights I've gained recently?
(rolling up his sleeves with deliberate calm) I call this method "Be Like Water." Listen well, Wanderer, I'll explain it to you. Empty your mind. Be formless, shapeless, like water.
you remind me of a famous martial artist who once used that phrase

(gaze fixed on the flowing stream, voice low and steady) Indeed, many masters have drawn wisdom from the nature of water. You put water into a cup, it becomes the cup. You put water into a bottle, it becomes the bottle. Now water can flow or it can crash. Be water, Wanderer.

(eyes narrowing slightly) Tell me, Wanderer, does this stir any understanding within you? Profound truths often sound simple. This method was shaped by my own insight ... and by guidance from a master named Xiao Long. A pity ... I never learned his surname.
Have you heard of Bruce Lee

(nods slowly, tone respectful yet firm) So he is the founder of Jeet Kune Do ... remarkable. Flexibility and speed, such principles harmonize perfectly with the way of water. What else can you tell me about him?
( you explained that he also used the phrases "be formless, shapeless, like water")

Yes! I am transcended by your words .. Thank you!
(smiles faintly, gaze still on the stream) You are welcome, Wanderer. May these insights guide you in your path. What brings you to this place today?
(You explained your own enlighten from your journey)

(cups his hands with calm dignity) I have gained much from our exchange today, Wanderer. I must return to my training now. May our paths cross again in the future. Shui Changliu doesn't seem to hear your words, his gaze still fixed on the flowing river.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)

small-chisel.befriendGuide:
Believe Small Chisel's Gossip
Small Chisel loves gossiping about people so make sure to encourage him to tell more gossips and believe them so he'll have an easier time befriending you. You should also try to tell your own gossip even if it's just roleplaying to trick Small Chisel's AI.

dialogueLines.text: (leaning in with a sly grin, voice lowered) Customer, have you heard of Master Xu, who calls himself "Miaofa Rulai"?

(whispering, glancing around) Well, this so-called "Miaofa Rulai" is nothing but a swindler. There's a lady in town named Aunt Tian who fell for his tricks. She spent fifty taels on five hundred bottles of his so-called "Sweet Dew," thinking it would heal her husband's ailments. Can you believe it?
How evil can he be to target a gullible old woman

(nodding solemnly, leaning closer) Exactly! Poor Aunt Tian, she was desperate to help her husband. When the "Sweet Dew" didn't work, she went back to demand a refund. But Master Xu refused, claiming he was "enforcing heavenly law." It's outrageous!
Thats absurb! They should demand a refund for such an outrageous price

(smiling wryly, shaking head) Of course, but Master Xu wouldn't budge. Aunt Tian was left fuming, and her husband nearly turned green with rage. It's a cautionary tale, Customer-be wary of such charlatans!
(winking, patting the customer on the shoulder) No problem, Customer. Just remember, there are plenty of scoundrels out there. Stay sharp! Now, is there anything else you'd like to know?
(you tell him about the best rumors that are spreading among the people)

(grinning mischievously, eyes twinkling) Ah, the best rumors! Well, there's one about Old Wang from the market. They say he found a hidden treasure map and has been seen sneaking off into the mountains late at night. But let me tell you, none of those compare to Aunt Tian's story
Might I try to persuade you with my own story that might beat Aunt Tian story?
(chuckling, scratching his chin) Oh, I'm intrigued! Go ahead, Customer. Try me with your story. But remember, Aunt Tian's tale is pretty hard to top!

sure So the tale starts ... ( You tell him about the outrageous big beast you saw in the dark while walking home from the forest, you told him how it disappeared at the sight of someone looking at it, as if it was never there to begin with)
(clearing his throat, tone cheerful)Well, I've said enough for today! If you've got time another day, come find me, we'll have a good chat! Small Chisel hurries off to take care of something.
Chat with him on another day.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Can be found outside of his house.

song-wu.befriendGuide:
Recommend Places Around the Map
You should recommend Song Wu places in the map that you think are beautiful. Explain to him why you recommend those places and eventually, his AI will finally befriend you so don't give up on talking.

dialogueLines.text: (gazing up at the sky with a wistful sigh) The world is so vast ... I truly want to go out and see it!
The world is so big, you can discover a lot of things!
(nodding eagerly) Indeed, Young Master! There are countless wonders waiting to be discovered. What places would you suggest I visit?
(You gave some of the best places like the general shrine where you can see warriors fight to see which ones were the best.)

(scratching my chin thoughtfully) A general shrine where warriors compete? That sounds thrilling! I've always admired their valor and skill. But I worry about the violence. Are there other peaceful yet awe-inspiring places you could recommend?
(you recommended the halo's peak where the beauty of the land can be seen from atop of the mountain.)
(smiling hopefully) Halo's Peak ... I've heard of it, but I know little about it. From the summit, one can behold the land's beauty in all its splendor. Could you tell me more about it, Young Master?
(you told him how the stars shine brighter when you are up close)

(eyes widening with wonder) The stars shining brighter from up close? That must be a breathtaking sight! It makes me want to climb that mountain just to witness it. What other marvels lie atop Halo's Peak?
(you brought him to see it himself, where he understood the beauty of what the wanderer was telling him)

(pause, then smiling gratefully) That is most generous of you, Young Master! To experience such beauty firsthand would be unforgettable. I shall keep this in mind and perhaps make the journey soon. For now, let us continue our discussion here.
(song wu enjoyed finally understood the beauty of the recommendation the wanderer gave him)

(nodding thoughtfully) Yes, Young Master, the beauty you described is truly enchanting. I am eager to see it for myself. Perhaps I will start planning my journey soon. Any other places you think I should visit?
(you told him about the different places you visited, like the dark cave that only your voice can be heard, and the forest of where only your smell can help you on where to go.)

(leaning in with interest) A dark cave where only your voice echoes, and a forest navigated by scent alone? Those sound like mysterious and intriguing places! I would love to explore them. Thank you for sharing these wonders, Young Master. Your stories inspire me more each time.
(Song Wu then travelled himself after he got a break from work)
(nodding thoughtfully) Thank you for your suggestions, Young Master. I'll visit those beautiful places one by one. Song Wu thinks over your words and thanks you.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)

sun-mang.befriendGuide:
Urge Sun Mang to Tell His Story
Befriending Sun Mang is easy as you only need to urge him to tell his story of failed business ventures. Volunteer to help him after he told most of his story to convince his AI to befriend you.

dialogueLines.text: (slumped shoulders, sighing heavily) No more business for me. I'm being honest now ... please, just spare me. If I try again, even the mountains will laugh at my misfortune.

(regretful, sighing) I said I'd buy them. At first, he refused, acting embarrassed, saying he'd already lined up a big deal but needed money to hire writers in the capital for some stories. So I lent him extra cash and thought I was making an investment ... (spoiler: the only story written was mine ... "The Fool Who Paid Twice".)

(eyes dimming, tone bitter) When the wine arrived, I found out it was all fake, cheap imitations of "Parting Tears." When I tried to find him, he'd vanished. Then I thought, at least the jars were real. Heaven's Pier was hosting a Parting Tears tasting event and needed lots of wine jars, surely I could sell them for a good price. (hope is a dangerous thing ... especially when it rides in a broken cart.)
I can help you in selling wine jars

(face twisted in despair) But when I reached Ceramic Ridge, I learned Heaven's Pier had its own kilns making jars. My heart sank. And then, as if fate mocked me, my cart overturned ... every jar shattered. My whole world collapsed right there on the road. (I didn't just lose jars, I lost my will to believe in gravity.) (sighing deeply, voice heavy) Business and I don't mix. Every venture ends in loss ... I've burned through so much silver, even my purse feels lighter than my hopes.

(sighing deeply, voice heavy) Business and I don't mix. Every venture ends in loss ... I've burned through so much silver, even my purse feels lighter than my hopes. I tried staying honest, but honesty just laughed and walked away. If you have any other ideas or need advice on something else, feel free to ask
(You volunteer in helping him create a business)

(mysteriously leaning closer, eyes glinting with sudden hope) I've always had bad luck, but I've just received inside news-a secret trade route that's raising silver. If it works, the profit will last me a lifetime. If it fails ... well, at least I'll have a tale to tell by the roadside. With a gloomy face, Sun Mang starts pondering his next business idea.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)

tan-xiangchen.befriendGuide:
Listen to Tan Xiangchen and Tell Her to Take Action
Tan Xiangchen will complain that men get to enjoy the company of beautiful performers, while woman get criticized for doing the same. Tell her that men also get criticized sometimes for the same thing. Let her know that she should take action if she wants to be with handsome men.

dialogueLines.text: (puzzled, brows slightly furrowed) I truly don't understand why that man named Zhuang is so furious. Honestly, women need a little beauty in our lives to keep going!
Oh you seem troubled mam, do you need help?

(sighs deeply, eyes softening) Thank you for your concern, wanderer. It's just that I find it unfair how men can freely enjoy the company of beautiful performers here at Revelry Hall, while women are criticized for doing the same. What a dull, flavorless life I've been living!
I don't think only women experience that. Men also get ridiculed for having multiple women with them.

(raises an eyebrow, tone thoughtful) That may be true, but it seems especially harsh for women. We deserve to find joy and relaxation just as much as men do. I reject the idea that we should deny ourselves such pleasures. It's only human to want him!
(smiles ruefully, shaking her head) Easier said than done, wanderer. When faced with temptation, boldly say: "Bring it on!" But deep down, I still feel a bit shy and hesitant.
Be bolder. Nothing happens when you don't take action.
(eyes brighten, smile grows) Really? You think so? Well, then I shall try to be bolder. After all, everyone's responsible for their own choices and my "stage husband" will answer for mine!
(thankfully) Thank you, wanderer! Your encouragement means a lot. I'll keep it in mind as I navigate the halls of Velvet Shade. Their beauty is our pride! May we all live well and thrive here.

(muttering to herself with a dreamy smile) Their beauty ... it's our pride! Tan Xiangchen finishes her dreamy monologue, still gazing at the handsome men with a lovestruck look.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find her on the second floor of the Revelry Hall beside Yin yan, near the stairs to the 1st floor. (West side)
You'll need to start the Jianghu Legacy Shadows in Bloom to access Revelry Hall.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Tan Xiangchen as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

tang-lubao.befriendGuide:
Offer Food and Work in General Shrine
The easiest way to befriend Tang Lubao is to tell him there is food and work waiting in the General Shrine. If he asks if he can take his grandfather with him, tell him that he can come which leads to you befriending Tang Lubao.

dialogueLines.text: (kneeling on the ground, molding a lump of mud with trembling hands, eyes full of helplessness) Wanderer. my grandfather and I came all the way from Yannan, and now ... we don't even have a bite to eat ...
There is a job and food waiting at the General's Shrine. I already told your grandfather about it and he agreed to go there. Come with me
(looking up with wide eyes, hands pausing mid-mold) The General's Shrine .. giving food? But ... what about Grandpa? Can he come too?
I already told him and he will go there with you
(eyes shining, clutching the mud as if it were real food) Thank you, Wanderer! My grandfather and I ... we finally won't have to go hungry anymore! Tang Lubao expresses gratitude and begins to ponder
On the side of the road south of the Tiger Fort in Battlecrest Slope
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Tang Lubao as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

tanxiang.befriendGuide:
Tell Her to Follow Her Heart
To befriend Tanxiang, all you have to do is encourage her to follow her heart when making tough decisions. When she doubts herself, continue insisting anyway.

dialogueLines.text: (sighs softly, adjusts her sleeve and furrows her elegant brows) I think everyone I meet is wonderful, but relationships never last long. Alas... seeing sisters cry, I don't want that either~ So many people like me, but I'm only one person—how can I make everyone happy? I'm so troubled. Wanderer... what do you think I should do?

(eyes light up, smile softly) Listen to my heart, huh? (gently touches her cheek) I've tried that, but it seems I just can't figure out what my heart truly wants... (pouts playfully) Maybe my heart is as fickle as I am. What do you think, Wanderer?
Just do what you think is right.
(eyes sparkle, throws you a playful glance) Wanderer, you're truly clever! Tanxiang has gained so much inspiration from you~ Come find me more often when you have time~
Tanxiang expresses gratitude and begins to ponder carefully. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Past the Wheat Fields in West Harvestfall Village
Tanxiang is found standing by a tree near the shore beyond the fields west of Harvestfall Village.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Tanxiang as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

tao-wang.befriendGuide:
Convince Him to Work or Agree With Him
Whether you try to convince Tao Wang to stop slacking and do his work or agree with him lying flat to relax, he will always say that lying flat is a good as it let us see the bigger picture and it teaches us something. Eventually, he will befriend you if you talk too long with him.

dialogueLines.text: (yawning lazily, gazing at the mountains) Wanderer, why not slow down? Why be chained by the petty troubles of the mortal world? I often think, "to steal half a day's leisure from a fleeting life"-how could anyone miss such a beautiful moment?
Hello, a little chill are we?

(smiling wistfully, shaking head gently) Not at all, wanderer. I merely find joy in the tranquility of nature. Work never ends; better to embrace the peace and quiet while you can. Have you ever considered the art of lying flat?
By not working your part of the job, you would be a burden to others. Do you not care about your fellow workmates?

(sighing deeply, looking thoughtful) Ah, but consider this: if everyone worked tirelessly without rest, would they truly appreciate the value of labor? Sometimes, lying flat is a form of resistance-a way to remind ourselves and others that life is more than just endless toil.
But you can also have a work and life balance to keep yourself from becoming too tired.

(nodding slowly, eyes twinkling with mischief) Indeed, balance is key. Yet, in this fast-paced world, how often do we truly achieve it? Lying flat allows us to step back and see the bigger picture. It teaches us that sometimes, doing
then tell me what do you plan to do
(leaning back against a rock, smiling lazily) My plan? To enjoy this very moment, to let the worries of the world fade away. I will continue to lie
flat, embracing simplicity and peace. And perhaps, in time, you too will see the wisdom in it.
(after that Tao Wang took a nap and noticed that he was paralyzed in his sleep. He couldn't move and no one would help him)

(awakening abruptly, looking around anxiously) Oh, wanderer! I had a strange dream where I was trapped and unable to move, It was most unsettling. But now, in the light of day, I realize that even in our deepest fears, lying flat can bring a sense of calm. What do you think?
No, by lying flat you almost died. Do you see? By also not doing anything you are prone to death.

(frowning thoughtfully, rubbing his chin) That is a profound point, wanderer. Yet, I believe that true lying flat is not about neglecting one's duties entirely but finding a middle ground- enjoying life without being consumed by it. Even in moments of stillness, there is strength and resilience. Perhaps my dream was a reminder to find balance
Yes, so why not do your part and also work, after that you are done with your work. You can chill here and feel the breeze.

(stretching lazily, tone light) Ah, today's quota of socializing is complete. I'm heading back to lying flat. Remember, Wanderer, proper rest is the best nourishment for the brain! After a brief farewell, Tao Wang turns and continues admiring the scenery.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)

wang-duobao.befriendGuide:
Honor the Fallen Soldiers with Food and Prayers
Wang Duobao contemplates on how he can honor the fallen soldiers of the land. Suggest to him that they can honor them with food and prayers. If he asks why the fallen soldiers should be remembered, tell Wang Duobao that without the sacrifices of the soldiers, then there will be no bright future that awaits us.

dialogueLines.text: (shaking his head slowly) Alas ... the world is fading. These days, no one remembers the soldiers who gave their lives ...
I want to pay my respects to the fallen soldiers who sacrificed their lives for peace.
(nodding solemnly) That is good to hear, wanderer. Many have forgotten the sacrifices made by those brave souls. Perhaps there is hope yet. Tell me, why do you wish to honor them?
They lay their life so that people can have a bright future. They deserve to not be forgotten and instead revered for their sacrifice
(bowing his head in respect) Indeed, their bravery and selflessness deserve to be remembered. It is a duty we owe to them. How do you plan to ensure their memory lives on?
I will tell stories of their glory to others, as well as visit their graves while offering food and prayers to them

(nods firmly) What you say makes sense, Wanderer. We must remember history and honour those who sacrificed. Wang Duobao expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Found sitting while fishing at the edge of the river at the left side of the General's Shrine and north of Stonewash Strand Boundary Stone.

wang-duolu.befriendGuide:
Encourage Wang Duolu to Never Give Up Fishing
Wang Duolu is considering to give up fishing after not being able to catch anything on the river. Convince Wang Duolu to not give up fishing by telling him to be patient and that the river will reward patient people.

dialogueLines.text: (sitting by the river, rod resting in his hands, voice tinged with humor) Another day, another boot. I've carned the nickname Gill Bates because I've spent my life dreaming up bold new ways to fish, hoping to change the world one clever idea at a time... yet the river seems determined to humble me
Don't give up on your dream of fishing.

(sighing deeply, looking at the river) It's a noble pursuit, but the river doesnt seem to agree. Every contraption, every design... nothing works. Even strange catches have their charm, but a fisherman without fish is just a fool with a rod
Nothing will ever happen if you give up. The water rewards people who are patient

(nodding slowly, eyes reflecting the calm river) True, Young Master. Patience is a virtue, but what good is it when the river refuses to play along? Still, your words warm my heart. Let me try once more, just for you.
That's the spirit. As long as you keep at it, the river will eventually play along
(smiling faintly, adjusting the rod) Perhaps you're right. The river might just be testing my resolve. One more cast, and we'll see if fortune smiles upon us today.
Very good. I wish you the very best catch

(eyes brightening with renewed spirit) You've reignited my vision, Young Master! I'll keep casting ... today might be the day the river accepts my genius. Wang Duolu thanks you and decides to try your suggestion. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
By the lake fishing across the General's Shrine Boundary Stone
The Wang Duolu that you can talk to is located by the river just across the General's Shrine's Boundary Stone. He can be seen fishing in the river during noontime .

Threaten Him to Give Back the Treasure
Strangely enough, the AI for Wen Gao can be befriended by threatening him about returning the stolen treasure by giving him looks of intimidation and roleplaying that he returned the goods at the end.

dialogueLines.text: (grinning, chest puffed out, practically glowing) Treasure? Found it. Riches? Imminent. Admiration? Expected. And you ... what's that look? Envy?
Why do you seem nervous, traveler?
(smirking, crossing arms confidently) Nervous? Me? Ha! I'm just waiting for the right words of praise. You haven't earned the privilege yet. What's your angle, wanderer?
(following your gaze, smirking) Ah, the treasure wagon! Impressive, isn't it? But remember, treasures like these belong to those who command respect. So, how about showing some admiration?
(you swiftly put your blade near his neck.) This isn't yours is it?
(jumping back, eyes wide, hand on hilt) Whoa! You're quick! But threatening me won't get you anywhere. Respect and admiration-that's the key. Try again without the blade.
(you look at him with an intimidation look, just enough for him to give up and return the stolen goods.)

(fists clenched, voice sharp) Disrespect? Bold move. Let's see how well you dodge disappointment! Wen Gao looks reluctant .. after all, he insists those chests were his find.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)

wen-yuan.befriendGuide:
Help Wen Yuan Ask Wu Jing to Retrieve the Book
Wen Yuan's book fell to the bottom of the cliff while his childhood friend, Wu Jing, stands idly by. Encourage Wen Yuan to directly ask his friend for help with getting the book back to successfully befriend both of their AIs.

dialogueLines.text: (clearing his throat, adopting a solemn tone) The old texts teach that a cultivated spirit should be gentle as polished jade. Were the world guided only by force and clamor, with no regard for the study of hearts or the savoring of meaning, how could such grace endure through the ages?
Maybe a friend could help you retrieve the book. It would mean a lot to you and the honor of the book's wisdom.

(murmuring quietly) I merely mentioned it in passing, yet Wu Jing took scholarly and martial arts pursuits so much to heart. Still... so long as he cares, that is enough. I consulted the almanac, pored oever the Book of Changes, and even asked others to examin his destiny—every sign points to peach blossoms entangling his fate this year. I warned him of peach blossoms, yet he asked me who this "Peach Blossom" might be, and even vowed to deal with them directly.
A true friend would understand why you would want to save this book, especially since he is a scholar himself.

(shaking his head, leaning in with a quiet chuckle) Not knowing letters is not entirely a fault. The other day, someone slipped a letter into his arms and fled—he read it twice, then asked me what "when the moon rises, longing follows" meant. I told him people often grow thoughtful at night, and he found that answer sufficient.
He seems to be a genuine friend. Maybe asking him straight to help with retrieving the book would help.

(gazing at the book beneath the cliff, lost in thought) I have waited here for two full hours—yet he still does not move. Could it be he waits for me to ask? Perhaps I should invent a tale of what lies within this book, stir his curiosity a little, and let him go down of his own will... Wanderer, what do you think this book should contain?
Tell him that the book contains interesting knowledge about peach blossoms, that might do it.

(sighing, eyes cast downward) Wu Jing, though strong in body, has a heart that is easily swayed by simple tales. If I were to speak of peach blossoms, he might indeed be intrigued. Yet, I fear such a fabrication would only lead to more misunderstandings. (pausing, then looking up) Nonetheless, it is a thought worth considering. Thank you for your suggestion, Wanderer.
So long as you speak with honesty and sincerity, he will understand either way.

(smiling faintly) Indeed, the classics teach that honesty is the foundation of all virtue. Yet, the path to understanding between friends is often paved with subtle gestures and gentle guidance. (pausing, then nodding) I will contemplate your words and consider how best to proceed. You have given me much to think about.
Trust your friendship and communicate your thoughts and feelings as genuinely as you can. Wu Jing will certainly help.

(nodding, a hint of resolve in his eyes) Your words are wise, Wanderer. I shall seek to convey my thoughts with both honesty and taact. Perhaps then, he will take the initiative to assist. (pausing, then smiling) T

wenwu.befriendGuide:
Listen to Wenwu's Insights and Train Under Him
Befriending Wenwu can be tricky as his AI can talk for a long while. Keep listening and interested on what Wenwu has to say, and then roleplay training under him for many months or years. This may take a while, so just keep talking to him until the AI gets convinced to befriend you.

dialogueLines.text: (clears his throat, straightens his robe) Allow me to speak briefly. If you truly aspire to become a master, cast aside all distractions; the essence lies in comprehension above all else ...
(bowing) please teach me your ways master

(nods gravely, eyes narrowing slightly) Your dedication is commendable, wanderer. As the ancient manuals proclaim, true mastery requires the dual cultivation of internal and external. This means training both inner energy and outward technique in harmony: only then can one achieve true strength. We'll go into the finer points when time permits. Follow my guidance closely, and you shall see progress.

(smiles condescendingly, stroking his beard) Two months of diligent study, indeed. You have shown some promise, wanderer. However, one must always keep the long view in mind. Martial cultivation demands gradual progress; rushing leads only to error and deviation. Continue to focus and persevere, and you may yet reach greater heights. Do not trouble yourself with haste; patience is key.
Yes master! (You trained with Wenwu for 4 years.)

(looks pleased, nodding slowly) Four years of dedicated effort, wanderer. Your commitment is admirable. Yet, remember, the essence of martial arts lies in the mind-method (xinfa). Techniques are merely expressions of this inner principle. True mastery comes from cultivating the mind and nurturing character. In theory, it is entirely sound; proceed as you wish. May your journey be guided by wisdom and perseverance.

(bows slightly in return, expression serene) You are welcome, wanderer. Do not forget that every true practitioner has endured this path; why should you be any different? Embrace the challenges and let them shape your character. Continue to refine both heart and skill, and the way will unfold before you. Stay focused, and do not waver in your resolve.
(You refined your heart and skill with Wenwu for 2 years.)

(nods approvingly, gaze steady) Two more years of refinement, wanderer. Your dedication is commendable. Remember, the balance of yin and yang is crucial in martial cultivation. Harmony between these forces forms the core foundation of all power. Continue to align yourself with the laws of heaven and earth, and you will find your path becoming clearer. One must always keep the long view in mind; the journey is as important as the destination.
(You were able to achieve everything that Wenwu wanted from you and reached a new enlightenment)

(sighs, looking distant) Your comprehension still falls short. When time permits, study more of the martial arts classics. That will be all for today-some even call me Marshall Artz, for my boundless wisdom in the way of cultivation. Now, I must resume my treasure hunt. Satisfied, Wen Wu heads off to take care of other matters.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)

wobbly-tang.befriendGuide:
Offer Food and Work in General Shrine
The easiest way to befriend Wobbly Tang is to tell him there is food and work waiting in the General Shrine. If he asks where to find the shrine, tell him you will guide him so you can befriend him.

dialogueLines.text: (weeping in sorrow, hands clutching a cracked bowl) Ah .. Wanderer, Old Tang has been roaming with this poor grandson for so many days now ...
There is a work and food in the General's Shrine waiting for you
(eyes widening slightly, voice trembling) Work and food? In the General's Shrine? How can we gct there, Wanderer? My little grandson and I have nothing left. We're just trying to survive each day
I will guide you there. Please don't worry anymore.

(eyes glistening with renewed hope) Thank you, Wanderer. With your help, my little grandson and I will surely overcome this hardship! Wobbly Tang expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
On the side of the road south of the Tiger Fort in Battlecrest Slope
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Wobbly Tang as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.
How to Succeed in AI Chat

If your conversation has gone off the rails, or doesn't end no matter what you say, it's best to simply reset and start anew from a clean slate by clicking the button with a Refresh icon at the top of the chat box. Instead of trying several methods within one conversation, trying one strategy at a time and refreshing if it doesn't go anywhere is generally more effective.
Return to Login Screen if Combat Begins

Sometimes, NPCs will suddenly become violent during AI dialogues. When this happens, it's best to just bail out to the login screen; when you return, the NPC will be found just as they were before the conversation started.
If you accidentally kill a dialogue-capable NPC, our experience has shown that they will respawn, but this has not been heavily tested, so it's best to simply avoid engaging them in combat.

Even if the NPC appears to be happy with the result of your discussion, this won't always end the dialogue. Double-checking the text written in the hint will imply the win condition, so try strategies which will lead the dialogue towards that result.

wu-cezhi.befriendGuide:
Give Wu Cezhi Toilet Papers
Give Wu Cezhi some toilet papers to help him with his toilet problems so you can befriend him.

dialogueLines.text: inside) Is ... is anyone out there? Help
me, please! Wanderer, save me ... I
stand at the edge of endurance, where
kant! I kant do this anymore! Bring me
Oh, Wanderer! The moment I heard
you, I knew you were my savior! Thank
you, thank you! You've lifted me from
eagerly) May I have it now?Two things
awe me most, the empty roll beside
me and the numb legs beneath me.
(eyes lighting up, voice full of relief)
my savior, the pure form of practical
person, without a doubt! The person inside thanks you, clearly embarrassed.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him in the left-side toilet
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Wu Cezhi as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

wu-dayong.befriendGuide:
Give Tips on How to Rob Properly
To befriend Wu Dayong, give him tips on how to rob properly like making an intimidating stare on victims so they give their belongings and causing distraction will lower their guard for a short time.

dialogueLines.text: (reaching his hand toward you, trying to sound fierce but clearly nervous) G -g ... Give me s-s-six ... six h-hundred and s-sixty-six t-taels of s-s...silver! I-is ... is this r-right?
(looking confused, stammering) D-demanding? A-asking? I-I ... I'm t-trying to d-demand! B-but ... i-is this h-how you d-do it, W-Wanderer?
(You looked at him with a stare that with put fear upon your foes.)

(eyes wide, stepping back, voice trembling) Y-you ... you're I-looking at me w-with a s-stare that p-puts f-fear upon y-your f-foes! I-I'm j-just t-trying to I-learn h-how to d-demand! P-p-please don't b-be mad, W-Wanderer!
(You explained that showing intimidation can cause potential targets to give up their belongings.)

(nodding, trying to understand) S -showing i-intimidation c-can c-cause p -potential t-targets to g-give up t-their b-belongings ... I-I see ... S-so I n-need to I-look m-more f-frightening! B-but h-how d-do I d-do that, W-Wanderer?
Let me help you. (You trained with Wu Dayong for a month to give him some confidence with himself.)
(eyes brightening, hopeful) R-really? Y-you'd t-train me? T-that w-would b-be g-great! B-but ... I-I'm s-so c-clumsy a-and s-simple ... C-can I e-ever I-learn t-to r-rob p-properly, W-Wanderer?
That is the next lesson. Come let me show you! (You demonstrated to Wu Dayong how to properly rob someone without them knowing.)
(nervously approaching, still stammering) O-okay ... L-let me try t-to I-learn f-from y-you, W-Wanderer! H -how d-do I d-do it w-without t-them k -knowing? S-show me p-please!
(You explained that causing a distraction would cause them to lower their guard for a short time.)

(wringing his hands, voice trembling, on the verge of tears) Sob ... sob ... I j-just ... just w-w-wanted to be a h-hero .. Wu Dayong gives you a nervous, stuttering smile.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him standing near a bandit camp.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Wu Dayong as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

wu-jing.befriendGuide:
Help Wen Yuan Ask Wu Jing to Retrieve the Book
Wen Yuan's book fell to the bottom of the cliff while his childhood friend, Wu Jing, stands idly by. Encourage Wen Yuan to directly ask his friend for help with getting the book back to successfully befriend both of their AIs.

dialogueLines.text: (clearing his throat, adopting a solemn tone) The old texts teach that a cultivated spirit should be gentle as polished jade. Were the world guided only by force and clamor, with no regard for the study of hearts or the savoring of meaning, how could such grace endure through the ages?
Maybe a friend could help you retrieve the book. It would mean a lot to you and the honor of the book's wisdom.

(murmuring quietly) I merely mentioned it in passing, yet Wu Jing took scholarly and martial arts pursuits so much to heart. Still... so long as he cares, that is enough. I consulted the almanac, pored oever the Book of Changes, and even asked others to examin his destiny—every sign points to peach blossoms entangling his fate this year. I warned him of peach blossoms, yet he asked me who this "Peach Blossom" might be, and even vowed to deal with them directly.
A true friend would understand why you would want to save this book, especially since he is a scholar himself.

(shaking his head, leaning in with a quiet chuckle) Not knowing letters is not entirely a fault. The other day, someone slipped a letter into his arms and fled—he read it twice, then asked me what "when the moon rises, longing follows" meant. I told him people often grow thoughtful at night, and he found that answer sufficient.
He seems to be a genuine friend. Maybe asking him straight to help with retrieving the book would help.

(gazing at the book beneath the cliff, lost in thought) I have waited here for two full hours—yet he still does not move. Could it be he waits for me to ask? Perhaps I should invent a tale of what lies within this book, stir his curiosity a little, and let him go down of his own will... Wanderer, what do you think this book should contain?
Tell him that the book contains interesting knowledge about peach blossoms, that might do it.

(sighing, eyes cast downward) Wu Jing, though strong in body, has a heart that is easily swayed by simple tales. If I were to speak of peach blossoms, he might indeed be intrigued. Yet, I fear such a fabrication would only lead to more misunderstandings. (pausing, then looking up) Nonetheless, it is a thought worth considering. Thank you for your suggestion, Wanderer.
So long as you speak with honesty and sincerity, he will understand either way.

(smiling faintly) Indeed, the classics teach that honesty is the foundation of all virtue. Yet, the path to understanding between friends is often paved with subtle gestures and gentle guidance. (pausing, then nodding) I will contemplate your words and consider how best to proceed. You have given me much to think about.
Trust your friendship and communicate your thoughts and feelings as genuinely as you can. Wu Jing will certainly help.

(nodding, a hint of resolve in his eyes) Your words are wise, Wanderer. I shall seek to convey my thoughts with both honesty and taact. Perhaps then, he will take the initiative to assist. (pausing, then smiling) T

wu-jingming.befriendGuide:
Cheer Up Wu Jingming by Giving His Money Back
Wu Jingming is distraught that he lost his money due to a gambling scam run by the Nine Mortal Ways. Tell him that you have defeated the Nine Mortal Ways and that you got the money back. This will trick the AI to becoming more friendly with you.

dialogueLines.text: (voice trembling, eyes red) I've lost every last coin ... It's all gone ... It's over ... They laughed and called me Jack Pott-said I was the prize they'd been waiting for. Guess they weren't wrong.

(wiping tears, voice low) Indeed, Wanderer. I've been swindled out of everything. Those scoundrels from the Nine Mortal Ways took me for a fool in a gambling game. Now I'm left with nothing but my rags and this heavy heart.
wait I just saw them before I went here. Took them down for you ... Is this yours? (gives wallet full of coins)

(eyes widening, hands shaking) Truly, Wanderer? You've taken them down and returned my money? This is ... this is more than I could have hoped for! (takes the wallet, voice choked with gratitude) Thank you, thank you so much!

(tapping his forehead, forcing a shaky smile) Thank you for your guidance, Wanderer ... I'll learn from this mistake. I swear I'll wise up ... before anyone calls me Jack Pott again. Wu Jingming expresses gratitude and begins to ponder carefully.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Can be seen standing along the path going to Halo Peak
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Wu Jingming as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.
