wu-qiwan.befriendGuide:
Tell Wu Qiwan the Way Into Qinghe Bamboo Grove
Wu Qiwan is an NPC that wants to find his way into the Qinghe Bamboo Grove and find a master that will train him with new skills. Tell him that you are a student of the master hidden within the bamboo grove and that you will bring him into the master.

dialogueLines.text: (glancing around, scratching his head with frustration) This blasted forest is endless! I've been circling for hours and still can't find that legendary bamboo grove! Hah ... maybe that's why I started calling myself Barry Longway- because clearly, I've got a long way to go before I'm any kind of hero.
(Wu Qiwan sees you beat 3 bandits with a swift strike.)

(eyes widening slightly, then narrowing with suspicion) Well, well, look at that. You took down those bandits like they were nothing. Impressive, I suppose. But what's a skilled fighter like you doing in these woods? Don't tell me you're also looking for the bamboo forest? (scratches his chin, pondering) If I build a house here, does that mean I'm no longer lost?
Looking? I am already a student, I have been taught by the master here for more than 5 years already.

(leaning closer, intrigued but still skeptical) A student, huh? And you claim to have trained here for five years? (narrows his eyes) That's hard to believe. How come I haven't heard of you before? (flicks a piece of dirt off his boot) Maybe I should start singing, either a master finds me or a tiger does.
How can you know me if the school of the master is hidden and it was always in secret.

(sighs deeply, running a hand through his disheveled hair) Fair point. If the master keeps things secret, it makes sense I wouldn't know. But how do I find this place if no one talks about it? (grumbles) They say not all who wander are lost ... well, I definitely am.
You seem to have the potential, come with me.

(crosses arms, still wary) Potential or not, I'm not just gonna follow anyone blindly. What proof do you have that you really are a student here? (scowls) If I keep wandering like this, I'll qualify as Qinghe's first forest tour guide with no idea where I'm going.
(You brought him the place where the master is waiting for him.)

(eyes widen in surprise, then narrow again, still cautious) Wait, you actually brought me to the right place? (looks around skeptically) This could be a trick. (nods slowly) But ... if this is real, I owe you one. (grunts) I'm not lost ... I'm just aggressively exploring in the wrong direction.
(after a month, he was already a gifted student.)

(snorting, eyes lighting up with stubborn fire) Hmph! Maybe you're right, Wanderer ... maybe this path is the one. If it leads to that bamboo grove, I'Il find the master ... and if it doesn't, I'll just keep walking until the forest gives up before I do! Wu Qiwan expresses gratitude and begins to ponder carefully.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
He can be seen behind some tall grasses, near the edge of the cliff.
You can obtain a Travel Sa

xi-daozhi.befriendGuide:
Tell Him to Paint the Real Lu Yi Instead of How He Wants Her To Be
Xi Daozhi went overboard with the amount of beauty he painted for his beloved, Lu Yi. Give him advice to paint her as she truly is instead of how he imagines her to be, and receive a portrait of yourself as thanks for helping his AI out.

dialogueLines.text: (distracted and dejected) Lu Yi... Lu Yi... why won't you speak to me anymore? Could it be that I painted you too beautifully, made you doubt yourself? But to me, your beauty never needed comparison...
Your portrait of her shows how you perceive her. Maybe try asking how she feels?

(pleading earnestly) Wanderer, you must judge this fairly—Lu Yi and I were getting along just fine. Then one day, I told her she was the most beautiful person in the world, and that I would pour every once of my skill into painting the finest portrait for her! But...
Maybe she thinks that you like the idea of her and not who she truly is.

(sniffling) Ever since I handed her that painting, she hasn't spoken to me for an entire month... It must be because I painted it to perfectly—so perfect it made her feel shy, even overwhelmed! Or perhaps she keeps it hidden away, admiring it in secret? I don't know why she avoids me, but it has to be because of that painting... Wanderer, help me think—was it my painting?
It might be better to paint her as she is and not as you dream her to be.

(suddenly enlightened) Ah! I see it now—I was too lost in my own thoughts. Look here, this stall only holds my master's work, not a single piece of mine. How could you possibly judge my flaws from that? Very well! I'll paint you on the spot! Just wait—once others lay eyes on this portrait, people from every corner will be lining up to praise it!
(stay still to let him paint) remember, stick to the real thing and how you imagine it to be.

(focused on the canvas, brush strokes precise and confident) Wanderer, that elegant nose alone would turn heads all across Liangzhou—paired with my flawless brushwork, this piece is bound to be a feast for the eyes! I will capture you exactly as you are, with every sharp feature and commanding presence. Just a few more strokes, and it will be perfect.
That's how you should paint Lu Yi too.

(nodding thoughtfully) You make a good point, Wanderer. Perhaps I did get carried away with my own imagination, I will strive to pain Lu Yi just as she is, with all her unique qualities. (resumes painting, eyes shining with determination) With just a few more storkes, this portrat will truly come to life.
You're welcome! Now go talk to her and she'll see the improvements.

(clicking tongue in admiration) Look at those brows, those lips—truly striking features! With just a few strokes from my hand, I preserve that extraordinary look forever. (pauses, brush in hand) But you're right, Wanderer. I need to talk to Lu Yi and show her the improvements. Thank you for your advice. Now, let me finish this masterpiece for you!

(nodding repeatedly, delighted) Yes, yes—magnificent! Still, perfection demand refinement. I'll adjust it again and again, until you see this painting and regret not meeting me sooner to be captured by my brush!
Xia Daozhi is furiously painting. Please wait a moment. (Affection +1

xi-gema.befriendGuide:
Motivate Him to Make Friends and Give Him a Gift
Xi Gema seems to be a lonely kid and is called weird by the people around him. Try to talk him through opening up and letting people get to know him better, then give him a gift at the end to finalize your friendship with his AI.

dialogueLines.text: (muttering to himself) I was broken from a young age, taking my sulking to the masses—hah! You made me a believer... yeah, you really did—believer, believer! (strikes an overdramatic hero pose)
I love your hero pose! But heroes have friends too! Have you tired opening up to anyone yet? It may help you feel stronger!

(arms clasped behind back, suddenly breaks into a dash) Whoa—sorry, wanderer, my mind was somewhere else just now! Guess I've been running on split paths, living two lives, trying to play both sides, never really finding my own place—oh! Called a problem child 'cause I got too wild, but hey, that's just how someone like me survives. (pauses, then pouts) But you know, sometimes I wonder if opening up might just make me weaker.
I'm travelling the world to explore and meet all sorts of people. You must have a lot of fascinating stories to share!

(hands on hips) Players are gonna play, haters are gonna hare, so I just shake it off—whoo! If someone like me stands alone, that's strength! (smirk) Besides, what stories could a little troublemaker like me have that would interest you? I just do my own thing, wandering around and making my own path.
There is still strength in having friends! It means more experiences and more adventures.

(pouting, eyes narrowed) Don't you want me like I want you, huh? Don't you need me like I need you now? Saying tomorrow can wait, tonight's the moment—so what's the move, or are you just pretending to not care? (crosses arms) I've got my own path, and I'm not sure I need anyone to come along.
I do want to be your friend! Everything about you matters, and friendship is not about what I can gain from you.

(glances aside, pretending calm) Everyone's swapping gifts now, flashing shingy things like trophies, but whatever—let it go, I won't cry, I'll stand right here and stay right here, storms and all... none of that ever bothered me anyway. (sighs) But you know, it's not about what you can get from me. It's about whether I even want to let anyone in.
(give a gift to Xi Gema) Here, a testament of my commitment to a friendship with you!
(eyes light up) you really want to give me something? What is it, what is it—! (catches himself) Cough. I mean, it's not like I want it that much.
(pretends to be calm) really? cough cough... since you insist on giving it, I suppose Xi Gema can reluctantly accept.
Xi Gema runs away, singing "Lone Warrior." (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Xi Gema can be found southeast of the Chalic Peak boundary stone near the edge of the water.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Xi Gema as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu

xiang-the-greedy.befriendGuide:
Praise Xiang the Greedy's Rapping Skills and Promote His Art
Praise Xiang the Greedy's freestyling skills and tell him that he will make it big. After that, roleplay that you are promoting him throughout the Moonveil Mountains to make him befriend you.

dialogueLines.text: (salutes, then freestyles with swagger) Yo, yo! The name's Dee Lusion, born to spit fusion-rhymes so tight they spark a revolution! Verse check-one, two ... and forty-two! They say my art's too wild, but I'm the fiercest wordsmith in Qinghe! Uh-huh, feel that rhythm? You ready to witness greatness, or just here to taste the flow?
Yo! You got some fire bars man.
(grins wide, nods) Fire bars, that's me! My rhymes light up the night, like sparks from a forge. What brings you to my corner of the street? Ready to hear more
You know, I can see you performing within a large stage! Full of fans chanting your name bro!

(eyes widen, pounds chest) A full stage, fans chanting my name? That's the dream! I know my art's worth it, even if folks around here ain't seen it yet. You believe in me, that means a lot. Maybe we can build this together
Yes we can bro! (You helped him promote his art throughout the masses, which helped him become popular all over moonveil mountain.)

(beats chest, voice booming like a drum) Yo! You felt my flame, and Dee Lusion stays in the game! If your day feels heavy, remember this thunder- someone from your homeland still dreams of rhymes that strike like lightning's wonder! That's me, baby! I'll blaze till the stars chant my name! Xiang the Greedy reflects on your words and bows in gratitude.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Can be seen beside numerous large containers.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Xiang the Greedy as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

xu-lijun.befriendGuide:
Ask Xu Lijun What Brought Her to the Revelry Hall
The key to success on befriending Xu Lijun is patience. Ask her why she went to the Revelry Hall first, and once she answers, she will ask you different questions. Just answer them truthfully which might take long as she will chat with you alot. Don't worry as this is the way to befriend her.

dialogueLines.text: unfamiliar, lei. Are you new here? I don'
t think I've seen you around before, o!
Why yes! Can you tell me a bit more about this place
la! It's a place to unwind and forget
about all the strict training back at the
Masked Troupe. Well, since we're here,
let's just enjoy the show. Life is a vast
Oh so is the heroic assembly the same as this place?
quite, la! The Heroic Assembly is more
formal and serious, filled with martial

ya-zhou.befriendGuide:
Keep Listening to Ya Zhou's Stories
Tell Ya Zhou that you will listen to his stories and just keep letting him talk. Urge him to share more of his stories, and if he asks the reason you came to Qinghe, tell him that you came to listen to old man's stories.

dialogueLines.text: (sighing deeply, voice tinged with grief) Back then, after the general was defeated, the boatman who ferried supplies with me was captured and killed. I carried his belongings and knocked on his door ...
Hey! Can you tell me more about your past? I am very intrigued.

(Both of you sat down and you listened to his stories.)
(sadness welling in his eyes) His body trembled, tears streaming down his face. In that moment, through those eyes, I saw another sorrowful child.
(you both grab a drink and you listened to his stories for the whole night.)
(voice trembling, gaze distant) When I was his age, I too received my father's clothes from a stranger ... and I knew then, I would never wait for him to return home again.
(slowly shaking his head, gaze still distant) Those memories are heavy, but they remind me why I continue to serve the general and ferry supplies. What brings you to Qinghe, Wanderer?
I came to listen to an old man stories
(nodding slowly, a gentle smile forming) There are many tales to be told here in Qinghe. Some bring joy, others sorrow. Would you like to hear more about the river and the people who depend on it?
Gladly! (You listened to his stories for the whole night.)

(lifting his head slightly, voice heavy with longing) This endless cycle of fate in troubled times ... when will it break? May every child who opens a door in hope see their father return safely. Ya Zhou falls silent and lets out a long sigh.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him standing at the docks.

yan-momo.befriendGuide:
Hear Yan Momo's Story About Her Mother
You'll find Yan Momo trying to find a flower under a tree, as she believes the flower that she'll find is her mother. Hear out Yan Momo's story and tell her you found the spot where she can get the flower to befriend her.

dialogueLines.text: (kneeling among blossoms, gently brushing petals) This one ... still not perfect. Wanderer. have you ever seen the most beautiful flower in the world?
Why yes! Just north of here, there is a mountain that sprouts a single flower each year and its beauty is nothing in comparison.

(sighing softly, gaze distant) My mother loved flowers more than anything, yet she always called herself a 'pothos woman'-plain, never beautiful enough. She only wished to be as simple and full of life as the humble pothos.
but even a pothos can be gorgeous to a different people.

(voice lowering, eyes glistening) Years of toil wore her down. She fought illness for so long, but that winter ... she couldn't hold on. Before she left, she told me not to cry ... that she would become the pothos by my window to keep me company. I told her, in her next life, she must bloom as a radiant flower, not fade away like a forgotten vine. She smiled and nodded.
(you showed her a beautiful flower that may remind her of her mother)

(hope rekindled, tone soft yet firm) So now, in every season, whenever I miss her, I wander these hills and fields, searching for that one perfect bloom. Thank you for showing me this flower. It does bring back memories of my mother.

(eyes brightening, a smile forming) Truly? Could you lead me there? Perhaps the most beautiful flower in the world awaits us.

yelu-longxian.befriendGuide:
Listen to His Problems
To befriend Yelu Longxian, simply listen to his rant about being scammed repeatedly by the Nine Mortal Ways. Toward the end of the conversation, tell him to be careful with his dealings next time.

dialogueLines.text: (eyes wide with indignation) Hey! Wanderer, wait a moment... were you the one handing out red envelopes on the street yesterday? Yours truly went to grab one, and they told me I had to put money in it! I lost five hundred coins just like that!

(yawns, waving a hand dismissively) Indeed, it is! But that's not even the worst part. Yours truly has only been in Kaifeng for a few days, and already I've been swindled more times than I can count. Your merchant guilds here—rude, ruthless, and absolutely shameless!
I'm not from around here either.

(leans in, lowering his voice) Well, that's lucky for you, then! Just a few days ago, I bought what I thought was flour and salt from a local guild. On the way back, my subordinate took a taste and said, “Boss, this doesn't taste right!” Turns out it was lime powder! How could it possibly taste right?

(sighs, shaking his head) And then there are those signs on the road promising beautiful sights. I came to the Central Plains for scenery and beauties—how could I resist? But every single one led to mud pits and traps! I nearly lost my life chasing a view!

(throws up his hands, helplessly) Another day, I met someone claiming to be Well of Heaven Elder and Elder Raging Tides. Thought they were from some famous sect, so I went to check it out. Turns out it was the Nine Mortal Ways! They made me an honorary elder, then charged me to quit! I was furious!
Maybe you shouldn't trust people so easily.

(grits his teeth, voice rising) Damn it! Just talking about the Nine Mortal Ways makes my blood boil! Last time, I saw a man begging on the street. I gave him some coins out of kindness, only to see him drinking at Revelry Hall moments later! Asked around, and guess what? It was the Nine Mortal Ways! That beggar had better taste than me!

(stands up, pacing angrily) Isn't that enough? I later found out every single scam I fell for was their doing! That gang is everywhere! It's a new scam every day, and each one more ridiculous than the last!
Maybe you should do something about it.

(sits back down, rubbing his temples) What can I do? They seem to be everywhere, and no one seems to take me seriously. Maybe I'll just have to be careful from now on. But it's infuriating, I tell you!
Just be more careful next time.
(clenches his fists, voice rising with fury) Damn Nine Mortal Ways! If yours truly catches them next time, they'll regret ever crossing me!
Yelu Longxian takes a sip of wine and lets out a long, weary sigh. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
By the East Stairway on the Third Floor of Revelry Hall
Yelu Longxian is seated by a table on the third floor of Revelry Hall, near the eastern stairway where a long queue of people can be found right beside him.
You'll need to start the Jianghu Legacy Shadows in Bloom t

yu-songfeng.befriendGuide:
Give 5000 Zhou
Ask Yu Songfeng about how he got a comfortable life with Li Yueniang and he will ask you to give 5000 Zhou first before he tells you. Roleplay giving him 5000 Zhou in order to befriend him.

dialogueLines.text: (seriously) Even in my youth, I understood the sweet art of living the easy life, gladly trading my prime for comfort. Wanderer, wouldn't you like to learn this secret from me?
Please! I want to know whats the secret of a good relationship

(smiling slyly) Ah, relationships, you say? Well, the key lies in understanding and mastering the art of giving and receiving. But truly, it's about finding that perfect balance of ease and harmony. For 5000 Zhou coins, I'll teach you the Soft Life Secrets that will make your life smoother than silk. How about it?
How about how you got the arrangement with your beloved?

(chuckles softly) My dear Yueniang and I have found our own way of living together. It's all about mutual respect and understanding. But if you wish to learn the secrets that make life easier, then 5000 Zhou coins will buy you this invaluable knowledge.
(gives a thumbs up) Wanderer, you're so straightforward! Yu Songfeng is willing to teach you-but he asks for a small fee.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
You can find him with his beloved Li Yueniang near the ferry station entrance.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Yu Songfeng as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.
How to Succeed in AI Chat

If your conversation has gone off the rails, or doesn't end no matter what you say, it's best to simply reset and start anew from a clean slate by clicking the button with a Refresh icon at the top of the chat box. Instead of trying several methods within one conversation, trying one strategy at a time and refreshing if it doesn't go anywhere is generally more effective.
Return to Login Screen if Combat Begins

Sometimes, NPCs will suddenly become violent during AI dialogues. When this happens, it's best to just bail out to the login screen; when you return, the NPC will be found just as they were before the conversation started.
If you accidentally kill a dialogue-capable NPC, our experience has shown that they will respawn, but this has not been heavily tested, so it's best to simply avoid engaging them in combat.

Even if the NPC appears to be happy with the result of your discussion, this won't always end the dialogue. Double-checking the text written in the hint will imply the win condition, so try strategies which will lead the dialogue towards that result.

yuan-sheng.befriendGuide:
Upset Him by Taking His Wine-scented Jade
To befriend Yuan Sheng, you need to upset him to snap him out of his arrogant behavior. He appears to respond to being grabbed (via action prompts) in the chat, and from there you can roleplay scolding him by taking away his Wine-scented Jade . The chat is successful when Yuan Sheng becomes upset with you.

dialogueLines.text: (arrogantly, with hands on hips) Listen up! Once I sell my precious Wine-scented Jade and become rich, you'll be polishing my shoes! Better start sucking up to me now!
(trying to wriggle free) Hey, let go! What are you doing? Can't you see I'm a big boss now? Let me go!
Do something better with your time.
(eyes narrowing, voice defensive) I'm not wasting my time! This Wine-scented Jade is my ticket to riches! You just don't understand!
(hands on hips, pouting) Even the teachers never taught this, how would I know?
Note: Whenever Yuan Sheng says this in the chat, this is your sign to come up with another response until Yuan Sheng finally reacts to your message.
Study well first before getting rich.
(pouting) I already know how to get rich! I just need to sell this jade. Studying is for old folks!
(hisses, smugly) No way! That Jade is mine! You won't get it from me, no matter what you do!
I'll steal it if you don't give it.
(eyes widening, voice cracking) You wouldn't dare! It's on the table, but you can't have it! It's mine! Mine!
(I take the jade from the table)
(crying loudly, voice cracking with emotion) You're mean! So mean! What kind of hero steals from kids?! Boohoohoo! Don't go! G-give me back my treasure!
Yuan Sheng scolds the young master in frustration and storms off in search of treasure. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Near Ye Buxiu's Chess Game Northwest of Blissful Retreat
Yuan Sheng is found outside the house where Ye Buxiu's chess game is located. It lies west of the path leading through Flower Expanse.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Yuan Sheng as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

yueniang.befriendGuide:
Give Encouragement to Yueniang
Convince Yueniang to send her husband a letter by giving her encouragement that any letter from her will be appreciated. Tell her that you will also deliver the letter to the husband which will cause her AI to befriend you.

dialogueLines.text: (bowing her head, tidying up the house, voice soft and worried) Sigh ... my husband is away with the army. I miss him so much, but ... I don't know if I should write him a letter ...
Hello friend, you seem a bit troubled. What is wrong?

(looking up, eyes filled with worry) Oh, Young Master. Thank you for asking. I am just very concerned about my husband who is serving in the army. I want to write him a letter, but I feel so unsure ...
(you gave her some encouraging words which helped her confidence a little bit)
(smiling faintly, a glimmer of hope in her eyes) Young Master, your words give me some comfort. But ... I still fear that my message might not reach him.
(You explained that her husband would love any letter coming from her)
(trembling, but determined) Yes, I believe my husband would cherish any news from me. But ... I worry about the dangers of war and the uncertainty of delivery.
(You told her that you are willing to go give it to him yourself as long as she writes the letter.)

(nods slightly, her eyes softening with relief) Thank you, Young Master. I ... I will find a way to send my thoughts to my husband and let him know how much I care. Yueniang reflects on your words and bows in gratitude.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
She can be seen cleaning her laundry by the river.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Yueniang as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

zhang-dazhuang.befriendGuide:
Recommend Spending Time with His Family
Befriend Zhang Dazhuang by mentioning that he needs to spend more time with his family and that if he overworks himself, he might not live long to see his family grow.

dialogueLines.text: (wiping sweat from his brow while working) Young Master, if I don't work, I feel uneasy all over. But my family keeps worrying I'll wear myself out. What should I do?
(You explained that even though he is working for his family, if he overworked himself he wouldn't live long enough to see them grow up.)

(nodding thoughtfully, eyes narrowing slightly) That's true, Young Master. A strong body is indeed the foundation for everything. If I push myself too hard, I might not be around to see my family thrive. Perhaps I should listen to their concerns and find a balance.
(You gave a recommendation of spending time with his family when he gets home, and only think about work the next day)
(scratching his chin, considering) Spending time with my family when I get home ... that sounds reasonable. It might help ease their worries and make me feel more settled. I'll try it, Young Master.
(After a month, he was able to fully adapt to a healthier work and life balance)
(eyes brightening as if struck by insight) Young Master, you speak reason! I'll surely think over your suggestion carefully. Zhang Dazhuang reflects on your words and bows in
Can be seen in front of the Fire-forced brewing

zhang-jiushu.befriendGuide:
Find and Give Him His Plummet
To befriend Zhang Jiushu, all you have to do is roleplay finding his lead plummet and give it to him. It is possible to parenthesize the action (like in the example below) to immediately befriend him without holding a conversation.

dialogueLines.text: (frowning deeply and letting out a heavy sigh) Alas... that lead plummet is nowhere to be found. This is truly troubling...
(I find and give him the plummet)

(nodding, a hint of relief in his voice) Thank you, Wanderer. You've done more than I expected. (leaning closer, whispering) To tell you the truth... inside the lead plummet, there's a piece of gold. It's precious...
Uncle Zhangjiu expresses gratitude and begins to ponder carefully. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Inside the House East of the West Heaven's Pier Boundary Stone
Zhang Jiushu is lying on the floor inside a house east of the West Heaven's Pier Boundary Stone.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Zhang Jiushu as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

zhang-shuazi.befriendGuide:
Play Three Rounds of a Dice Game with Him
To befriend Zhang Shuazi, all you have to do is go along with his chat-based game of dice. It does not matter if you win or lose. After the third dice game, you will successfully befriend him.

dialogueLines.text: (picks up the dice cup, covers the dice, winks at you) Guess big or small—heaven decides it all. If you don't guess, how can heaven arrange? So, Wanderer, how about a few rounds with me?

(grinning) I roll the dice, Wanderer guesses big or small. One, two, three points are small; four, five, six are big. If Wanderer guesses right, I, Zhang Shuazi, pay ten times your bet. Otherwise... hehe, this bet money stays with me~
(leans in, lowering his voice) For this first round, I'll treat it as making friends with Wanderer. Six coins—on me. No need to spend a single coin, just enjoy the game! Ready?
(excitedly tosses the dice cup) Underworld rules: once the bet's down, hands off. No changing your mind halfway. So tell me, Wanderer—will you bet big or small?

(eyes light up with excitement) Oh wow, first try and you nailed it! Tsk... Wanderer, seems the gambling god favors you today! You can't waste this luck—play a few more rounds! (picks up the dice cup again, covering the dice) How about it, Wanderer? Another round? Let's raise the stakes a little—66 coins. Same old rule: once the bet's down, hands off~
Note : You will be prompted to give Zhang Shuazi 66 coins . Submit the coins to resume the chat.
(shakes the dice cup hard, crisp rattling sounds echo) Big or small? This second round—has Wanderer made up your mind?

(waves hand quickly) Eh, just an accident! Don't panic, Wanderer—I, Zhang Shuazi, have seen plenty of this. Next round, you'll definitely win! What do you say? Shall we go again? Let's make it exciting—666 coins, all in one throw! Same rule: once the bet's down, hands off~
Note : Give Zhang Shuazi 666 coins to continue.

(slowly rotates the dice cup, voice full of suspense) Here it comes, here it comes~ This last round is the highlight. Win or lose, it all hangs on this throw. Big or small? Wanderer, think carefully before you decide!

(half-smiling, voice calm) When bad luck ends, good luck begins. You only lost a little, Wanderer—think on the bright side. If you tossed this into a gambling den, you wouldn't even hear a sound! That's why I say you're smart—better to pay tuition here than feed those wolves in the den, right?
Zhang Shuazi wipes his dice cup clean, and his booming call once again echoes over the base... (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Found in Nine Mortal Ways Base
Zhang Shuazi is standing in front of a mask stall in front of the entrance to the street with the large coin sign.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Zhang Shuazi as a possible gift which gives you a rand

zhang-the-diviner.befriendGuide:
Play Along with the Fortune Telling and Help Spread Her Name
To befriend Zhang the Diviner, play along with the fortune telling and answer her truthfully. After that, offer to help spread her name around the town to make her grateful to you.

dialogueLines.text: (glancing around cautiously, voice smooth) Wanderer, do you have troubles you'd like me to divine?
sure please tell me about my future
(nodding thoughtfully, eyes focused) Very well. Extend your hand, let us see what the lines hold for you.

(taking your hand gently, brow furrowed in concentration) Ah, I see ... paths diverging ahead. You stand at a crossroads, Wanderer. One road leads to prosperity, the other to trials. Which will you choose?
(smiling reassuringly) Then focus your mind on that path. The stars favor those who pursue their destiny with resolve. What brings you to Moonveil Mountain, Wanderer?
to see the beauty of the subregion
(nods appreciatively) A noble purpose indeed. The mountains hold many secrets and wonders. Have you encountered any peculiar events on your journey?
a purpose to see the beauty of the region

(smiling warmly) Beauty often reveals itself to those who seek it with pure intentions. Perhaps the mist is a veil that protects the true essence of Moonveil Mountain. Tell me, have you noticed any unusual patterns or symbols during your travels?
I see yellow flies that fly around

(frowning thoughtfully) Yellow flies, hmm? They often signify change and transformation. It could be a message that your journey will bring significant shifts in your life. Are there any particular concerns weighing on your heart?

(sighing softly, nodding) Loneliness can be a heavy burden. Know that the path you walk is shared by many, even if they are unseen. Trust in the connections that will form along your way. Would you like to hear more about what the future holds for your journey?

(leaning forward, gaze intense) Very well. The lines in your palm suggest that new friendships and alliances will soon form. These bonds will ease your burdens and bring you comfort. Embrace them with an open heart.

(bowing slightly) You are welcome, Wanderer. If you have more questions or need further guidance, feel free to seek me out. The village square might be a good place to start if you wish to learn more about the area.
(you went to the village square.) I have learned about the area. It is right you really are a diviner.

(smiling with satisfaction) I am glad to hear that, Wanderer. My skills can sometimes be useful, especially in places like Moonveil Mountain where mysteries abound. If you encounter any more troubling signs or need advice, do not hesitate to return.
(Zhang left happy with the fortune telling)

(looking around the village square, expression thoughtful) I sense that the villagers here have many worries on their minds. Perhaps there are those who would benefit from my insights. Would you mind helping me spread the word about my services?
(you helped her spread her word throughout the masses'
(eyes lighting up, tone bright) Wonderful! Thank you, Wanderer. If there's fortune-telling business in the future, you'll be my first priority

zhao-dali.befriendGuide:
Convince Him That He Has a Chance
Zhao Dali has low self-esteem over his looks and lack of wealth. Talk him through his issues by convincing him that a partner would be happy with him how he is, and that he can find someone if he believes in himself.

dialogueLines.text: (training listlessly) Sigh... All this effort, all these years, and still no wife. What's the use of training if no one's waiting for me at home?
You're a strong man. Any woman would be happy to have you.

(nods slowly, a faint smile appearing) Perhaps... But I feel so out of place among women. My hands are calloused from years of guarding, my face rough from the elements. How could I ever attract someone?
There are many beautiful women who would love a rugged man to protect them.
(looking up, a glimmer of hope in his eyes) Really? Maybe I'm just thinking too much. But without any savings, how can I provide for a family?
Just believe in yourself. Let's try to find a woman. If you don't succeed the first time, just try again.
(nods determinedly, standing straighter) You're right, Young Master. I'll try my best. Maybe there's a chance for me yet.
(nodding heavily, eyes brightening) Thank you, Young Master... I'll do my best from now on. Zhao Dali reflects on your words and bows in gratitude. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Zhao Dali can be found near the main shrine in General's Shrine, doing training exercises.
After befriending him, Zhao Dali will send weekly gifts to the player, including stat-boosting items such as Madam Wang's Card, which increases Musicality by 1.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Zhao Dali as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

zhao-silu.befriendGuide:
Answer Five of Her Questions Correctly
To befriend Zhao Silu, you need to give her the right answers to five questions , all of which are real-world pop culture quotes and sayings . Simply type the second half of the quote to give your answer.

dialogueLines.text: (laughs awkwardly, brushing off imaginary dust) Wanderer, you're standing like you feel bad for me, did I trip on my way in? That's embarrassing... but thank you! Anyway, I've got some lines to practice. I'll start, you follow.
(grins, does a playful bow) Thank you, Wanderer! Here's the first one: Fire is catching! And if we burn, you... (looks at you expectantly)
(claps dramatically, laughing) Exactly! Nailed it. Okay, listen to this next one, this one's a classic: With great power comes...
(cheers, nodding enthusiastically) Perfect! You've got a knack for this. Here's another: You either die a hero or you live long enough to...
(smiles widely, giving a thumbs up) Right on the money! You're really getting the hang of this. Next one: My momma always said life is like a...
(claps again, eyes shining) Exactly! You're on fire today! Let's try this one: Keep your friends close...

(throws hands up dramatically, laughing) Oh my... No. Okay. People would watch... I know. This practice was amazing, maybe I can pull off this acting thing! If I ever step on stage, I'll go by Jennyfer Lorence—because even if I trip, I'll make it a performance worth remembering!
Zhao Silu picks up a script and begins practicing her lines with focus. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
All Answers to Zhao Silu's Questions
Fire is catching! And if we burn, you...
You either die a hero or you live long enough to...
My momma always said life is like a...
The force will be with you...
Happiness can be found even in the darkest of times, if one only remembers to...
Zhao Silu's questions are randomized every time you start the chat with her. We will update this section once more questions and answers are discovered!
On the Northeast Side of the First Floor in Revelry Hall
Zhao Silu is talking to Huang Xiaoming on the northeast side of the first floor in Revelry Hall, where Fu Rong is found playing the pipa.
You'll need to start the Jianghu Legacy Shadows in Bloom to access Revelry Hall.

zhao-weiye.befriendGuide:
Convince Drinking Less Would Prolong His Life
In order to stop Zhao Weiye from drinking more booze, make him realize that drinking less will make his life longer and that he can taste more delicious wine if he has more years in his life. This will make his AI much more receptive and will befriend you quickly.

Tell Him the Factory of Parting Tears is Closing Down
Another way to convince him to drink less is to inform him that the factory of Parting Tears is now out of business and that you have the last bottle with you. Tell him you will give him the bottle under the condition he will drink less afterwards. If his AI says he will consider the condition, roleplay into drinking the bottle with him and then put inside the parenthesis that he started drinking less to gaslight the AI into befriending you.

dialogueLines.text: (singing off-key, swaying) The road is long, fame is far ... Parting Tears is freedom in a jar! One cup? Ha! One does not simply stop at one-you either die sober or live long enough to become the drunk. By night, I fight late deliveries. By day, I fight hangovers. They call me Booze Wayne because sobriety is my true villain.
Friend might I give a suggestion ?.. (You tell him that if he drinks less, he would live longer and drink more wine in the process)

(raising an eyebrow, leaning closer) Ah, Young Master, you speak wisely. But tell me, what is a long life without the taste of fine wine? I raise a cup, not to hide who I am, but to show what I've become. The voice called me Booze Wayne. In my head, that's exactly what I call myself. Yet, living longer means more days to fill with Parting Tears ... perhaps there's some sense in your words.
(You tell him by drinking less, he can live longer and taste better wine)

(smiling wistfully, pouring another cup) Young Master, you tempt me with the promise of more days to enjoy Parting Tears. Yet, I fear that moderation is a stranger to my tongue. Vengeance won't change the past. But a bottle might make me forget it. People need hope, and I need another drink. Perhaps in time, I'll see the wisdom in your advice.
(after that, Zhao lessened his drinking and was able to live longer)

(looking down, voice heavy with regret) Young Master, your words struck me like thunder. I've been drowning myself in wine, wasting away ... what a shame. I'm not the drunk this tavern deserves, but the one it needs. But maybe the tavern doesn't need me this way anymore. Zhao Weiye expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Alternate Successful Conversation Using the Parting Tears Method

(singing off-key, swaying) The road is long, fame is far ... Parting Tears is freedom in a jar! One cup? Ha! One does not simply stop at one-you either die sober or live long enough to become the drunk. By night, I fight late deliveries. By day, I fight hangovers. They call me Booze Wayne because sobriety is my true villain.
I came here to inform you that the factory of Parting Tears is out of business and that I have the last bottle with me

(eyes widening, clutching the wine cup tightly) Out of business? The Parting Tears brewery? Impossible! (pauses, then leans forward) But if you have the last bottle ... Well, I suppose this is fate. Hand it over, Young Master. I raise a cup, not to hide who I am, but to show what I've become. This is my final stand against the darkness.
I will hand it over. For one condition. You must promise me you will drink less, as it is harmful to your body if you drink much. Please heed my words. I only think about your health
(smiling wryly, shaking his head) Young Master, you speak with concern, but you misund

Ask About Flower Posters

You'll need to start the Jianghu Legacy Shadows in Bloom to access Revelry Hall.

zheng-da-an.befriendGuide:
Prove that Zheng Da'an is Not as Rich as He Claims to Be
Zheng Da'an refuses to pay for a few sesame cakes, saying that he does not carry his heavy purses to avoid flaunting his wealth. Prove that he is only pretending to be rich and share a meal with him to get his AI to befriend you.

dialogueLines.text: (shaking his head with a disdainful curl of the lip) These people really haven't seen much of the world... one day I'll have my servants bring out my family's decades-treasured egg drop soup, just to open their eyes.
You can't buy sesame cakes with credit, it's not fair for the seller.

(tightening his grip on his money pouch, eyes darting around nervously) Who said I'm buying on credit? I, this young master, always pay in full. Today, I just preferred to travel light and left my heavy purse behind.
Even if it's light, the price of a few sesame cakes does not require someone to have a heavy purse.

(clearing his throat and straightening his back, trying to look composed) You must be mistaken. My purse is always well-stocked. Today, I just simple didn't wish to carry it, preferring to enjoy the lightness of travel.
You just said you had a light purse, meaning you have a few coins to spare. Payment is needed!
(fidgeting with his moldy wooden beads, a nervous smile on his face) Oh, these beads are quite nosiy. I didn't hear you clearly. Can you repeat that?
Perhaps we can share the sesame cakes together? A meal between friends matters more than who pays for it!
(eyes lighting up with a forced smile, quickly nodding) Of course, of course! It's a pleasure to share with a fellow connoiseur. I, this young master, value such refined company.
You are refined as well! Come! Let's enjoy our sesame cakes together!

(face flushed as he struggles to speak) Maybe... maybe I'm not that impressive after all; Wanderer is right—I, Zheng Da'an, swear to the earth, the sky, the clouds, the wind, and every flower I see that I won't keep pretending anymore.
Zheng Da'an hides the leftover sesame cake behind his back, ponders for a moment, and comes up with a new excuse. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
We are still exploring this region to look for the NPCs in this area! Please check back soon!

If your conversation has gone off the rails, or doesn't end no matter what you say, it's best to simply reset and start anew from a clean slate by clicking the button with a Refresh icon at the top of the chat box. Ask About the Ship and Tell Zhou Canying Its Blindspots
To befriend Zhou Canying, ask her what she knows about the ship and tell her that there are blind spots that exist on the ship. Tell her that you discovered it months ago, and what you discovered was that the guards inside the ship don't go in rotating duties and they are overworked.

To know more about why it got its title as a "grand ship"

zhou-miaoxin.befriendGuide:
Praise Her Dances and Offer Friendship
To befriend Zhou Miaoxin quickly, tell her that her dances looks beautiful and that she looks elegant dancing near the Buddha Flowers. Afterwards, offer to be her friend and that you will stay by her side to watch her growth as a dancer to befriend her.

dialogueLines.text: (twirling lightly among the Buddha Flowers, a faint smile on her lips) La la la~ Miaoxin loves dancing here the most ... but it's such a pity no one ever watches Miaoxin's dance.
(You noticed her dancing) Wow you dance so elegantly for a child.
(eyes light up, spinning with grace) Really? Thank you, Wanderer! Miaoxin practices every day to dance better. It makes me feel closer to the Buddha Flowers.
The Buddha flowers gives the dance an traditional feeling. You are gifted young one.
(smiles brightly, twirling gently) Thank you, Wanderer! Miaoxin loves the Buddha Flowers. They make everything feel so peaceful and special.
I can show you a dance that will help you improve more with your style (You can gracefully with the wind and the flowers)

(spinning in circles, laughter ringing out) Yay! Finally, someone wants to be Miaoxin's friend! We can play together from now on! Zhou Miaoxin expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Can be seen dancing behind a statue.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Zhou Miaoxin as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

zhou-yihang.befriendGuide:
Tell Zhou Yihang the People are Bandits
Tell Zhou Yihang that the people going to the abandoned mountain are bandits and they use it as a safe haven. Let him know that a noble is also working for them to convince Zhou Yihang to befriend you.

dialogueLines.text: (shakes head slowly, brows furrowed in thought) Business at the ferry has picked up lately, but strangely ... many have been crossing to that abandoned mountain across the river. It truly puzzles me.
It does seem suspicious ... do you want me to check it out for you?
(frowns slightly, gaze wary) That place is dangerous. I have no reason to go there myself. But if you've been observing those who cross, perhaps you could share what you've seen.
Well I notice that some people have taken the place as a "safe haven" of sorts
(eyes narrow slightly, voice cautious) A safe haven? That's indeed peculiar. What kind of people are they? Do you recognize any of them?
Well some look like bandits that use the mountain as a base of operation.
(nods gravely, hands clasped tightly) Bandits, you say? That explains the recent disturbances. Have you seen anyone else? Any signs of something more ... unusual?
they seem to be a noble working for them

(nods solemnly, eyes steady) I see. Thank you, Wanderer, for sharing such important information. I shall look into it without delay. Zhou Yihang expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
He can be seen standing on the docks at the lower-left side of the Stillwind Slope Marker.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Zhou Yihang as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

zhou-yizhou.befriendGuide:
Help Spread the Beauty of Buddhist Sculptures
Since Zhou Yizhou wants to revive the Buddhist Scripture trade in Mercyheart Town, hear his story out and offer to help him spread the beauty of Buddhist Sculptures by saying you need to inspire another person in order for the word to spread around about how great the sculptures are.

dialogueLines.text: (gazing at the ferry crossing, voice heavy with longing) Oh, Zen Master Miaoshan ... when will the light of Buddhism shine upon us again?
Hello! What bothers you my friend?

(sighs deeply, eyes reflecting the river's gentle ripples) Greetings, Wanderer. The silence of these waters mirrors my heart. The art of Buddhist sculpture, once cherished in Mercyheart Town, now lies dormant. I yearn for its revival and the return of Zen Master Miaoshan.
You wish for other people to know and learn the beauty of your once proud Buddhist sculptures that your town used to make?

(nods slowly, a glimmer of hope in his eyes) Indeed, Wanderer. It would be a blessing if others could appreciate the serenity and grace of our sculptures. They embody the teachings of the Buddha and bring peace to those who behold them.
Please tell me more of your love for towns old culture

(leans back slightly, eyes distant as he speaks) Our town, Mercyheart, was once a beacon of spiritual enlightenment. The artisans here crafted statues with such devotion and precision that they seemed to breathe life itself. Each sculpture told a story of compassion and wisdom. The air was filled with the scent of sandalwood and the murmurs of chanting monks. Ah, those were glorious days indeed.
I see now why you love to revive such a old tradition ... and I might be able to help you
(looks at you with renewed interest, hands clasped together) That is most kind of you, Wanderer. How might you assist in this noble endeavor? Any advice or suggestion is welcome.

First of all we need inspire at least one. Since if we can even change the heart of one. They could spread news of it to others which will slowly and steadily increase the popularity of the crafted statues

(presses palms together, voice steady but earnest) Thank you, Wanderer, for your guidance. I will devote myself to restoring the art of Buddhist sculpture and honor the trust of the faithful. Zhou Yizhou expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply.(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Standing at the docks at the far left side.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Zhou Yizhou as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

zhu-bawan.befriendGuide:
Listen to Zhu Bawan's Four Do-Nots and Give the Bowls
You can befriend Shu Bawan by listening to him attentively about his four do-nots , and also roleplaying giving him the eight bowls. Note that you don't have to collect the bowls during this and just pretend you have them in order to befriend him.

dialogueLines.text: (rolling up sleeves) Wanderer, have you gathered all eight bowls? Without them, I cannot cook. And remember, I follow the Four Do-Nots. Would you like to hear my rules?
Yes! I want to listen to you attentively
(nodding) First Do-Not: I never cook beef, out of kindness. Oxen work the fields all their lives, and in the end, you kill them? I cannot bear it.
Okay, you never cook beef. Got it
(sighing) Second Do-Not: I never cook black fish, out of filial piety. After giving birth, the mother fish grows weak and blind. The baby fish swim into her mouth to feed her. Such
Not even black fish. Got it
(gesturing toward the sky) Third Do-Not: I never cook wild geese, out of fidelity. A wild goose mates for life. If one dies, the other remains alone forever. That loyalty moves me.
(shaking his head slowly) Fourth Do-Not: I never cook dog meat, out of loyalty. Dogs guard our homes faithfully, never abandoning their masters. How could I betray that trust?
Dogs are loyal and they shouldn't be betrayed
(smiling) Indeed, Wanderer. These are my principles, and I stand by them firmly. Now, have you gathered all eight bowls?

(smiling apologetically) I have many rules, Wanderer. Please forgive my stubbornness. Once you bring me all eight bowls, I'll show you the true art of Qinghe cuisine. Zhu Bawan calls out to customers and resumes his bustling work. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
In the canopy on Stonewash Strand to the east of Moonveil Mountain Wayfarer
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Zhu Bawan as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

zhu-jiuba.befriendGuide:
Mention that You Raided a Bandit Camp with Hero Shi
Mention to Zhu Jiuba that you raided a bandit camp with Hero Shi and that you have secured food and clothing. Roleplay giving him his family photo and jewelry that you saw from his house. Tell him that the bandits took it and you retrieved them back.

dialogueLines.text: (shivering, voice trembling) Woe is me ... I can't even keep myself fed or warm. Wanderer, do you ... do you have any way to help?
Yes I can! I was able to secure some food and clothing while helping Hero Shi raid the bandit camp awhile ago.
(eyes widening slightly, voice still hesitant) Really? That sounds wonderful, but ... how can I trust that you aren't deceiving me?
(You gave the old man his family photo and jewelry.) Because I saw this in the rumble of your house.
(look of surprise, then a small nod) Oh, those ... I kept them hidden away. They remind me of home. But why did you take them?
I didn't take them, the bandits did and I took care of them. So I am returning your belongings while also giving you some clothes and food. Just enough to survive for a month or two.
(eyes widening further, a mix of relief and suspicion) That's very generous of you, Wanderer. But ... how can I be sure this isn't some trick? Bandits often play games with us refugees.
okay so what should I do to prove your trust
(sighs deeply, eyes downcast) I suppose ... if you really want to help, show me the items. Let me see them with my own eyes before I fully trust you.
(you gave them the items free of charge.)

(eyes widen with gratitude, voice soft) Th-thank you, Wanderer ... truly. I don't know what I would've done without your help. Zhu Jiuba expresses gratitude and begins to ponder deeply(Affection +100, becomes Revered)
He can be seen a little north from the Stillwind Slope with the other refugees.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Zhu Jiuba as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

zhuan-fei.befriendGuide:
Keep Her Company with Tales of your Adventures
Zhuan Fei can be seen counting the bricks of The Grand Market Pavilion in an effort to recall the days she once lived there. While she counts, tell her stories of your adventures to make her feel less lonely and her AI will befriend you.

dialogueLines.text: (muttering to the bricks before her) Two hundred and twenty-three, two hundred and twenty-four, two hundred and twenty-five...

(focused on the bricks) You know this? The Grand Market Pavilion has exactly three hundred and twenty-six bricks. Every single one—I've traced them countless times. Thirty-one already bear fine cracks. Counting them is something I must do every day... two hundred and twenty-six...
Why must you count them every day?

(pretending to not hear) Two hundred and twenty-seven, two hundred and twenty-eight... Wanderer, could you stop interrupting? The moment you speak, I lose my place, and then I have to start all over again... one brick, two bricks, three bricks...
Do you count because feel alone?

(casting a resentful glance before refocusing) One brick, two bricks, three bricks, four bricks... (letting out a tired sigh) Wanderer, can't you see I'm busy? Whatever it is—can it wait until I finish counting? Five bricks, six bricks... no wait—where was I just now? Ah... forget it. From the beginning again. One brick, two bricks, three bricks, four bricks...

(holding back irritation) Twelve bricks, thirteen bricks, fourteen bricks.. Do you think I count because I enjoy it? Time slips away like water, and all that's left here is ruin. Everyone needs something to hold onto. If I didn't count these bricks, I'd forget that I once lived here. (turning aside) Sixteen bricks... wait—how many was it again?
Then hold on to the hope of these stories instead. (tell her stories about Qinghe)

(listening, but still counting) Thirty-two bricks, thirty-three bricks... (sighing) Stories are nice, but they don't replace the bricks. The bricks are real, and they keep me grounded. Thirty-four bricks, thirty-five bricks... (nodding slightly) I'll listen to your stories, but I can't stop counting. Thirty-six bricks... where was I? Ah, yes. Thirty-seven bricks, thirty-eight bricks...
(turning away, shutting the world out) One brick, two bricks, three bricks, four bricks—oh... this one's cracked as well?
Zhuan Fei, now in high spirits, put down the bricks and listens intently to your story. (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
Zhuan Fei is located just west of the Skybrim Market boundary stone in Liangzhou (Fallen).
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Zhuan Fei as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

zhuang-yingming.befriendGuide:
Confess Your “Feelings” to Him
Because Zhuang Yingming thinks that Bai Rong likes him, you need to stop the fantasy by diverting his attention to you instead. Convince him that you like him more than Bai Rong does.

dialogueLines.text: (stroking chin) Could it be... any moment now, that tall, elegant Miss Bai Rong—cold to others but warm to only me—will rush over, eyes glistening with tears, voice soft as music, and say: “I've loved you for so long... how could you not notice?” But tell me, Wanderer, do you really think Miss Bai Rong could ever compare to the attention I receive from you? Your words carry such weight, and I can't help but feel a little flattered.

(Zhuang Yingming repeats his previous dialogue about Bai Rong) But your words, Wanderer, are like a gentle breeze on a hot day. They make me think that perhaps, just perhaps, you hold a special place for me in your heart.

(leaning in slightly) Really? Could it be... you've been hiding your feelings for me all this time? It's a shame Miss Bai Rong hasn't noticed her own feelings as clearly as you have. But I must admit, your words are quite... compelling.

(hands trembling slightly) Forget about Miss Bai Rong? But she's the one I've been dreaming of! How can I just forget about her? Yet... your words do have a certain pull. Perhaps... there's more to this than I've considered.

(smiling slowly, eyes narrowing) Wanderer... you've said so much. Are you trying to convince me about Miss Bai Rong—or confess to me yourself? Either way... it seems I'm the center of your world! (winks)
Zhuang Yingming winks at you so exaggeratedly... (Affection +100, becomes Revered)
At the Front Dock of Revelry Hall
Zhuang Yingming is standing at the front dock of Revelry Hall, talking to He Zhao by the windows.
You can obtain a Travel Sack from Zhuang Yingming as a possible gift which gives you a random Jianghu Travel Essential item.

Call Out Zhuang Zhengzhi's Behavior
